general.g_text_audio: 여자: 자, 여러분. 호텔에 도착했습니다. 많이 피곤하시죠? 먼저 방에 가 계시면 짐들을 가져다 드리겠습니다. 식사는 지하 1층 식당에서 하시면 됩니다. 호텔에 있는 수영장은 무료로 이용하실 수 있습니다. 그리고 필요한 것이 있으면 저에게 전화해 주십시오. 제 방은 301호입니다. 그럼 편히 쉬십시오.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nữ: Mọi người ơi. Chúng ta đã đến khách sạn rồi. Mọi người cảm thấy rất mệt đúng không? Các bạn cứ đi lên phòng trước đi rồi tôi sẽ mang hành lý lên sau. Các bạn có thể dùng bữa tại nhà hàng ở tầng hầm số 1. Hồ bơi ở khách sạn có thể được sử dụng miễn phí. Và nếu cần gì thì hãy cứ gọi cho tôi. Tôi ở phòng 301. Các bạn hãy nghỉ ngơi thật thoải mái nhé.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Woman: Everyone. We already arrived at the hotel. Are you tired? You guys just go up to your room first and I'll bring your luggage up later. You can eat in the restaurant on the first basement floor. You can use the swimming pool in the hotel for free. And if you need anything, just give me a call. My room is room 301. Please rest comfortably.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Tout le monde. Nous sommes déjà arrivés à l'hôtel. Êtes-vous fatigué? Montez d'abord dans votre chambre et je monterai vos bagages plus tard. Vous pouvez manger au restaurant au premier sous-sol. Vous pouvez utiliser la piscine de l'hôtel gratuitement. Et si vous avez besoin de quoi que ce soit, appelez-moi. Ma chambre est la chambre 301. Veuillez vous reposer confortablement.

#######

Woman: Everyone. We already arrived at the hotel. Are you tired? You guys just go up to your room first and I'll bring your luggage up later. You can eat in the restaurant on the first basement floor. You can use the swimming pool in the hotel for free. And if you need anything, just give me a call. My room is room 301. Please rest comfortably.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: Todos. Ya llegamos al hotel. ¿Estás cansado? Ustedes suban primero a su habitación y yo subo su equipaje más tarde. Puedes comer en el restaurante en el primer piso del sótano. Puede utilizar la piscina del hotel de forma gratuita. Y si necesitas algo, solo llámame. Mi habitación es la 301. Por favor, descanse cómodamente.

#######

Woman: Everyone. We already arrived at the hotel. Are you tired? You guys just go up to your room first and I'll bring your luggage up later. You can eat in the restaurant on the first basement floor. You can use the swimming pool in the hotel for free. And if you need anything, just give me a call. My room is room 301. Please rest comfortably.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Semuanya. Kami sudah sampai di hotel. Apa kau lelah? Kalian naik saja ke kamarmu dulu dan aku akan membawa barang bawaanmu nanti. Anda bisa makan di restoran di lantai basement pertama. Anda dapat menggunakan kolam renang di hotel secara gratis. Dan jika Anda butuh sesuatu, hubungi saya saja. Kamar saya kamar 301. Silakan istirahat dengan nyaman.

#######

Woman: Everyone. We already arrived at the hotel. Are you tired? You guys just go up to your room first and I'll bring your luggage up later. You can eat in the restaurant on the first basement floor. You can use the swimming pool in the hotel for free. And if you need anything, just give me a call. My room is room 301. Please rest comfortably.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女：みんな。私たちはすでにホテルに到着しました。疲れましたか？先に部屋に行って、後で荷物を持ってきます。地下1階のレストランでお召し上がりいただけます。ホテル内のプールを無料でご利用いただけます。何か必要な場合は、電話してください。私の部屋は301号室です。ゆっくり休んでください。

#######

Woman: Everyone. We already arrived at the hotel. Are you tired? You guys just go up to your room first and I'll bring your luggage up later. You can eat in the restaurant on the first basement floor. You can use the swimming pool in the hotel for free. And if you need anything, just give me a call. My room is room 301. Please rest comfortably.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Alle. Wir sind bereits im Hotel angekommen. Bist du müde? Ihr geht nur zuerst auf euer Zimmer und ich bringe später euer Gepäck hoch. Essen kann man im Restaurant im ersten Untergeschoss. Sie können das Schwimmbad im Hotel kostenlos nutzen. Und wenn Sie etwas brauchen, rufen Sie mich einfach an. Mein Zimmer ist Zimmer 301. Bitte ruhen Sie sich bequem aus.

#######

Woman: Everyone. We already arrived at the hotel. Are you tired? You guys just go up to your room first and I'll bring your luggage up later. You can eat in the restaurant on the first basement floor. You can use the swimming pool in the hotel for free. And if you need anything, just give me a call. My room is room 301. Please rest comfortably.

女：大家。我们已经到了酒店。你累了吗？你们先回房间吧，我等会帮你拿行李。您可以在地下一层的餐厅用餐。您可以免费使用酒店的游泳池。如果你需要什么，就给我打电话。我的房间是301房间，请好好休息。

#######

Woman: Everyone. We already arrived at the hotel. Are you tired? You guys just go up to your room first and I'll bring your luggage up later. You can eat in the restaurant on the first basement floor. You can use the swimming pool in the hotel for free. And if you need anything, just give me a call. My room is room 301. Please rest comfortably.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：大家。我們已經到了酒店。你累了嗎？你們先回房間吧，我等會幫你拿行李。您可以在地下一層的餐廳用餐。您可以免費使用酒店的游泳池。如果你需要什麼，就給我打電話。我的房間是301房間，請好好休息。

#######

Woman: Everyone. We already arrived at the hotel. Are you tired? You guys just go up to your room first and I'll bring your luggage up later. You can eat in the restaurant on the first basement floor. You can use the swimming pool in the hotel for free. And if you need anything, just give me a call. My room is room 301. Please rest comfortably.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Tutti. Siamo già arrivati ​​in albergo. Sei stanco? Ragazzi, andate prima in camera vostra e io porterò su i vostri bagagli più tardi. Si può mangiare nel ristorante al primo piano interrato. È possibile utilizzare la piscina dell'hotel gratuitamente. E se hai bisogno di qualcosa, chiamami. La mia stanza è la stanza 301. Per favore, riposati comodamente.

#######

Woman: Everyone. We already arrived at the hotel. Are you tired? You guys just go up to your room first and I'll bring your luggage up later. You can eat in the restaurant on the first basement floor. You can use the swimming pool in the hotel for free. And if you need anything, just give me a call. My room is room 301. Please rest comfortably.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Все. Мы уже приехали в отель. Вы устали? Ребята, сначала поднимитесь в свою комнату, а я принесу ваш багаж позже. Пообедать можно в ресторане на первом цокольном этаже. Вы можете бесплатно пользоваться бассейном в отеле. А если тебе что-нибудь понадобится, просто позвони мне. Моя комната — номер 301. Пожалуйста, отдыхайте поудобнее.

#######

Woman: Everyone. We already arrived at the hotel. Are you tired? You guys just go up to your room first and I'll bring your luggage up later. You can eat in the restaurant on the first basement floor. You can use the swimming pool in the hotel for free. And if you need anything, just give me a call. My room is room 301. Please rest comfortably.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: ทุกคน. เรามาถึงโรงแรมแล้ว คุณเหนื่อยไหม? พวกคุณขึ้นไปที่ห้องก่อนแล้วฉันจะเอาสัมภาระของคุณขึ้นทีหลัง คุณสามารถรับประทานอาหารในร้านอาหารที่ชั้นใต้ดินชั้นหนึ่งได้ คุณสามารถใช้สระว่ายน้ำในโรงแรมได้ฟรี และถ้าคุณต้องการอะไร เพียงแค่โทรหาฉัน ห้องของฉันคือห้อง 301 กรุณาพักผ่อนอย่างสบาย

#######

Woman: Everyone. We already arrived at the hotel. Are you tired? You guys just go up to your room first and I'll bring your luggage up later. You can eat in the restaurant on the first basement floor. You can use the swimming pool in the hotel for free. And if you need anything, just give me a call. My room is room 301. Please rest comfortably.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Todos. Já chegamos ao hotel. Você está cansado? Vocês vão primeiro para o seu quarto e eu trago sua bagagem mais tarde. Você pode comer no restaurante no primeiro andar do subsolo. Você pode usar a piscina do hotel gratuitamente. E se precisar de alguma coisa, é só me ligar. Meu quarto é o 301. Por favor, descanse confortavelmente.

#######

Woman: Everyone. We already arrived at the hotel. Are you tired? You guys just go up to your room first and I'll bring your luggage up later. You can eat in the restaurant on the first basement floor. You can use the swimming pool in the hotel for free. And if you need anything, just give me a call. My room is room 301. Please rest comfortably.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: हर कोई. हम पहले ही होटल पहुँच चुके थे। क्या आप थके हैं? तुम लोग पहले अपने कमरे में जाओ और मैं तुम्हारा सामान बाद में लाऊंगा। आप पहली बेसमेंट मंजिल पर रेस्तरां में खाना खा सकते हैं। आप होटल में स्विमिंग पूल का निःशुल्क उपयोग कर सकते हैं। और अगर तुम्हें किसी चीज की जरूरत हो तो बस मुझे फोन कर देना. मेरा कमरा कमरा संख्या 301 है। कृपया आराम से आराम करें।

#######

Woman: Everyone. We already arrived at the hotel. Are you tired? You guys just go up to your room first and I'll bring your luggage up later. You can eat in the restaurant on the first basement floor. You can use the swimming pool in the hotel for free. And if you need anything, just give me a call. My room is room 301. Please rest comfortably.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Herkes. Otele çoktan varmıştık. Yorgun musun? Siz önce odanıza çıkın, ben de bagajınızı sonra getiririm. Birinci bodrum katındaki restoranda yemek yiyebilirsiniz. Otelin yüzme havuzunu ücretsiz olarak kullanabilirsiniz. Ve eğer bir şeye ihtiyacın olursa beni araman yeterli. Benim odam 301 numaralı oda. Lütfen rahat uyuyun.

#######

Woman: Everyone. We already arrived at the hotel. Are you tired? You guys just go up to your room first and I'll bring your luggage up later. You can eat in the restaurant on the first basement floor. You can use the swimming pool in the hotel for free. And if you need anything, just give me a call. My room is room 301. Please rest comfortably.

explain.vi:
Chọn nội dung đúng với hội thoại được nghe. 
1. Bây giờ mọi người đang ở trong phòng khách sạn. 
2. Mọi người phải tự mang hành lý đi. 
3. Nếu muốn dùng hồ bơi thì phải trả tiền. 
4. Nếu cần giúp đỡ thì liên hệ phòng 301. 
--------------------
Nhân vật nữ nói rằng mình ở phòng 301 nên đáp án đúng là 4.
explain.en:
Choose the answer that matches what you heard.
1. Now everyone is in the hotel room.
2. Everyone must bring their own luggage.
3. People have to pay to use the swimming pool.
4. If anyone needs help, contact room 301.
--------------------
The woman said that she was in room 301, so the correct answer is 4.

general.g_text_audio: 여자: 요즘 집안에 실내 정원을 만들고 싶어하는 분들 많으시죠? 하지만 꽃을 심고 정원을 가꾸는 게 보통 일은 아닙니다. 이럴 때 도움을 받을 수 있는 책이 한 권 있는데요. 이 책에는 꽃을 키우는 방법들이 사진과 함께 있어 배우기가 아주 쉽습니다. 또 봄, 여름, 가을, 겨울에 키울 수 있는 꽃의 종류도 알 수 있고요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nữ: Dạo gần đây có rất nhiều người muốn xây một khu vườn trong nhà đúng không? Nhưng trồng hoa và chăm sóc vườn tược lại không phải là việc đơn giản. Những lúc thế này có một cuốn sách có thể giúp đỡ các bạn. Trong cuốn sách này có cách trồng hoa đi kèm với các bức ảnh nên rất dễ học. Ngoài ra, người đọc còn có thể biết được các loại hoa có thể trồng vào mùa xuân, hạ, thu, đông.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Woman: There are a lot of people who want to make an indoor garden in their house these days, right? But planting flowers and gardening are not common. At times like these there is a book that can help you. This book is very easy to learn because it has pictures of how to grow flowers. You can also know the kinds of flowers that can be grown in spring, summer, fall, and winter.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Il y a beaucoup de gens qui veulent faire un jardin intérieur dans leur maison ces jours-ci, n'est-ce pas ? Mais planter des fleurs et jardiner ne sont pas courants. Dans des moments comme ceux-ci, il y a un livre qui peut vous aider. Ce livre est très facile à apprendre car il contient des images sur la façon de faire pousser des fleurs. Vous pouvez également connaître les types de fleurs qui peuvent être cultivées au printemps, en été, en automne et en hiver.

#######

Woman: There are a lot of people who want to make an indoor garden in their house these days, right? But planting flowers and gardening are not common. At times like these there is a book that can help you. This book is very easy to learn because it has pictures of how to grow flowers. You can also know the kinds of flowers that can be grown in spring, summer, fall, and winter.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: Hay mucha gente que quiere hacer un jardín interior en su casa estos días, ¿verdad? Pero la plantación de flores y la jardinería no son comunes. En momentos como estos hay un libro que te puede ayudar. Este libro es muy fácil de aprender porque tiene imágenes de cómo cultivar flores. También puede conocer los tipos de flores que se pueden cultivar en primavera, verano, otoño e invierno.

#######

Anda juga bisa mengetahui jenis bunga yang bisa ditanam di musim semi, musim panas, musim gugur, dan musim dingin.

general.g_text_audio: 여자: 여러분, 이쪽으로 오세요. 지금 보시는 이것은 옛날 신발인데요. 옛날 사람들은 비가 올 때 이 신발을 신었습니다. 신발의 앞과 뒤가 바닥보다 높아서 비가 올 때도 발이 물에 젖지 않고요. 또 가벼운 나무로 만들었기 때문에 신었을 때 불편하지 않습니다. 남자 신발과 여자 신발은 모양이 좀 다른데요. 여자 신발은 꽃 그림을 그려서 예쁘게 만들었습니다. 다 보셨으면 옆으로 가실까요?

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nữ: Mọi người, xin mời sang bên này. Thứ các bạn đang thấy đây là một đôi giày cổ xưa. Ngày xưa người ta thường mang đôi giày này khi trời mưa. Phía trước và phía sau giày cao hơn mặt đất nên ngay cả khi trời mưa cũng không bị ướt chân. Ngoài ra, nó được làm từ loại gỗ nhẹ nên khi mang sẽ không cảm thấy bất tiện. Giày nam và giày nữ có hình dạng hơi khác nhau. Giày của phụ nữ được làm đẹp bằng cách vẽ hình những bông hoa. Nếu các bạn đã xem xong thì chúng ta qua bên cạnh nhé?
g_text_audio_translate.en: Woman: Everyone, please come over here. What you see now is a pair of ancient shoes. In the old days people used to wear these shoes when it rained. The front and back of the shoes are higher than the ground, so your feet won't get wet even when it rains. In addition, since they were made of light wood, they are not uncomfortable to wear. Men's and women's shoes have slightly different shapes. Women's shoes were made pretty by drawing flowers. If you've finished watching it, shall we go over to the side?
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Tout le monde, s'il vous plaît, venez ici. Ce que vous voyez maintenant est une paire de chaussures anciennes. Autrefois, les gens portaient ces chaussures quand il pleuvait. L'avant et l'arrière des chaussures sont plus hauts que le sol, de sorte que vos pieds ne seront pas mouillés même lorsqu'il pleut. De plus, comme ils sont en bois clair, ils ne sont pas inconfortables à porter. Les chaussures pour hommes et pour femmes ont des formes légèrement différentes. Les chaussures des femmes étaient rendues jolies en dessinant des fleurs. Si vous avez fini de le regarder, pouvons-nous passer sur le côté ?

#######

Woman: Everyone, please come over here. What you see now is a pair of ancient shoes. In the old days people used to wear these shoes when it rained. The front and back of the shoes are higher than the ground, so your feet won't get wet even when it rains. In addition, since they were made of light wood, they are not uncomfortable to wear. Men's and women's shoes have slightly different shapes. Women's shoes were made pretty by drawing flowers. If you've finished watching it, shall we go over to the side?
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: Todos, por favor vengan aquí. Lo que ves ahora es un par de zapatos antiguos. En los viejos tiempos, la gente solía usar estos zapatos cuando llovía. La parte delantera y trasera de los zapatos son más altas que el suelo, por lo que tus pies no se mojarán incluso cuando llueva. Además, al ser de madera clara, no resultan incómodos de llevar. Los zapatos de hombre y mujer tienen formas ligeramente diferentes. Los zapatos de mujer se hacían bonitos dibujando flores. Si has terminado de verlo, ¿vamos a un lado?

#######

g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Semuanya, silakan datang ke sini. Apa yang Anda lihat sekarang adalah sepasang sepatu kuno. Di masa lalu orang biasa memakai sepatu ini saat hujan. Bagian depan dan belakang sepatu lebih tinggi dari tanah, sehingga kaki Anda tidak akan basah meski diguyur hujan. Selain itu, karena terbuat dari kayu ringan, tidak nyaman dipakai. Sepatu pria dan wanita memiliki bentuk yang sedikit berbeda. Sepatu wanita dibuat cantik dengan menggambar bunga. Jika Anda sudah selesai menontonnya, akankah kita pergi ke samping?

女：皆さん、こちらに来てください。あなたが今見ているのは、古代の靴です。昔、人々は雨が降ったときにこれらの靴を履いていました。靴の前後が地面より高いので、雨が降っても足が濡れません。また、軽い木でできているので、履き心地も悪くありません。紳士靴と婦人靴では少し形が異なります。婦人靴はお花を描いて可愛らしくしました。見終わったら横に行きましょうか？

Herren- und Damenschuhe haben leicht unterschiedliche Formen. Damenschuhe wurden durch das Zeichnen von Blumen hübsch gemacht. Wenn Sie fertig sind, sollen wir zur Seite gehen?

g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Pessoal, por favor venham aqui. O que você vê agora é um par de sapatos antigos. Antigamente as pessoas usavam esses sapatos quando chovia. A frente e a parte de trás do calçado são mais altas que o solo, para que os pés não se molhem mesmo quando chove. Além disso, por serem feitos de madeira clara, não são desconfortáveis ​​de usar. Os sapatos masculinos e femininos têm formatos ligeiramente diferentes. Os sapatos femininos ficaram bonitos com desenhos de flores. Se você terminou de assistir, vamos para o lado?

#######

Woman: Everyone, please come over here. What you see now is a pair of ancient shoes. In the old days people used to wear these shoes when it rained. The front and back of the shoes are higher than the ground, so your feet won't get wet even when it rains. In addition, since they were made of light wood, they are not uncomfortable to wear. Men's and women's shoes have slightly different shapes. Women's shoes were made pretty by drawing flowers. If you've finished watching it, shall we go over to the side?
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: सब लोग कृपया यहाँ आ जाओ। अब आप जो देख रहे हैं वह प्राचीन जूतों की एक जोड़ी है। पुराने ज़माने में लोग बारिश होने पर ये जूते पहनते थे। जूतों का अगला और पिछला भाग ज़मीन से ऊँचा है, इसलिए बारिश होने पर भी आपके पैर गीले नहीं होंगे। इसके अलावा, चूंकि वे हल्की लकड़ी से बने थे, इसलिए उन्हें पहनने में असुविधा नहीं होती। पुरुषों और महिलाओं के जूतों का आकार थोड़ा अलग होता है। महिलाओं के जूतों पर फूल बनाकर उन्हें सुंदर बनाया गया। यदि आपने इसे देखना समाप्त कर लिया है, तो क्या हम किनारे पर चलें?

#######

Woman: Everyone, please come over here. What you see now is a pair of ancient shoes. In the old days people used to wear these shoes when it rained. The front and back of the shoes are higher than the ground, so your feet won't get wet even when it rains. In addition, since they were made of light wood, they are not uncomfortable to wear. Men's and women's shoes have slightly different shapes. Women's shoes were made pretty by drawing flowers. If you've finished watching it, shall we go over to the side?
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Herkes buraya gelsin lütfen. Şimdi gördüğünüz şey bir çift eski ayakkabı. Eskiden insanlar yağmur yağdığında bu ayakkabıları giyerlerdi. Ayakkabının ön ve arka kısmı yerden yüksek olduğundan yağmur yağsa bile ayaklarınız ıslanmaz. Ayrıca hafif ahşaptan yapıldıkları için giyilmeleri rahatsızlık vermez. Erkek ve kadın ayakkabıları biraz farklı şekillere sahiptir. Kadın ayakkabıları çiçek çizilerek güzelleştirildi. İzlemeyi bitirdiysen yan tarafa geçelim mi?

#######

Woman: Everyone, please come over here. What you see now is a pair of ancient shoes. In the old days people used to wear these shoes when it rained. The front and back of the shoes are higher than the ground, so your feet won't get wet even when it rains. In addition, since they were made of light wood, they are not uncomfortable to wear. Men's and women's shoes have slightly different shapes. Women's shoes were made pretty by drawing flowers. If you've finished watching it, shall we go over to the side?

explain.vi:
Chọn đáp án phù hợp với nội dung đã nghe.
1. Giày nam thì có hình vẽ. 
2. Mang đôi giày này khi xuống nước. 
3. Đôi giày này làm bằng gỗ nên rất bất tiện. 
4. Đôi giày này được làm cao phía trước và phía sau. 
--------------------
신발: Giày
불편하다: Bất tiện 
물에 젖지 않다: Không bị thấm nước
앞: Trước >< 뒤: Sau

Đáp án gây nhiễu: 2. Mang giày này khi trời mưa thì sẽ không bị ướt chân, không có thông tin nào cho thấy khi xuống nước thì nên mang đôi giày này.
explain.en:
Choose the answer that matches what you heard.
1. Men's shoes are drawn.
2. These shoes are worn when people go into the water.
3. These shoes are uncomfortable because they are made of wood.
4. These shoes are made high the front and back.

general.g_text_audio: 여자: (딩동댕) 안녕하십니까? 매주 수요일은 우리 회사 ‘가족 사랑의 날’ 입니다. 내일 ‘가족 사랑의 날’에는 모두 4시에 퇴근하시기 바랍니다. 특별히 이번에는 회사에서 케이크를 준비했습니다. 내일 퇴근하실 때 3층에 있는 식당에서 받아 가시기 바랍니다. 가족들과 즐거운 시간 보내십시오. 감사합니다. (딩동댕)

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nữ: (Tinh toong teng) Xin chào? Thứ tư hàng tuần là "Ngày gia đình" của công ty chúng ta. Ngày mai - "ngày gia đình" mong là các bạn sẽ tan làm lúc 4 giờ. Đặc biệt lần này công ty đã chuẩn bị bánh kem. Ngày mai khi tan làm hãy nhận bánh ở nhà ăn tầng 3. Chúc các bạn có một khoảng thời gian vui vẻ bên gia đình. Cảm ơn các bạn. (Tinh toong teng)
g_text_audio_translate.en: Woman: (Ding dong daeng) Hello? Every Wednesday is our company's 'Family Love Day'. On ‘Family Love Day’ tomorrow, please leave work at 4 o'clock. Especially the company has prepared cakes this time. Please pick it up at the restaurant on the 3rd floor when you leave work tomorrow. Have fun with your family. Thank you. (Ding dong daeng)
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : (Ding dong daeng) Bonjour ? Chaque mercredi est le « Family Love Day » de notre entreprise. Le ‘Family Love Day’ demain, veuillez quitter le travail à 4 heures. Surtout l'entreprise a préparé des gâteaux cette fois. Veuillez venir le chercher au restaurant au 3e étage en quittant le travail demain. Amusez-vous avec votre famille. Merci. (Ding dong daeng)

#######

Woman: (Ding dong daeng) Hello? Every Wednesday is our company's 'Family Love Day'. On ‘Family Love Day’ tomorrow, please leave work at 4 o'clock. Especially the company has prepared cakes this time. Please pick it up at the restaurant on the 3rd floor when you leave work tomorrow. Have fun with your family. Thank you. (Ding dong daeng)
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: (Ding dong daeng) ¿Hola? Todos los miércoles es el 'Día del amor familiar' de nuestra empresa. En el 'Día del amor familiar' mañana, salga del trabajo a las 4 en punto. Especialmente la compañía ha preparado pasteles esta vez. Recójalo en el restaurante del tercer piso cuando salga del trabajo mañana. Diviértete con tu familia. Gracias. (Ding dong daeng)

#######

Woman: (Ding dong daeng) Hello? Every Wednesday is our company's 'Family Love Day'. On ‘Family Love Day’ tomorrow, please leave work at 4 o'clock. Especially the company has prepared cakes this time. Please pick it up at the restaurant on the 3rd floor when you leave work tomorrow. Have fun with your family. Thank you. (Ding dong daeng)

Apalagi perusahaan sudah menyiapkan kue kali ini. Silakan ambil di restoran di lantai 3 saat Anda pulang kerja besok. Bersenang-senanglah dengan keluarga Anda. Terima kasih. (Ding dong daeng)

Besonders Kuchen hat das Unternehmen diesmal vorbereitet. Bitte holen Sie es im Restaurant im 3. Stock ab, wenn Sie morgen die Arbeit verlassen. Viel Spaß mit Ihrer Familie. Vielen Dank. (Ding-Dong-Daeng)

Специально компания в этот раз приготовила торты. Пожалуйста, заберите его в ресторане на 3-м этаже завтра, когда уходите с работы. Веселитесь всей семьей. Спасибо. (Дин дон дэн)

Principalmente a empresa preparou bolos desta vez. Por favor, retire-o no restaurante do 3º andar quando sair do trabalho amanhã. Divirta-se com sua família. Obrigado. (Ding dong daeng)

explain.vi:
Tại sao người phụ nữ lại nói những điều này?
1. Để quyết định ngày đặc biệt của công ty
2. Để thông báo cho mọi người biết ngày nghỉ của công ty
3. Để thay đổi địa điểm chuẩn bị cho sự kiện của công ty
4. Để thông báo cho mọi người biết quà công ty tặng
--------------------
쉬는 날: Ngày nghỉ

V + (으)려고: Định làm gì đó. 

Người phụ nữ tập trung thông báo về quà công ty tặng nhân ngày gia đình, địa điểm, thời gian tặng quà.

1.決定公司的特殊日子
2. 通知人們公司的假期
3.變更公司活動籌備場地
4. 通知大家公司的禮物
--------------------
<g>쉬는 날:</g>休假

<g>V + (으)려고:</g>打算，打算。

女方告知公司的禮物，送禮的地點和時間。

#######

Why do the woman say these things?
1. To decide on a special day of the company
2. To inform people about the company's holiday
3. To change the venue of the company's event preparation
4. To inform everyone about the company's gifts
--------------------
<g>쉬는 날:</g> Day off

<g>V + (으)려고:</g> To plan to, to intend to.

The woman informs about the company's gifts, the place and time of the gift giving.

general.g_text_audio: 여자: (딩동댕)알립니다. 기숙사 건물 계단을 청소하려고 합니다. 청소 시간은 이번 주 금요일 오후 1시부터 6시까지입니다. 이 시간 동안 학생들은 계단으로 다닐 수 없습니다. 엘리베이터를 이용해 주십시오. 그리고 계단에 둔 자기 물건은 목요일 밤까지 모두 가져가 주시기 바랍니다. 감사합니다. (댕동딩)

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nữ: (Ding dong daeng) Chúng tôi xin thông báo. Chúng tôi sẽ vệ sinh cầu thang của tòa nhà ký túc xá. Thời gian vệ sinh là từ 1 giờ chiều đến 6 giờ chiều thứ sáu tuần này. Trong thời gian này, học sinh không thể đi bằng cầu thang. Vui lòng sử dụng thang máy. Cho đến tối thứ 5, hãy vui lòng dọn tất cả đồ đạc để ở cầu thang của các bạn. Cảm ơn các bạn. (Daeng dong ding)
g_text_audio_translate.en: Woman: (Ding dong daeng) We would like to announce. We are going to clean the stairs of the dormitory building. Cleaning time is from 1pm to 6pm this Friday. During this time, students cannot use the stairs. Please use the elevator. And please take all of your belongings on the stairs by Thursday night. Thank you. (Daeng dong ding)
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : (Ding dong daeng) Nous aimerions vous annoncer. Nous allons nettoyer les escaliers du dortoir. Le temps de nettoyage est de 13h à 18h ce vendredi. Pendant ce temps, les élèves ne peuvent pas utiliser les escaliers. Veuillez utiliser l'ascenseur. Et s'il vous plaît, prenez toutes vos affaires dans les escaliers d'ici jeudi soir. Merci. (Daeng dong ding)

#######

Woman: (Ding dong daeng) We would like to announce. We are going to clean the stairs of the dormitory building. Cleaning time is from 1pm to 6pm this Friday. During this time, students cannot use the stairs. Please use the elevator. And please take all of your belongings on the stairs by Thursday night. Thank you. (Daeng dong ding)
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: (Ding dong daeng) Nos gustaría anunciar. Vamos a limpiar las escaleras del edificio de dormitorios. El horario de limpieza es de 13:00 a 18:00 este viernes. Durante este tiempo, los estudiantes no pueden usar las escaleras. Por favor, use el ascensor. Y por favor lleve todas sus pertenencias a las escaleras el jueves por la noche. Gracias. (Daeng dong ding)

#######

Woman: (Ding dong daeng) We would like to announce. We are going to clean the stairs of the dormitory building. Cleaning time is from 1pm to 6pm this Friday. During this time, students cannot use the stairs. Please use the elevator. And please take all of your belongings on the stairs by Thursday night. Thank you. (Daeng dong ding)
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: (Ding dong daeng) Kami ingin mengumumkan. Kami akan membersihkan tangga gedung asrama. Waktu pembersihan adalah dari jam 1 siang sampai jam 6 sore hari Jumat ini. Selama ini, siswa tidak dapat menggunakan tangga. Silakan gunakan lift. Dan tolong bawa semua barang Anda di tangga pada Kamis malam. Terima kasih. (Daeng dong ding)

#######

Woman: (Ding dong daeng) We would like to announce. We are going to clean the stairs of the dormitory building. Cleaning time is from 1pm to 6pm this Friday. During this time, students cannot use the stairs. Please use the elevator. And please take all of your belongings on the stairs by Thursday night. Thank you. (Daeng dong ding)
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女性: (Ding dong daeng) お知らせします。寮舎の階段を掃除します。清掃時間は、今週の金曜日の午後 1 時から午後 6 時までです。この間、生徒は階段を使用できません。エレベーターをご利用ください。そして、木曜日の夜までに、階段にある荷物をすべて持って行ってください。ありがとうございました。 (デンドンディン)

#######

Woman: (Ding dong daeng) We would like to announce. We are going to clean the stairs of the dormitory building. Cleaning time is from 1pm to 6pm this Friday. During this time, students cannot use the stairs. Please use the elevator. And please take all of your belongings on the stairs by Thursday night. Thank you. (Daeng dong ding)
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: (Ding dong daeng) Wir würden gerne ankündigen. Wir werden die Treppe des Wohnheimgebäudes reinigen. Die Reinigungszeit ist diesen Freitag von 13:00 bis 18:00 Uhr. Während dieser Zeit können die Schüler die Treppe nicht benutzen. Bitte benutzen Sie den Aufzug. Und bringen Sie bitte alle Ihre Sachen bis Donnerstagabend auf die Treppe. Vielen Dank. (Daeng-Dong-Ding)

#######

Woman: (Ding dong daeng) We would like to announce. We are going to clean the stairs of the dormitory building. Cleaning time is from 1pm to 6pm this Friday. #######

Woman: (Ding dong daeng) We would like to announce. We are going to clean the stairs of the dormitory building. Cleaning time is from 1pm to 6pm this Friday. Durante questo periodo, gli studenti non possono utilizzare le scale. Si prega di utilizzare l'ascensore. E per favore porta tutte le tue cose sulle scale entro giovedì sera. Grazie. (Daeng dong ding)

general.g_text_audio: 여자: (딩동댕)승객 여러분, 안녕하십니까? 이 버스는 시청에서 출발해서 중앙공원까지 가는 서울 투어 버스입니다. 중간에 내려서 관광지를 구경할 수 있고, 다음 버스를 탈 때는 표를 다시 사지 않아도 됩니다. 버스는 삼십 분마다 서울 투어 버스 정류장에서 이용하실 수 있습니다. 감사합니다. (댕동딩)

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nữ: (Tinh toong teng) Xin chào quý khách. Đây là xe bus du lịch Seoul xuất phát từ tòa thị chính đi tới công viên Chungang. Quý khách có thể xuống ở bất kỳ điểm dừng nào để tham quan các địa điểm du lịch mà không cần mua vé lần nữa khi lên chiếc xe bus tiếp theo. Quý khách có thể bắt xe tại trạm xe bus du lịch Seoul với tần suất 30 phút một chuyến. Cảm ơn quý khách. (Teng toong ting)
g_text_audio_translate.en: Woman: (Ding dong daeng) How are you, passengers? This bus is a Seoul tour bus that departs from City Hall and goes to Chungang Park. You can get off at any stop to visit tourist attractions without buying tickets again when you take the next bus. Buses are available every 30 minutes at the Seoul tour bus stops. Thank you. (Daeng dong ding)
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : (Ding dong daeng) Comment allez-vous, passagers ? Ce bus est un bus touristique de Séoul qui part de l'hôtel de ville et se rend au parc Chungang. Vous pouvez descendre à n'importe quel arrêt pour visiter les attractions touristiques sans acheter à nouveau de billets lorsque vous prenez le prochain bus. Des bus sont disponibles toutes les 30 minutes aux arrêts de bus touristiques de Séoul. Merci. (Daeng dong ding)

#######

Woman: (Ding dong daeng) How are you, passengers? This bus is a Seoul tour bus that departs from City Hall and goes to Chungang Park. You can get off at any stop to visit tourist attractions without buying tickets again when you take the next bus. Buses are available every 30 minutes at the Seoul tour bus stops. Thank you. (Daeng dong ding)
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: (Ding dong daeng) ¿Cómo están, pasajeros? Este autobús es un autobús turístico de Seúl que sale del Ayuntamiento y va al Parque Chungang. Puedes bajarte en cualquier parada para visitar los lugares de interés turístico sin necesidad de volver a comprar billetes cuando tomes el siguiente autobús. Los autobuses están disponibles cada 30 minutos en las paradas de autobuses turísticos de Seúl. Gracias. (Daeng dong ding)

#######

Woman: (Ding dong daeng) How are you, passengers? This bus is a Seoul tour bus that departs from City Hall and goes to Chungang Park. You can get off at any stop to visit tourist attractions without buying tickets again when you take the next bus. Buses are available every 30 minutes at the Seoul tour bus stops. Thank you. (Daeng dong ding)
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: (Ding dong daeng) Apa kabar penumpang? Bus ini merupakan bus wisata Seoul yang berangkat dari Balai Kota dan menuju ke Taman Chungang. Anda bisa turun di halte mana saja untuk mengunjungi tempat wisata tanpa membeli tiket lagi saat naik bus berikutnya. Bus tersedia setiap 30 menit di halte bus wisata Seoul. Terima kasih. (Daeng dong ding)

#######

Woman: (Ding dong daeng) How are you, passengers? This bus is a Seoul tour bus that departs from City Hall and goes to Chungang Park. You can get off at any stop to visit tourist attractions without buying tickets again when you take the next bus. Buses are available every 30 minutes at the Seoul tour bus stops. Thank you. (Daeng dong ding)
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女性: (Ding dong daeng) 乗客の皆さん、お元気ですか?このバスは市庁を出発し、中央公園に行くソウル観光バスです。次のバスに乗るときは、チケットを再購入することなく、どの停留所でも降りて観光スポットを訪れることができます。バスは、ソウル観光バスの停留所で 30 分ごとに利用できます。ありがとうございました。 (デンドンディン)

#######

Woman: (Ding dong daeng) How are you, passengers? This bus is a Seoul tour bus that departs from City Hall and goes to Chungang Park. You can get off at any stop to visit tourist attractions without buying tickets again when you take the next bus. Buses are available every 30 minutes at the Seoul tour bus stops. Thank you. (Daeng dong ding)
g_text_audio_translate.de:

Sie können an jeder Haltestelle aussteigen, um Sehenswürdigkeiten zu besuchen, ohne erneut Tickets zu kaufen, wenn Sie den nächsten Bus nehmen. Busse fahren alle 30 Minuten an den Haltestellen der Tourbusse in Seoul ab. Vielen Dank. (Daeng-Dong-Ding)

#######

Woman: (Ding dong daeng) How are you, passengers? This bus is a Seoul tour bus that departs from City Hall and goes to Chungang Park. You can get off at any stop to visit tourist attractions without buying tickets again when you take the next bus. Buses are available every 30 minutes at the Seoul tour bus stops. Thank you. (Daeng dong ding)
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:

#######

Woman: (Ding dong daeng) How are you, passengers? This bus is a Seoul tour bus that departs from City Hall and goes to Chungang Park. Puoi scendere a qualsiasi fermata per visitare le attrazioni turistiche senza dover riacquistare i biglietti quando prendi l'autobus successivo. Gli autobus sono disponibili ogni 30 minuti alle fermate degli autobus turistici di Seoul. Grazie. (Daeng dong ding)

Вы можете выйти на любой остановке, чтобы посетить туристические достопримечательности, не покупая билеты повторно на следующем автобусе. ผู้หญิง: (ดิ๊งดองแดง) สบายดีไหมผู้โดยสาร? รถบัสคันนี้เป็นรถทัวร์กรุงโซลที่ออกจากศาลากลางและไปที่สวนสาธารณะชุงอัง คุณสามารถลงที่ป้ายใดก็ได้เพื่อเยี่ยมชมสถานที่ท่องเที่ยวโดยไม่ต้องซื้อตั๋วอีกครั้งเมื่อคุณขึ้นรถบัสคันถัดไป มีรถประจำทางให้บริการทุกๆ 30 นาทีที่ป้ายรถบัสทัวร์กรุงโซล ขอบคุณ (แดง ดอง ดิง)

#######

Woman: (Ding dong daeng) How are you, passengers? This bus is a Seoul tour bus that departs from City Hall and goes to Chungang Park. Você pode descer em qualquer parada para visitar os pontos turísticos sem comprar as passagens novamente no próximo ônibus. Os ônibus estão disponíveis a cada 30 minutos nos pontos de ônibus turísticos de Seul. Obrigado. (Daeng dong ding)

#######

g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: (डिंग डोंग डेंग) आप कैसे हैं, यात्रियों? यह बस एक सियोल टूर बस है जो सिटी हॉल से प्रस्थान करती है और चुंगंग पार्क तक जाती है। अगली बस लेने पर आप दोबारा टिकट खरीदे बिना पर्यटकों के आकर्षण देखने के लिए किसी भी स्टॉप पर उतर सकते हैं। सियोल टूर बस स्टॉप पर हर 30 मिनट में बसें उपलब्ध हैं। धन्यवाद। (डेंग डोंग डिंग)

#######

g_text_audio_translate.tr:

Bir sonraki otobüse bindiğinizde tekrar bilet almadan turistik yerleri gezmek için dilediğiniz durakta inebilirsiniz. Seul tur otobüsü duraklarından her 30 dakikada bir otobüs kalkmaktadır. -------------------
<g>V(으)려고:</g>Планировать, намереваться.

general.g_text_audio: 여자: (딩동댕) 학생회에서 알립니다. 다음 주 금요일에 열리는 ‘동아리 발표회’ 행사가 올해는 체육관에서 열립니다. 작년보다 많은 동아리가 신청을 해서 발표회를 체육관에서 하게 되었습니다. 학생회관으로 가지 마시고, 체육관으로 와 주시기 바랍니다. 재미있는 공연도 볼 수 있으니까 많이 와 주세요. 감사합니다. (댕동딩)

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nữ: (Tinh toong teng) Hội học sinh xin thông báo. Sự kiện "Thuyết trình câu lạc bộ" năm nay sẽ được tổ chức vào thứ 6 tuần sau tại nhà thi đấu. So với năm ngoái có nhiều câu lạc bộ đăng ký tham gia hơn nên sự kiện năm nay sẽ được tổ chức tại nhà thi đấu. Vui lòng không đến hội quán sinh viên mà hãy đi tới nhà thi đấu. Các bạn có thể xem những màn trình rất diễn thú vị nên hy vọng các bạn sẽ tới tham dự thật nhiều. Cảm ơn các bạn. (Tinh toong teng)
g_text_audio_translate.en: Woman: (Ding dong daeng) The student council would like to announce. This year's 'Club Presentation' event will be held next Friday at the gymnasium. More clubs applied than last year, so the event will have to be held at the gymnasium. Please do not go to the student center, but to the gymnasium. You'll be able to see interesting performances, so please come a lot. Thank you. (Daeng dong ding)
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : (Ding dong daeng) Le conseil étudiant aimerait annoncer. L'événement 'Club Presentation' de cette année aura lieu vendredi prochain au gymnase. Plus de clubs ont postulé que l'année dernière, donc l'événement devra se tenir au gymnase. Veuillez ne pas vous rendre au centre étudiant, mais au gymnase. Vous pourrez voir des performances intéressantes, alors s'il vous plaît venez nombreux. Merci. (Daeng dong ding)

#######

Woman: (Ding dong daeng) The student council would like to announce. This year's 'Club Presentation' event will be held next Friday at the gymnasium. More clubs applied than last year, so the event will have to be held at the gymnasium. Please do not go to the student center, but to the gymnasium. You'll be able to see interesting performances, so please come a lot. Thank you. (Daeng dong ding)
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: (Ding dong daeng) El consejo estudiantil quiere anunciar. El evento de 'Presentación del Club' de este año se llevará a cabo el próximo viernes en el gimnasio. Se postularon más clubes que el año pasado, por lo que el evento tendrá que realizarse en el gimnasio. Por favor, no vaya al centro de estudiantes, sino al gimnasio. Podrás ver actuaciones interesantes, así que ven a menudo. Gracias. (Daeng dong ding)

#######

Anda akan dapat melihat pertunjukan yang menarik, jadi silakan datang. Terima kasih. (Daeng dong ding)

หญิง: (ดิ๊งดองแดง) สภานักเรียนขอประกาศค่ะ งาน 'Club Presentation' ปีนี้ จะจัดขึ้นในวันศุกร์หน้า ณ โรงยิม มีสโมสรสมัครมากกว่าปีที่แล้ว ดังนั้นงานจึงต้องจัดขึ้นที่โรงยิม กรุณาอย่าไปศูนย์นักเรียน แต่ไปที่โรงยิม จะได้เห็นการแสดงที่น่าสนใจ ดังนั้นโปรดมากันเยอะๆ นะครับ ขอบคุณ (แดง ดอง ดิง)

#######

Woman: (Ding dong daeng) The student council would like to announce. This year's 'Club Presentation' event will be held next Friday at the gymnasium. More clubs applied than last year, so the event will have to be held at the gymnasium. Please do not go to the student center, but to the gymnasium. You'll be able to see interesting performances, so please come a lot. Thank you. (Daeng dong ding)
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: (Ding dong daeng) O conselho estudantil gostaria de anunciar. O evento de 'Apresentação do Clube' deste ano será realizado na próxima sexta-feira no ginásio. Mais clubes se inscreveram do que no ano passado, então o evento terá que ser realizado no ginásio. Por favor, não vá ao centro estudantil, mas ao ginásio. Você poderá ver apresentações interessantes, então venha bastante. Obrigado. (Daeng dong ding)

#######

Woman: (Ding dong daeng) The student council would like to announce. This year's 'Club Presentation' event will be held next Friday at the gymnasium. More clubs applied than last year, so the event will have to be held at the gymnasium. Please do not go to the student center, but to the gymnasium. You'll be able to see interesting performances, so please come a lot. Thank you. (Daeng dong ding)
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: (डिंग डोंग डेंग) विद्यार्थी परिषद घोषणा करना चाहेगी। इस वर्ष का 'क्लब प्रेजेंटेशन' कार्यक्रम अगले शुक्रवार को जिम्नेजियम में आयोजित किया जाएगा। पिछले वर्ष की तुलना में अधिक क्लबों ने आवेदन किया है, इसलिए कार्यक्रम जिम्नेजियम में आयोजित करना होगा। कृपया छात्र केंद्र में नहीं, बल्कि व्यायामशाला में जाएँ। आप दिलचस्प प्रदर्शन देख पाएंगे, इसलिए कृपया खूब आएं। धन्यवाद। (डेंग डोंग डिंग)

#######

Woman: (Ding dong daeng) The student council would like to announce. This year's 'Club Presentation' event will be held next Friday at the gymnasium. More clubs applied than last year, so the event will have to be held at the gymnasium. Please do not go to the student center, but to the gymnasium. You'll be able to see interesting performances, so please come a lot. Thank you. (Daeng dong ding)
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: (Ding dong daeng) Öğrenci konseyi bunu duyurmak istiyor. Bu yılın 'Kulüp Sunumu' etkinliği önümüzdeki Cuma spor salonunda gerçekleştirilecek. Geçen yıla göre daha fazla kulüp başvurdu, dolayısıyla etkinliğin spor salonunda yapılması gerekecek. Lütfen öğrenci merkezine değil, spor salonuna gidin. İlginç performanslar görebileceksiniz, o yüzden lütfen sık sık gelin. Teşekkür ederim. (Daeng dong ding)

#######

Woman: (Ding dong daeng) The student council would like to announce. This year's 'Club Presentation' event will be held next Friday at the gymnasium. More clubs applied than last year, so the event will have to be held at the gymnasium. Please do not go to the student center, but to the gymnasium. You'll be able to see interesting performances, so please come a lot. Thank you. (Daeng dong ding)

general.g_text_audio: 여자: (딩동댕) 잠시 안내 말씀 드립니다. 다음 달에 열리는 ‘회사 사랑 걷기 대회’의 참가 신청이 이번 주 금요일까지입니다. 그런데 아직 신청을 하신 분이 많지 않습니다. 올해는 특히 많은 선물이 준비되어 있으니 많이 참가해 주시기 바랍니다. 자세한 내용을 홈페이지를 확인해 주세요. (딩동댕)

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nữ: (Tinh toong teng) Xin thông báo. Thời hạn đăng ký tham gia 'Cuộc thi đi bộ yêu thương công ty' diễn ra vào tháng sau là thứ sáu tuần này. Tuy nhiên còn nhiều người vẫn chưa đăng ký. Năm nay có rất nhiều phần quà đặc biệt được chuẩn bị nên hy vọng mọi người sẽ tích cực tham gia cuộc thi này. Để biết thêm thông tin chi tiết vui lòng truy cập vào trang chủ. (Tinh toong teng)
g_text_audio_translate.en: Woman: (Ding dong daeng) Attention, please. The application for the "Company Love Walking Contest," which will be held next month, is due this Friday. However, not many people have applied yet. There are many gifts prepared this year, so please participate. Please check the website for details. (Daeng dong ding)

Femme : (Ding dong daeng) Attention, s'il vous plaît. L'application pour le "Company Love Walking Contest", qui se tiendra le mois prochain, doit être déposée ce vendredi. Cependant, peu de personnes ont encore postulé. De nombreux cadeaux sont préparés cette année, alors n'hésitez pas à participer. Veuillez consulter le site Web pour plus de détails. (Daeng dong ding)

content.q_text: 여자가 왜 이 이야기를 하고 있는지 고르십시오.

explain.vi:
Tại sao người phụ nữ lại nói những điều này?
1. Để nhận được nhiều đơn đăng ký hơn
2. Để thay đổi cách thức đăng ký
3. Để giải thích nội dung cuộc thi
4. Để thông báo ngày diễn ra cuộc thi
--------------------
참가 신청: Đăng ký tham gia
V + 기 바라다: Hy vọng, mong mỏi

Số lượng người đăng ký chưa nhiều nên người phụ nữ đọc thông báo này với hy vọng sẽ có nhiều người đăng ký hơn.
explain.en:
Why do the woman say these things?
1. To get more applications
2. To change the application method
3. To explain the content of the contest
4. To announce the date of the contest
--------------------
<g>참가 신청:</g> Application for participation

<g>V + 기 바라다:</g> To wish, to hope.

The number of applicants is not much, so the woman reads the announcement in the hope that more people will apply.

2. Pour changer la méthode d'application

--------------------

<g>V + 기 바라다:</g>Souhaiter, espérer.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 민수 씨는 무슨 일을 하세요?
남자: 저는 컴퓨터 회사에 다니고 있어요.
여자: 일은 재미있어요?
남자: 네, 재미있어요. 일이 좀 늦게 끝나지만 저는 컴퓨터에 관심이 많아서 지금 하는 일이 좋아요.
여자: 그렇군요. 토요일에도 일해요 ?
남자: 아니요. 토요일에는 쉬어요. 그래서 주말에는 아내와 아이들과 함께 시간을 보내요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Minsoo hiện đang làm công việc gì?
Nam: Tôi làm việc ở một công ty máy tính.
Nữ: Công việc có thú vị không?
Nam: Có, thú vị lắm. Tuy tan làm muộn nhưng tôi có niềm đam mê lớn với máy tính nên tôi rất thích công việc hiện tại của mình.
Nữ: Vậy sao. Thứ bảy anh có phải đi làm không?
Nam: Không. Tôi nghỉ thứ bảy. Vì vậy cuối tuần tôi thường dành thời gian bên vợ và các con.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Minsoo, what are you currently doing?
Man: I work at a computer company.
Woman: Is the job interesting?
Man: Yes, it's very interesting. My work ends a little late, but I'm very interested in computers, so I like what I'm doing now.
Woman: Is that so? Do you work on Saturdays?
Man: No. I rest Saturday. So on weekends, I usually spend time with my wife and children.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Minsoo, qu'est-ce que tu fais actuellement ?
Homme : Je travaille dans une société d'informatique.
Femme : Le travail est-il intéressant ?
Homme : Oui, c'est très intéressant. Mon travail se termine un peu tard, mais je suis très intéressé par les ordinateurs, donc j'aime ce que je fais maintenant.
Femme : C'est ça ? Travaillez-vous les samedis?
Homme : Non. Je me repose samedi. Ainsi, le week-end, je passe généralement du temps avec ma femme et mes enfants.

#######

Man: Yes, it's very interesting. My work ends a little late, but I'm very interested in computers, so I like what I'm doing now.
Woman: Is that so? Do you work on Saturdays?
Man: No. I rest Saturday. So on weekends, I usually spend time with my wife and children.

Mujer: Minsoo, ¿qué estás haciendo actualmente?
Hombre: Trabajo en una empresa de informática.
Mujer: ¿Es interesante el trabajo?
Hombre: Sí, es muy interesante. Mi trabajo termina un poco tarde, pero estoy muy interesado en las computadoras, así que me gusta lo que estoy haciendo ahora.
Mujer: ¿Es así? ¿Trabajas los sábados?
Hombre: No. Descanso el sábado. Entonces, los fines de semana, generalmente paso tiempo con mi esposa e hijos.

Wanita: Minsoo, apa yang kamu lakukan saat ini?
Pria: Saya bekerja di perusahaan komputer.
Wanita: Apakah pekerjaan itu menarik?
Pria: Ya, itu sangat menarik. Pekerjaan saya berakhir sedikit terlambat, tetapi saya sangat tertarik dengan komputer, jadi saya menyukai apa yang saya lakukan sekarang.
Wanita: Begitukah? Apakah Anda bekerja pada hari Sabtu?
Pria: Tidak. Saya istirahat hari Sabtu. Jadi di akhir pekan, saya biasanya menghabiskan waktu bersama istri dan anak-anak saya.

#######

Woman: Minsoo, what are you currently doing?
Man: I work at a computer company.
Woman: Is the job interesting?
Man: Yes, it's very interesting. My work ends a little late, but I'm very interested in computers, so I like what I'm doing now.
Woman: Is that so? Do you work on Saturdays?
Man: No. I rest Saturday. So on weekends, I usually spend time with my wife and children.

男性: 私はコンピューター会社で働いています。

男性: はい、とても興味深いです。仕事が終わるのが少し遅くなりましたが、コンピューターにとても興味があるので、今の仕事が好きです。
女：そうですか。土曜日は仕事をしていますか？
男: いいえ、土曜日は休みます。そのため、週末はたいてい妻と子供たちと一緒に過ごします。

ผู้หญิง : อย่างนั้นเหรอ? คุณทำงานในวันเสาร์ใช่ไหม?

g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: मिनसू, तुम इस समय क्या कर रहे हो?
आदमी: मैं एक कंप्यूटर कंपनी में काम करता हूँ।
महिला: क्या काम दिलचस्प है?
आदमी: हाँ, यह बहुत दिलचस्प है. मेरा काम थोड़ा देर से ख़त्म होता है, लेकिन मुझे कंप्यूटर में बहुत रुचि है, इसलिए मैं अब जो कर रहा हूं वह मुझे पसंद है।
महिला: क्या ऐसा है? क्या आप शनिवार को काम करते हैं?
आदमी: नहीं, मैं शनिवार को आराम करता हूँ। इसलिए सप्ताहांत पर, मैं आमतौर पर अपनी पत्नी और बच्चों के साथ समय बिताता हूं।

general.g_text_audio: 여자: 금요일인 오늘 오전에는 흐리고 바람이 불겠습니다. 그리고 오후부터는 비가 많이 내리겠습니다. 외출하실 분들은 우산을 꼭 준비하 십시오. 하지만 주말인 내일 오전에는 맑겠습니다. 그리고 낮에는 조금 덥겠습니다. 놀러 가실 분들은 이번 주말에 가셔도 좋겠습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nữ: Sáng hôm nay, thứ Sáu, trời sẽ âm u và có gió. Và từ chiều sẽ có mưa to. Ai cần ra ngoài thì nhất định hãy nhớ mang ô theo. Nhưng sáng ngày mai, ngày cuối tuần, trời sẽ quang đãng. Và ban ngày trời sẽ hơi nóng. Những ai có dự định đi chơi có thể đi vào cuối tuần này.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Woman: It will be cloudy and windy this morning, Friday. And it will rain heavily in the afternoon. If you go out, be sure to bring an umbrella. But tomorrow morning, the weekend, it will be sunny. And it will be a little hot during the day. If you are going to play, you can go this weekend.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Ce sera nuageux et venteux ce matin, vendredi. Et il pleuvra abondamment l'après-midi. Si vous sortez, assurez-vous d'apporter un parapluie. Mais demain matin, le week-end, il fera beau. Et il fera un peu chaud pendant la journée. Si vous allez jouer, vous pouvez y aller ce week-end.

#######

Woman: It will be cloudy and windy this morning, Friday. And it will rain heavily in the afternoon. If you go out, be sure to bring an umbrella. But tomorrow morning, the weekend, it will be sunny. And it will be a little hot during the day. If you are going to play, you can go this weekend.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: Esta mañana viernes estará nublado y con viento. Y lloverá mucho por la tarde. Si sales, asegúrate de llevar un paraguas. Pero mañana por la mañana, el fin de semana, estará soleado. Y hará un poco de calor durante el día. Si vas a jugar, puedes ir este fin de semana.

#######

Woman: It will be cloudy and windy this morning, Friday. And it will rain heavily in the afternoon. If you go out, be sure to bring an umbrella. But tomorrow morning, the weekend, it will be sunny. And it will be a little hot during the day. If you are going to play, you can go this weekend.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Akan berawan dan berangin pagi ini, Jumat. Dan akan turun hujan lebat pada sore hari. Jika Anda pergi keluar, pastikan untuk membawa payung. Tapi besok pagi, akhir pekan, cuaca akan cerah. Dan akan sedikit panas di siang hari. Jika Anda akan bermain, Anda bisa pergi akhir pekan ini.

#######

Woman: It will be cloudy and windy this morning, Friday. And it will rain heavily in the afternoon. If you go out, be sure to bring an umbrella. But tomorrow morning, the weekend, it will be sunny. And it will be a little hot during the day. If you are going to play, you can go this weekend.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女性: 金曜日の今朝は曇りで風が強いでしょう。そして午後からは大雨。外出する場合は、必ず傘を持参してください。でも明日の朝、週末は晴れるでしょう。そして、日中は少し暑くなります。遊びに行くなら、今週末にでも行けます。

#######

Woman: It will be cloudy and windy this morning, Friday. And it will rain heavily in the afternoon. If you go out, be sure to bring an umbrella. But tomorrow morning, the weekend, it will be sunny. And it will be a little hot during the day. If you are going to play, you can go this weekend.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Heute Morgen, Freitag, wird es bewölkt und windig sein. Und am Nachmittag wird es stark regnen. Wenn Sie ausgehen, bringen Sie unbedingt einen Regenschirm mit. Aber morgen früh, am Wochenende, wird es sonnig. Und es wird tagsüber etwas heiß sein. Wenn Sie spielen wollen, können Sie dieses Wochenende gehen.

#######

Woman: It will be cloudy and windy this morning, Friday. And it will rain heavily in the afternoon. If you go out, be sure to bring an umbrella. But tomorrow morning, the weekend, it will be sunny. And it will be a little hot during the day. If you are going to play, you can go this weekend.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：星期五早上多云多风。而且下午会下大雨。如果你出去，一定要带伞。但是明天早上，周末，会是晴天。而且白天会有点热。如果你要去玩，你可以在这个周末去。

#######

Woman: It will be cloudy and windy this morning, Friday. And it will rain heavily in the afternoon. If you go out, be sure to bring an umbrella. But tomorrow morning, the weekend, it will be sunny. And it will be a little hot during the day. If you are going to play, you can go this weekend.

女：星期五早上多雲多風。而且下午會下大雨。如果你出去，一定要帶傘。但是明天早上，週末，會是晴天。而且白天會有點熱。如果你要去玩，你可以在這個週末去。

#######

Woman: It will be cloudy and windy this morning, Friday. And it will rain heavily in the afternoon. If you go out, be sure to bring an umbrella. But tomorrow morning, the weekend, it will be sunny. And it will be a little hot during the day. If you are going to play, you can go this weekend.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Sarà nuvoloso e ventoso questa mattina, venerdì. E nel pomeriggio pioverà a dirotto. Se esci, assicurati di portare un ombrello. Ma domani mattina, nel fine settimana, ci sarà il sole. E farà un po' caldo durante il giorno. Se hai intenzione di giocare, puoi andarci questo fine settimana.

#######

Woman: It will be cloudy and windy this morning, Friday. And it will rain heavily in the afternoon. If you go out, be sure to bring an umbrella. But tomorrow morning, the weekend, it will be sunny. And it will be a little hot during the day. If you are going to play, you can go this weekend.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Сегодня утром в пятницу будет пасмурно и ветрено. А во второй половине дня пойдет сильный дождь. Если вы выходите на улицу, обязательно возьмите с собой зонтик. Но завтра утром, в выходные, будет солнечно. И днем ​​будет немного жарко. Если ты собираешься играть, можешь пойти на этих выходных.

#######

g_text_audio_translate.pt:

g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Cuma günü sabah hava bulutlu ve rüzgarlı olacak. Ve öğleden sonra yoğun yağmur yağacak. Dışarı çıkacaksanız mutlaka şemsiye getirin. Ama yarın sabah, yani hafta sonu hava güneşli olacak. Ve gün içerisinde hava biraz sıcak olacak. Eğer oynayacaksan bu hafta sonu gidebilirsin.

general.g_text_audio: 남자: 9월 20일 오전 교통 정보를 말씀드리겠습니다. 토요일인 오늘은 날씨가 좋아서 외출하시는 분들이 많으신 것 같습니다. 아침부터 서울 여기저기에 차가 많습니다. 그리고 시청역 앞은 교통사고 때문에 길이 많이 막힙니다. 그쪽으로 가실 분들은 다른 길로 돌아가시기 바랍니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Tôi xin được thông báo về tình hình giao thông sáng ngày 20 tháng 9. Hôm nay là thứ bảy, thời tiết rất đẹp nên chắc sẽ có người ra ngoài. Từ sáng sớm đã có rất nhiều ô tô ở mọi ngóc ngách của Seoul. Và vì xảy ra tai nạn giao thông nên hiện tại đoạn đường trước ga thị chính đang rất tắc. Những ai đang đi tới hướng đó vui lòng đi con đường khác.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: I'll give you traffic information on the morning of September 20. Today, Saturday, the weather is nice, so there seems to be a lot of people going out. There are many cars all over Seoul since morning. And the road in front of City Hall Station is blocked by traffic accidents. If you are going that way, please go back the other way.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Je vous donnerai des informations sur le trafic le matin du 20 septembre. Aujourd'hui, samedi, il fait beau, donc il semble y avoir beaucoup de monde qui sort. Il y a beaucoup de voitures partout à Séoul depuis le matin. Et la route devant la station City Hall est bloquée par des accidents de la circulation. Si vous allez par là, s'il vous plaît, revenez dans l'autre sens.

#######

Man: I'll give you traffic information on the morning of September 20. Today, Saturday, the weather is nice, so there seems to be a lot of people going out. There are many cars all over Seoul since morning. And the road in front of City Hall Station is blocked by traffic accidents. If you are going that way, please go back the other way.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Te daré información de tráfico en la mañana del 20 de septiembre. Hoy, sábado, hace buen tiempo, por lo que parece que hay mucha gente saliendo. Hay muchos autos por todo Seúl desde la mañana. Y el camino frente a la estación City Hall está bloqueado por accidentes de tráfico. Si vas por ese camino, vuelve por el otro lado.

#######

Man: I'll give you traffic information on the morning of September 20. Today, Saturday, the weather is nice, so there seems to be a lot of people going out. Ada banyak mobil di seluruh Seoul sejak pagi. Dan jalan di depan Stasiun Balai Kota terhalang oleh kecelakaan lalu lintas. Jika Anda pergi ke arah itu, silakan kembali ke arah lain.

#######

#######

Und die Straße vor dem Rathausbahnhof ist durch Verkehrsunfälle blockiert. Wenn Sie diesen Weg gehen, gehen Sie bitte den anderen Weg zurück.

general.g_text_audio: 남자: 안녕하십니까. 저는 이 비행기의 기장 이진수입니다. 이 비행기는 오늘 오전 여덟 시에 김포공항을 출발하여 목적지인 부산에는 아홉 시에 도착할 것입니다. 현재 부산은 15도 정도의 따뜻하고 맑은 날씨지만 바람이 조금 불고 있습니다. 하지만 비행에는 큰 문제가 없겠습니다. 즐거운 여행 되십시오. 감사합니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Chào quý khách. Tôi là cơ trưởng Lee Jinsoo của chuyến bay này. Chuyến bay này sẽ xuất phát từ sân bay Gimpo lúc tám giờ sáng hôm nay và đến sân bay Busan lúc chín giờ. Thời tiết hiện tại ở Busan khá ấm và và quang đãng, nhiệt độ rơi vào khoảng 15 độ nhưng gió đang thổi nhẹ. Nhưng chuyến bay sẽ không gặp vấn đề gì lớn. Chúc quý khách có một chuyến du lịch vui vẻ. Cảm ơn quý khách.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: Hello. I am Lee Jinsoo, the captain of this plane. The flight will depart Gimpo Airport at 8 am today and arrive at its destination Busan at 9 am. Currently, Busan is warm and clear with about 15 degrees, but it is windy. But there won't be a big problem with flying. Enjoy your trip. Thank you.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Bonjour. Je suis Lee Jinsoo, le capitaine de cet avion. Le vol partira de l'aéroport de Gimpo à 8h00 aujourd'hui et arrivera à sa destination Busan à 9h00. Actuellement, Busan est chaud et clair avec environ 15 degrés, mais il y a du vent. Mais il n'y aura pas de gros problème avec le vol. Profitez de votre voyage. Merci.

#######

--------------------

Rüzgar Gimpo'da değil, Busan'da esiyor. Yani 3. cevap duyduklarınızdan farklı.
#######
What is different from what you have heard?
1. The weather is clear in Busan.
2. They departed from Gimpo Airport.
3. The wind is blowing in Gimpo.
4. They will arrive in Busan in an hour.
--------------------
바람이 불다: The wind rises

The wind is blowing in Busan, not in Gimpo. So answer 3 is different from what you have heard.

general.g_text_audio: 여자: (딩동댕동) 안녕하십니까? 오늘도 저희 하나백화점을 이용해 주셔서 감사합니다. 오늘 저희 하나백화점에서는 여름 방학을 맞이하여 수영복을 싸게 팝니다. 여섯 시부터 일곱 시까지 한 시간 동안 4층으로 오시면 예쁜 수영복을 50% 싸게 사실 수 있습니다. 그리고 오늘 저희 백화점에서 오만 원 이상 사신 손님들께는 선물을 드립니다. 손님들의 많은 이용 부탁드립니다. 감사합니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nữ: (Ting toong teng toong) Xin kính chào quý khách. Cảm ơn quý khách đã ghé thăm trung tâm mua sắm Hana của chúng tôi. Hôm nay trung tâm mua sắm Hana của chúng tôi sẽ bán đồ bơi với giá rẻ nhân dịp nghỉ hè. Nếu quý khách đi lên tầng bốn trong vòng một tiếng đồng hồ từ sáu giờ đến bảy giờ, quý khách có thể mua đồ bơi đẹp với giá giảm 50%. Và hôm nay, chúng tôi sẽ tặng quà cho những vị khách mua hàng có tổng hóa đơn trên năm mươi nghìn won tại trung tâm thương mại. Mong quý khách sẽ quan tâm thật nhiều. Xin cảm ơn quý khách.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Woman: (Ding dong daeng dong) Hello. Thank you for using our Hana department store today. Today at Hana department store, we are selling swimsuits cheaply for summer vacation. If you come to the 4th floor for an hour from 6:00 to 7:00, you can get a pretty swimsuit at a 50% discount. And today, we give gifts to customers who purchase more than 50,000 won at our department store. We ask for a lot of use from our guests. Thank you.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : (Ding dong daeng dong) Bonjour. Merci d'utiliser notre grand magasin Hana aujourd'hui. Aujourd'hui, au grand magasin Hana, nous vendons des maillots de bain à bas prix pour les vacances d'été. Si vous venez au 4ème étage pendant une heure de 6h00 à 7h00, vous pouvez obtenir un joli maillot de bain à 50% de réduction. Et aujourd'hui, nous offrons des cadeaux aux clients qui achètent plus de 50 000 wons dans notre grand magasin. Nous demandons beaucoup d'utilisation de nos clients. Merci.

#######

Si vienes al 4to piso por una hora de 6:00 a 7:00, puedes conseguir un lindo traje de baño con un 50% de descuento. Y hoy, damos regalos a los clientes que compran más de 50.000 wones en nuestra tienda por departamentos. Pedimos mucho uso de nuestros huéspedes. Gracias.

explain.vi:
Chọn nội dung <u>khác</u> với đoạn băng được nghe.
1. Bây giờ là mùa hè.
2. Có thể mua đồ bơi tại trung tâm thương mại với giá rẻ.
3. Các khách hàng đã đặt đồ bơi với giá rẻ.
4. Trung tâm thương mại đang gửi lời cảm ơn tới khách hàng.
--------------------

general.g_text_audio: 여자: (딩동댕) 오늘도 저희 한국서점을 찾아 주신 여러분께 감사의 말씀을 드립니다. 잠시 후 열 시부터 소설가 김진 씨와의 만남이 있습니다. 이번에 나온 김진 씨의 새 소설 ‘나의 어머니’에 대한 이야기를 직접 들어보실 수 있습니다. 그리고 이번 달 말까지 소설가 김진 씨의 책을 10% 싸게 드리고 있습니다. 손님 여러분의 많은 관심 부탁 드립니다. 감사합니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nữ: (Ting toong teng) Xin chân thành cảm ơn mọi người đã ghé thăm hiệu sách Hankuk của chúng tôi ngày hôm nay. Một lát sau sẽ diễn ra buổi gặp mặt với tiểu thuyết gia Kim Jin. Lần này, các bạn có thể trực tiếp được nghe về câu chuyện xuất hiện trong cuốn tiểu thuyết mới phát hành có tên 'Mẹ tôi' của tác giả Kim Jin. Và chúng tôi cũng sẽ giảm giá 10% áp dụng đối với sách của tác giả Kim Jin cho tới cuối tháng này. Mong các bạn hãy quan tâm thật nhiều. Chúng tôi xin cảm ơn.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Woman: (Ding dong daeng) Thank you to everyone who visited our Hankuk bookstore today. After a while, there will be a meeting with the novelist Kim Jin from ten o'clock. You can hear the story of Kim Jin's new novel 'My Mother', which was released this time. And until the end of this month, we are offering novelist Kim Jin's books at a 10% discount. We ask for your interest. Thank you.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : (Ding dong daeng) Merci à tous ceux qui ont visité notre librairie Hankuk aujourd'hui. Après un certain temps, il y aura une rencontre avec le romancier Kim Jin à partir de dix heures. Vous pouvez entendre l'histoire du nouveau roman de Kim Jin "Ma mère", qui a été publié cette fois. Et jusqu'à la fin de ce mois, nous proposons les livres de la romancière Kim Jin à 10 % de réduction. Nous sollicitons votre intérêt. Merci.

#######

Woman: (Ding dong daeng) Thank you to everyone who visited our Hankuk bookstore today. After a while, there will be a meeting with the novelist Kim Jin from ten o'clock. You can hear the story of Kim Jin's new novel 'My Mother', which was released this time. And until the end of this month, we are offering novelist Kim Jin's books at a 10% discount. We ask for your interest. Thank you.

Puede escuchar la historia de la nueva novela de Kim Jin 'My Mother', que se lanzó esta vez. Y hasta finales de este mes, ofrecemos los libros del novelista Kim Jin con un 10 % de descuento. Pedimos su interés. Gracias.

q_answer: 한국서점은 오전 열 시에 문을 엽니다.
한국서점에서 오늘 김진 씨를 직접 만날 수 있습니다.
다음 달부터 한국서점에서는 김진 씨의 책을 싸게 팝니다.
이번 달에 김진 씨의 새 소설 ‘나의 어머니’가 나올 겁니다.

general.g_text_audio: 남자: 다음 신청곡은 이유리 씨의 ‘가을이 오면’입니다. 이 노래는 10년 전, 김태지 씨가 처음 부른 이후에 많은 가수들이 불렀는데요. 작년에 이유리 씨가 또 다시 불러서 많은 사랑을 받고 있습니다. 이유리 씨의 노래는 아주 밝고 빨라서 김태지 씨가 부른 노래와는 아주 다른 분위기를 느끼실 수 있을 겁니다. 자, 그러면 직접 들어 보시죠. 이유리 씨의 ‘가을이 오면’입니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Ca khúc được yêu cầu tiếp theo chính là 'Khi mùa thu đến' của Lee Yoori. Bài hát này đã được nhiều ca sĩ thể hiện lại kể từ khi Kim Taeji hát lần đầu tiên cách đây 10 năm. Năm ngoái Lee Yoori đã thể hiện lại ca khúc này và hiện tại đang rất được yêu thích. Bài hát của Lee Yoori rất tươi sáng và có tốc độ nhanh khiến mọi người cảm nhận được bầu không khí rất khác so với bài hát của Kim Taeji. Chà, vậy thì bây giờ các bạn hãy tự mình lắng nghe ca khúc nhé. Sau đây là ca khúc 'Khi mùa thu đến' của Lee Yoori.

Cette chanson a été chantée par de nombreux chanteurs depuis que Kim Tae-ji l'a chantée pour la première fois il y a 10 ans. L'année dernière, Lee Yu-ri l'a chanté à nouveau et il a reçu beaucoup d'amour. La chanson de Lee Yu-ri est très brillante et rapide, vous pouvez donc ressentir une atmosphère très différente de la chanson de Kim Tae-ji. Alors, écoutons-le vous-même. C'est "Quand l'automne arrive" de Lee Yu-ri.

general.g_text_audio: 여자: 1월 30일 일요일 ‘음악 여행’ 특집 콘서트로 시청자 여러분 초대합니다. 한국 최고의 가수들이 출연하는 이번 콘서트에 가고 싶은 분들은 홈페이지의 시청자 게시판에 이름과 연락처를 남겨 주세요. 그 중 100분께 콘서트 표 두 장씩을 드립니다. 신청은 이번 주 일요일까지입니다. ‘음악 여행’ 특집 콘서트에 여러분을 모시겠습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nữ: Kính mời các bạn đến tham dự buổi hòa nhạc đặc biệt 'Du hành âm nhạc' được tổ chức vào chủ nhật ngày 30 tháng 1 tới. Những ai muốn tới tham dự buổi hòa nhạc với sự tham gia trình diễn của các ca sĩ hàng đầu Hàn Quốc này vui lòng để lại tên và địa chỉ liên lạc trên bảng thông báo của trang web chương trình. Chúng tôi sẽ tặng vé hòa nhạc cho 100 người, mỗi người hai vé. Chương trình đăng ký diễn ra đến hết chủ nhật tuần này. Chúng tôi rất mong được chào đón bạn đến với buổi hòa nhạc đặc biệt 'Du hành âm nhạc'.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Woman: We invite viewers to the special concert ‘Music Journey’ on Sunday, January 30th. If you want to go to this concert featuring the best singers in Korea, please leave your name and contact information on the viewer's bulletin board on the homepage. 100 viewers will be given a pair of tickets each. Application is due this Sunday. We are looking forward to welcoming you to the 'Music Journey' special concert.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Nous invitons les téléspectateurs au concert spécial « Music Journey » le dimanche 30 janvier. Si vous souhaitez assister à ce concert mettant en vedette les meilleurs chanteurs de Corée, veuillez laisser votre nom et vos coordonnées sur le tableau d'affichage du spectateur sur la page d'accueil. 100 téléspectateurs recevront chacun une paire de billets. L'application est due ce dimanche. Nous nous réjouissons de vous accueillir au concert spécial « Music Journey ».

#######

Woman: We invite viewers to the special concert ‘Music Journey’ on Sunday, January 30th. If you want to go to this concert featuring the best singers in Korea, please leave your name and contact information on the viewer's bulletin board on the homepage. 100 viewers will be given a pair of tickets each. Application is due this Sunday. We are looking forward to welcoming you to the 'Music Journey' special concert.

Si desea asistir a este concierto con los mejores cantantes de Corea, deje su nombre e información de contacto en el tablón de anuncios del espectador en la página de inicio. 100 espectadores recibirán un par de entradas cada uno. La solicitud vence este domingo. Esperamos darle la bienvenida al concierto especial 'Music Journey'.

#######

महिला: हम दर्शकों को रविवार, 30 जनवरी को विशेष संगीत कार्यक्रम 'म्यूजिक जर्नी' के लिए आमंत्रित करते हैं। यदि आप कोरिया के सर्वश्रेष्ठ गायकों के इस संगीत कार्यक्रम में जाना चाहते हैं, तो कृपया मुखपृष्ठ पर दर्शक के बुलेटिन बोर्ड पर अपना नाम और संपर्क जानकारी छोड़ें। 100 दर्शकों को एक जोड़ी टिकटें दी जाएंगी। आवेदन इस रविवार को होना है। हम 'म्यूजिक जर्नी' विशेष संगीत कार्यक्रम में आपका स्वागत करने के लिए उत्सुक हैं।

#######

Woman: We invite viewers to the special concert ‘Music Journey’ on Sunday, January 30th. If you want to go to this concert featuring the best singers in Korea, please leave your name and contact information on the viewer's bulletin board on the homepage. 100 viewers will be given a pair of tickets each. Application is due this Sunday. We are looking forward to welcoming you to the 'Music Journey' special concert.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: 30 Ocak Pazar günü izleyicileri 'Müzik Yolculuğu' özel konserine davet ediyoruz. Kore'nin en iyi şarkıcılarının yer aldığı bu konsere gitmek istiyorsanız lütfen ana sayfadaki izleyici panosuna adınızı ve iletişim bilgilerinizi bırakın. 100 izleyiciye bir çift bilet verilecek. Başvuru bu pazar günü yapılacak. 'Müzik Yolculuğu' özel konserimize sizleri de bekliyoruz.

#######

Woman: We invite viewers to the special concert ‘Music Journey’ on Sunday, January 30th. If you want to go to this concert featuring the best singers in Korea, please leave your name and contact information on the viewer's bulletin board on the homepage. 100 viewers will be given a pair of tickets each. Application is due this Sunday. We are looking forward to welcoming you to the 'Music Journey' special concert.

general.g_text_audio: 남자: 주민 여러분, 안녕하십니까. 우리 아파트 주민 센터에 도서관이 새로 문을 열었습니다. 도서관에서는 소설, 잡지, 등 다양한 종류의 책을 주민 여러분께 무료로 빌려 드립니다. 또한 온 가족이 함께 즐길 수 있는 영화 DVD 빌려 드립니다. 도서관 이용 시간은 평일 아침 9시부터 저녁 7시까지이며 주말에는 문을 열지 않습니다. 많은 이용 부탁드립니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Xin chào các cư dân sinh sống tại khu chung cư. Thư viện ở trung tâm dân cư của khu chung cư mới được mở cửa. Chúng tôi sẽ cho các cư dân sinh sống tại khu chung cư mượn nhiều loại sách miễn phí như tiểu thuyết, tạp chí,... Chúng tôi cũng cho mượn các đĩa phim DVD để cả gia đình có thể thưởng thức cùng nhau. Thư viện mở cửa từ 9 giờ sáng đến 7 giờ tối các ngày trong tuần và đóng cửa vào cuối tuần. Mong các bạn hãy ghé thăm thật nhiều.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: Hello, residents. A new library has just opened in our apartment community center. The library lends a variety of books, such as novels, magazines, and other books, to residents free of charge. We also rent DVDs of movies that the whole family can enjoy together. The library is open from 9 am to 7 pm on weekdays and closed on weekends. Please use it a lot.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Bonjour, résidents. Une nouvelle bibliothèque vient d'ouvrir dans notre centre communautaire d'appartements. La bibliothèque prête gratuitement une variété de livres, tels que des romans, des magazines et d'autres livres, aux résidents. Nous louons également des DVD de films que toute la famille peut apprécier ensemble. La bibliothèque est ouverte de 9h à 19h en semaine et fermée le week-end. Veuillez l'utiliser beaucoup.

#######

Man: Hello, residents. A new library has just opened in our apartment community center. The library lends a variety of books, such as novels, magazines, and other books, to residents free of charge. We also rent DVDs of movies that the whole family can enjoy together. The library is open from 9 am to 7 pm on weekdays and closed on weekends. Please use it a lot.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Hola, residentes. Una nueva biblioteca acaba de abrir en nuestro centro comunitario de apartamentos. La biblioteca presta una variedad de libros, como novelas, revistas y otros libros, a los residentes de forma gratuita. También alquilamos DVD de películas que toda la familia puede disfrutar junta. La biblioteca está abierta de 9 am a 7 pm de lunes a viernes y cerrada los fines de semana. Por favor, úsalo mucho.

#######

g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: สวัสดีชาวเมือง ห้องสมุดใหม่เพิ่งเปิดในศูนย์ชุมชนอพาร์ตเมนต์ของเรา ห้องสมุดให้ยืมหนังสือหลากหลายประเภท เช่น นวนิยาย นิตยสาร และหนังสืออื่นๆ แก่ผู้อยู่อาศัยโดยไม่คิดค่าใช้จ่าย นอกจากนี้เรายังเช่าดีวีดีภาพยนตร์ที่ทั้งครอบครัวสามารถเพลิดเพลินร่วมกันได้ ห้องสมุดเปิดให้บริการตั้งแต่ 9.00 น. ถึง 19.00 น. ในวันธรรมดา และปิดให้บริการในวันหยุดสุดสัปดาห์ กรุณาใช้มันมาก.

g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: नमस्ते, निवासियों. हमारे अपार्टमेंट सामुदायिक केंद्र में अभी एक नई लाइब्रेरी खुली है। पुस्तकालय निवासियों को विभिन्न प्रकार की पुस्तकें, जैसे उपन्यास, पत्रिकाएँ और अन्य पुस्तकें निःशुल्क प्रदान करता है। हम फिल्मों की डीवीडी भी किराए पर लेते हैं जिनका आनंद पूरा परिवार एक साथ ले सकता है। पुस्तकालय सप्ताह के दिनों में सुबह 9 बजे से शाम 7 बजे तक खुला रहता है और सप्ताहांत पर बंद रहता है। कृपया इसका भरपूर उपयोग करें।

Ayrıca tüm ailenin birlikte keyif alabileceği filmlerin DVD'lerini de kiralıyoruz. Kütüphane hafta içi sabah 9'dan akşam 7'ye kadar açık, hafta sonu ise kapalıdır. Lütfen çokça kullanın.

general.g_text_audio: 여자: 지금까지 명동에 대한 설명 잘 들으셨죠? 이제 버스에서 내려서 구경하러 가실 건데요. 두 시간 후인 6시까지는 버스로 꼭 돌아오셔야 됩니다. 저녁 식사 예약 시간 때문에 늦으시면 안 됩니다. 시간을 꼭 지켜 주시기 바랍니다. 그럼 재미있게 구경하시고 두 시간 후에 뵙겠습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nữ: Các bạn đã nghe kỹ các mô tả về Myeongdong rồi chứ? Bây giờ các bạn sẽ xuống xe bus rồi đi tham quan. Hai tiếng sau các bạn nhất định phải quay trở lại xe bus, tức là trước 6 giờ tối. Vì chúng tôi đã đặt bữa tối rồi nên các bạn không thể về muộn hơn được. Mong các bạn sẽ quay lại đúng giờ. Các bạn hãy đi tham quan thật vui vẻ nhé, hẹn gặp lại các bạn sau hai tiếng nữa.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Woman: Have you been listening well about Myeong-dong so far? Now you're going to get off the bus and go take a look. You must be back by bus two hours later, at 6pm. You must not be late for dinner reservations. Please be on time. So, have fun and see you in two hours.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Avez-vous bien écouté Myeong-dong jusqu'à présent ? Maintenant tu vas descendre du bus et aller jeter un œil. Vous devez être de retour en bus deux heures plus tard, à 18h. Vous ne devez pas être en retard pour les réservations de dîner. Sois à l'heure s'il te plaît. Alors, amusez-vous et rendez-vous dans deux heures.

#######

Woman: Have you been listening well about Myeong-dong so far? Now you're going to get off the bus and go take a look. You must be back by bus two hours later, at 6pm. You must not be late for dinner reservations. Please be on time. So, have fun and see you in two hours.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: ¿Has estado escuchando bien sobre Myeong-dong hasta ahora? Ahora te vas a bajar del autobús y vas a echar un vistazo. Debes estar de regreso en autobús dos horas más tarde, a las 6:00 p. m. No debe llegar tarde a las reservas para la cena. Por favor, se puntual. Entonces, diviértanse y nos vemos en dos horas.

#######

Woman: Have you been listening well about Myeong-dong so far? Now you're going to get off the bus and go take a look. You must be back by bus two hours later, at 6pm. You must not be late for dinner reservations. Please be on time. So, have fun and see you in two hours.
g_text_audio_translate.id:

Anda harus kembali dengan bus dua jam kemudian, jam 6 sore. Anda tidak boleh terlambat untuk reservasi makan malam. Harap tepat waktu. Jadi, bersenang-senanglah dan sampai jumpa dua jam lagi.

#######

Woman: Have you been listening well about Myeong-dong so far? Now you're going to get off the bus and go take a look. You must be back by bus two hours later, at 6pm. You must not be late for dinner reservations. Please be on time. So, have fun and see you in two hours.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女：今まで明洞のことよく聞いてた？さあ、バスを降りて見に行きましょう。バスで 2 時間後の午後 6 時に戻らなければなりません。夕食の予約に遅れてはいけません。時間通りにお越しください。それでは、楽しんで、2時間後にお会いしましょう。

#######

Woman: Have you been listening well about Myeong-dong so far? Now you're going to get off the bus and go take a look. You must be back by bus two hours later, at 6pm. You must not be late for dinner reservations. Please be on time. So, have fun and see you in two hours.
g_text_audio_translate.de:

Sie dürfen bei Reservierungen für das Abendessen nicht zu spät kommen. Sei bitte pünktlich. Also, viel Spaß und wir sehen uns in zwei Stunden.

#######

Woman: Have you been listening well about Myeong-dong so far? Now you're going to get off the bus and go take a look. You must be back by bus two hours later, at 6pm. You must not be late for dinner reservations. Please be on time. So, have fun and see you in two hours.

#######

Woman: Have you been listening well about Myeong-dong so far? Now you're going to get off the bus and go take a look. You must be back by bus two hours later, at 6pm. You must not be late for dinner reservations. Please be on time. So, have fun and see you in two hours.

#######

Woman: Have you been listening well about Myeong-dong so far? Now you're going to get off the bus and go take a look. You must be back by bus two hours later, at 6pm. You must not be late for dinner reservations. Please be on time. So, have fun and see you in two hours.

#######

Woman: Have you been listening well about Myeong-dong so far? Now you're going to get off the bus and go take a look. You must be back by bus two hours later, at 6pm. You must not be late for dinner reservations. Please be on time. So, have fun and see you in two hours.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Вы уже хорошо слушали о Мёндоне? А теперь выйдите из автобуса и посмотрите. Вы должны вернуться на автобусе через два часа, в 18:00. Вы не должны опаздывать, чтобы заказать ужин. Пожалуйста, будьте вовремя. Итак, приятного времяпрепровождения и увидимся через два часа.

#######

Woman: Have you been listening well about Myeong-dong so far? Now you're going to get off the bus and go take a look. You must be back by bus two hours later, at 6pm. You must not be late for dinner reservations. Please be on time. So, have fun and see you in two hours.

ผู้หญิง: จนถึงตอนนี้คุณฟังเกี่ยวกับเมียงดงได้ดีบ้างไหม? ตอนนี้คุณกำลังจะลงจากรถบัสแล้วไปดู คุณต้องกลับมาโดยรถบัสในอีกสองชั่วโมงต่อมา เวลา 18.00 น. คุณต้องไม่มาสายสำหรับการจองอาหารค่ำ กรุณามาตรงเวลา ขอให้สนุกนะ แล้วเจอกันอีกสองชั่วโมงนะ

#######

Woman: Have you been listening well about Myeong-dong so far? Now you're going to get off the bus and go take a look. You must be back by bus two hours later, at 6pm. You must not be late for dinner reservations. Please be on time. So, have fun and see you in two hours.

#######

Woman: Have you been listening well about Myeong-dong so far? Now you're going to get off the bus and go take a look. You must be back by bus two hours later, at 6pm. You must not be late for dinner reservations. Please be on time. So, have fun and see you in two hours.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: क्या आप अब तक मायओंग-डोंग के बारे में अच्छा सुन रहे हैं? अब आप बस से उतरेंगे और जाकर देखेंगे। आपको दो घंटे बाद, शाम 6 बजे बस से वापस आना होगा। आपको रात के खाने के आरक्षण के लिए देर नहीं करनी चाहिए। कृपया समय पर रहें। तो, मजे करें और दो घंटे में मिलते हैं।

#######

Woman: Have you been listening well about Myeong-dong so far? Now you're going to get off the bus and go take a look. You must be back by bus two hours later, at 6pm. You must not be late for dinner reservations. Please be on time. So, have fun and see you in two hours.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Şu ana kadar Myeong-dong'u iyi dinledin mi? Şimdi otobüsten inip bir bakacaksın. İki saat sonra, akşam 6'da otobüsle geri dönmelisiniz. Akşam yemeği rezervasyonlarına geç kalmamalısınız. Lütfen zamanında gelin. O halde size iyi eğlenceler ve iki saat sonra görüşürüz.

#######

explain.vi:
Chọn nội dung phù hợp với đoạn băng được nghe.
1. Tham quan Myeongdong từ hai giờ.
2. Bây giờ mọi người đang đi ăn tối.
3. Phải quay lại xe bus trước 6 giờ.
4. Sẽ đi Myeongdong sau khi ăn tối.
--------------------
돌아오다: Quay về, trở lại

V + 아/어야 하다: Phải, nên làm gì.
V + (으)면 안 되다: Không thể, không được làm gì.
explain.en:
Choose the answer that fits what you heard.
1. They start exploring Myeong-dong from two o'clock.
2. People go to dinner now.
3. People must be back on the bus by six o'clock.
4. After dinner, they will go to Myeong-dong.
--------------------
<g>돌아오다:</g> To return, to come back

<g>V + 아/어야 하다:</g> Should, must do something.
<g>V + (으)면 안 되다:</g> May not, not allowed
explain.fr:
Choisissez la réponse qui correspond à ce que vous avez entendu.
1. Ils commencent à explorer Myeong-dong à partir de deux heures.
2. Les gens vont dîner maintenant.
3. Les gens doivent être de retour dans le bus à six heures.
4. Après le dîner, ils iront à Myeong-dong.
--------------------
<g>돌아오다:</g>Revenir, revenir

<g>V + 아/어야 하다:</g>Devrait, doit faire quelque chose.
<g>V + (으)면 안 되다:</g>Peut pas, pas autorisé

#######

Choose the answer that fits what you heard.
1. They start exploring Myeong-dong from two o'clock.
2. People go to dinner now.
3. People must be back on the bus by six o'clock.
4. After dinner, they will go to Myeong-dong.
--------------------
<g>돌아오다:</g> To return, to come back

<g>V + 아/어야 하다:</g> Should, must do something.
<g>V + (으)면 안 되다:</g> May not, not allowed

4. Después de la cena, irán a Myeong-dong.

<g>V + 아/어야 하다:</g>Debería, debe hacer algo.
<g>V + (으)면 안 되다:</g>No puede, no está permitido
