general.g_text_audio:
여자: 이 약은 어떻게 먹어야 해요?
남자: 꼭 식사를 한 후에 드셔야 합니다. 아침, 점심, 저녁 하루에 세 번 드시고요. 봉투에 들어 있는 가루약과 물약을 함께 드시면 됩니다. 그리고 약을 드시는 동안에는 차가운 음식과 과일은 드시지 않는 것이 좋습니다. 지금 드리는 약은 삼 일 동안 드실 약입니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Thuốc này uống thế nào vậy ạ?
Nam: Nhất định phải uống sau khi ăn. Chị uống ba lần vào sáng, trưa, tối. Chị có thể uống thuốc bột và thuốc nước trong túi cùng nhau. Trong thời gian uống thuốc không nên ăn đồ ăn lạnh và hoa quả. Số thuốc này chị sẽ dùng trong vòng ba ngày.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: How should I take this medicine?
Man: You must eat it after eating. Take it three times a day for breakfast, lunch and dinner. You can take the powdered medicine and the liquid medicine in the bag together. Also, it is not recommended to eat cold foods and fruits while taking the medicine. The medicine I am giving you now is the medicine you will take for three days.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Comment dois-je prendre ce médicament ?
Homme : Vous devez le manger après avoir mangé. Prenez-le trois fois par jour pour le petit déjeuner, le déjeuner et le dîner. Vous pouvez prendre le médicament en poudre et le médicament liquide dans le sac ensemble. De plus, il n'est pas recommandé de manger des aliments froids et des fruits pendant la prise du médicament. Le médicament que je vous donne maintenant est le médicament que vous prendrez pendant trois jours.

#######

Woman: How should I take this medicine?
Man: You must eat it after eating. Take it three times a day for breakfast, lunch and dinner. You can take the powdered medicine and the liquid medicine in the bag together. Also, it is not recommended to eat cold foods and fruits while taking the medicine. The medicine I am giving you now is the medicine you will take for three days.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: ¿Cómo debo tomar este medicamento?
Hombre: Debes comerlo después de comer. Tómelo tres veces al día para el desayuno, el almuerzo y la cena. Puede tomar el medicamento en polvo y el medicamento líquido en la bolsa juntos. Además, no se recomienda comer alimentos fríos y frutas mientras toma el medicamento. La medicina que te estoy dando ahora es la medicina que tomarás durante tres días.

#######

Woman: How should I take this medicine?

g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Bagaimana saya harus minum obat ini?
Pria: Anda harus memakannya setelah makan. Minumlah tiga kali sehari untuk sarapan, makan siang, dan makan malam. Anda dapat mengambil obat bubuk dan obat cair di dalam tas bersama-sama. Juga, tidak dianjurkan untuk makan makanan dingin dan buah-buahan saat minum obat. Obat yang saya berikan kepada Anda sekarang adalah obat yang akan Anda minum selama tiga hari.

#######

Woman: How should I take this medicine?
Man: You must eat it after eating. Take it three times a day for breakfast, lunch and dinner. You can take the powdered medicine and the liquid medicine in the bag together. Also, it is not recommended to eat cold foods and fruits while taking the medicine. The medicine I am giving you now is the medicine you will take for three days.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女性：この薬はどのように服用すればよいですか？
男：食べてから食べなきゃ。朝食、昼食、夕食の1日3回お召し上がりください。袋の中の粉薬と水薬を一緒に服用できます。また、服用中に冷たい食べ物や果物を食べることはお勧めできません。私が今あなたに与えている薬は、あなたが 3 日間服用する薬です。

#######

Woman: How should I take this medicine?
Man: You must eat it after eating. Take it three times a day for breakfast, lunch and dinner. You can take the powdered medicine and the liquid medicine in the bag together. Also, it is not recommended to eat cold foods and fruits while taking the medicine. The medicine I am giving you now is the medicine you will take for three days.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Wie soll ich dieses Medikament einnehmen?
Mann: Sie müssen es nach dem Essen essen. Nehmen Sie es dreimal täglich zum Frühstück, Mittag- und Abendessen ein. Sie können das pulverförmige Arzneimittel und das flüssige Arzneimittel im Beutel zusammen einnehmen. Es wird auch nicht empfohlen, während der Einnahme des Arzneimittels kalte Speisen und Obst zu essen. Das Medikament, das ich Ihnen jetzt gebe, ist das Medikament, das Sie drei Tage lang einnehmen werden.

#######

Woman: How should I take this medicine?
Man: You must eat it after eating. Take it three times a day for breakfast, lunch and dinner. You can take the powdered medicine and the liquid medicine in the bag together. Also, it is not recommended to eat cold foods and fruits while taking the medicine. The medicine I am giving you now is the medicine you will take for three days.

Uomo: Devi mangiarlo dopo aver mangiato. Prendilo tre volte al giorno per colazione, pranzo e cena. Puoi prendere insieme la medicina in polvere e la medicina liquida nella busta. Inoltre, non è consigliabile mangiare cibi freddi e frutta durante l'assunzione del medicinale. La medicina che ti sto dando ora è la medicina che prenderai per tre giorni.

g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Как мне принимать это лекарство?
Мужчина: Вы должны съесть это после еды. Принимайте его три раза в день на завтрак, обед и ужин. Вы можете принимать порошкообразное лекарство и жидкое лекарство в пакете вместе. Также во время приема лекарства не рекомендуется употреблять холодную пищу и фрукты. Лекарство, которое я даю вам сейчас, — это лекарство, которое вы будете принимать в течение трех дней.

#######

g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: ฉันควรกินยานี้อย่างไร?
ผู้ชาย: คุณต้องกินมันหลังกิน รับประทานวันละสามครั้งสำหรับมื้อเช้า กลางวัน และเย็น คุณสามารถนำยาผงและยาน้ำใส่ถุงรวมกันได้ นอกจากนี้ไม่แนะนำให้รับประทานอาหารเย็นและผลไม้ขณะรับประทานยา ยาที่ฉันให้คุณตอนนี้คือยาที่คุณจะกินเป็นเวลาสามวัน

#######

Woman: How should I take this medicine?
Man: You must eat it after eating. Take it three times a day for breakfast, lunch and dinner. You can take the powdered medicine and the liquid medicine in the bag together. Also, it is not recommended to eat cold foods and fruits while taking the medicine. The medicine I am giving you now is the medicine you will take for three days.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Como devo tomar este medicamento?
Homem: Você deve comê-lo depois de comer. Tome três vezes ao dia no café da manhã, almoço e jantar. Você pode tomar o remédio em pó e o remédio líquido na bolsa juntos. Além disso, não é recomendado comer alimentos frios e frutas enquanto estiver tomando o medicamento. O remédio que estou lhe dando agora é o remédio que você tomará durante três dias.

#######

Woman: How should I take this medicine?
Man: You must eat it after eating. Take it three times a day for breakfast, lunch and dinner. You can take the powdered medicine and the liquid medicine in the bag together. Also, it is not recommended to eat cold foods and fruits while taking the medicine. The medicine I am giving you now is the medicine you will take for three days.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: मुझे यह दवा कैसे लेनी चाहिए?
आदमी: खाना खाने के बाद इसे जरूर खाना. इसे दिन में तीन बार नाश्ते, दोपहर के भोजन और रात के खाने में लें। आप पाउडर वाली दवा और तरल दवा को एक साथ बैग में ले सकते हैं। इसके अलावा, दवा लेते समय ठंडे खाद्य पदार्थ और फल खाने की सलाह नहीं दी जाती है। अभी मैं तुम्हें जो दवा दे रहा हूं वह वह दवा है जो तुम तीन दिन तक लोगे।

#######

Woman: How should I take this medicine?
Man: You must eat it after eating. Take it three times a day for breakfast, lunch and dinner. You can take the powdered medicine and the liquid medicine in the bag together. Also, it is not recommended to eat cold foods and fruits while taking the medicine. The medicine I am giving you now is the medicine you will take for three days.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Bu ilacı nasıl almalıyım?
Adam: Yemekten sonra yemelisin. Kahvaltı, öğle yemeği ve akşam yemeği için günde üç kez alın. Çantanın içindeki toz ilacı ve sıvı ilacı birlikte alabilirsiniz. Ayrıca ilacı kullanırken soğuk yiyecek ve meyve tüketilmesi önerilmez. Şimdi sana vereceğim ilaç, üç gün boyunca alacağın ilaçtır.

#######

<g>A + (으)ㄴ + N:</g>İsim değiştirici (sıfatlar için).
<g>V + 지 않는 것이 좋다:<g> Bir şey yapmamak iyidir.

#######

Choose the answer that fits what you heard.
1. The woman and the man meet often.
2. The woman and the man will meet again tomorrow.
3. The woman will not eat cold food.
4. The woman will eat fruits after dinner.
--------------------
<g>차갑다:<g> To be cold

<g>A + (으)ㄴ + N:</g> Noun modifier (for adjectives).
<g>V + 지 않는 것이 좋다:<g> It is good to not do something.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 강수미입니다. 죄송하지만 지금은 전화를 받을 수 없습니다. 메시지를 남겨 주세요.
(삐-)
남자: 강 선생님, 저 김영진입니다. 오늘 공연에 초대해 주셔서 감사했습니다. 선생님 덕분에 좋은 시간을 보낼 수 있었어요. 공연이 끝난 후에 선생님을 만나러 갔는데 사람이 너무 많아서 그냥 왔어요. 그래서 이렇게 전화를 드리는 겁니다. 다음에 한 번 찾아뵙겠습니다. 안녕히 계세요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Tôi là Kang Sumi. Tôi xin lỗi nhưng bây giờ tôi không thể nghe điện 
(Bíp-)
Nam: Cô Kang ạ. Tôi là Kim Youngjin đây. Cảm ơn cô vì đã mời tôi tới xem buổi biểu diễn ngày hôm nay. Nhờ cô mà tôi đã có thể tận hưởng một khoảng thời gian vui vẻ. Sau khi buổi biểu diễn kết thúc tôi định đến gặp cô nhưng đông người quá nên tôi đành cứ thế ra về. Vì vậy tôi mới gọi điện thoại thế này. Tôi sẽ lại tới sau. Tạm biệt cô.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: This is Kang Sumi. I'm sorry, but I can't answer the phone right now. Please leave a message.
(Beep-)
Man: Ms. Kang, I am Kim Youngjin. Thank you for inviting me to today's performance. I was able to have a good time thanks to you. After the performance, I went to see you, but there were too many people, so I just leave. So I'm calling you like this. See you next time. Goodbye.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : C'est Kang Sumi. Je suis désolé, mais je ne peux pas répondre au téléphone pour le moment. Merci de laisser un message.
(Bip-)
Homme : Mme Kang, je suis Kim Youngjin. Merci de m'avoir invité à la représentation d'aujourd'hui. J'ai pu passer un bon moment grâce à vous. Après le spectacle, je suis allé vous voir, mais il y avait trop de monde, alors je suis parti. Alors je t'appelle comme ça. À la prochaine. Au revoir.

#######

Woman: This is Kang Sumi. I'm sorry, but I can't answer the phone right now. Please leave a message.
(Beep-)
Man: Ms. Kang, I am Kim Youngjin. Thank you for inviting me to today's performance. I was able to have a good time thanks to you. After the performance, I went to see you, but there were too many people, so I just leave. So I'm calling you like this. See you next time. Goodbye.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: Este es Kang Sumi. Lo siento, pero no puedo contestar el teléfono ahora. Por favor, deje un mensaje.
(Bip-)
Hombre: Sra. Kang, soy Kim Youngjin. Gracias por invitarme a la función de hoy. Pude pasar un buen rato gracias a ti. Después de la presentación, fui a verte, pero había demasiada gente, así que simplemente me fui. Así que te estoy llamando así. Nos vemos la próxima vez. Adiós.

#######

Woman: This is Kang Sumi. I'm sorry, but I can't answer the phone right now. Please leave a message.
(Beep-)
Man: Ms. Kang, I am Kim Youngjin. Thank you for inviting me to today's performance. I was able to have a good time thanks to you. After the performance, I went to see you, but there were too many people, so I just leave. So I'm calling you like this. See you next time. Goodbye.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Ini Kang Sumi. Maaf, tapi saya tidak bisa menjawab telepon sekarang. Silakan tinggalkan pesan.
(Berbunyi-)
Pria: Nona Kang, saya Kim Youngjin. Terima kasih telah mengundang saya ke pertunjukan hari ini. Saya bisa bersenang-senang berkat Anda. Setelah pertunjukan, saya pergi menemui Anda, tetapi ada terlalu banyak orang, jadi saya pergi saja. Jadi aku memanggilmu seperti ini. Sampai jumpa lain waktu. Selamat tinggal.

#######

Nach der Aufführung bin ich zu Ihnen gegangen, aber es waren zu viele Leute da, also gehe ich einfach. Also rufe ich dich so an. Bis zum nächsten Mal. Auf Wiedersehen.

महिला: यह कांग सुमी है। मुझे खेद है, लेकिन मैं अभी फ़ोन का उत्तर नहीं दे सकता। कृपया एक संदेश छोड़ें।
(बीप-)
आदमी: सुश्री कांग, मैं किम यंगजिन हूं। आज के प्रदर्शन में मुझे आमंत्रित करने के लिए धन्यवाद। आपके धन्यवाद से मैं अच्छा समय बिता सका। प्रदर्शन के बाद, मैं आपसे मिलने गया, लेकिन वहाँ बहुत सारे लोग थे, इसलिए मैं चला गया। तो मैं तुम्हें इस तरह बुला रहा हूं. आपसे अगली बार मिलेंगे। अलविदा।

(Bip-)
Adam: Bayan Kang, ben Kim Youngjin. Beni bugünkü gösteriye davet ettiğiniz için teşekkür ederim. Sayenizde güzel vakit geçirebildim. Gösteriden sonra seni görmeye gittim ama çok fazla insan vardı, o yüzden gidiyorum. O yüzden sana bu şekilde sesleniyorum. Bir dahaki sefere görüşürüz. Güle güle.

<g>V + (으)ㄴ 후에:</g>बाद

general.g_text_audio: 여자: (딩동댕) 손님 여러분, 지하 1층 과일 코너에서 알려 드립니다. 지금부터 포도를 아주 특별한 가격에 드리겠습니다. 한 상자에 만 원하는 달고 맛있는 포도를 딱 30분 동안만 5천 원, 5천 원에 드립니다. 단, 포도는 한 사람 앞에 한 상자만 사실 수 있습니다. 많은 이용 바랍니다. 감사합니다. (댕동딩)

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nữ: (Ting toong teng) Kính thưa quý khách. Chúng tôi xin thông báo từ góc bán trái cây tầng hầm số 1. Từ bây giờ chúng tôi sẽ đặc biệt giảm giá cho mặt hàng nho. Trong 30 phút, chúng tôi sẽ bán những quả nho ngọt mà ngon quý khách mong muốn với mức giá 5000 won một hộp, chỉ 5000 won thay vì 10000 won như trước đó. Tuy nhiên, mỗi người chỉ có thể mua một hộp nho. Mong quý khách hãy ghé thăm thật nhiều. Xin cảm ơn. (Teng toong ting)
g_text_audio_translate.en: Woman: (Ding dong daeng) Dear guests, this is an announcement from the fruit corner on the first basement floor. From now on, we will give you grapes at a very special price. Sweet and delicious grapes priced at 10,000 won in a box are offered at 5,000 won, 5,000 won for just 30 minutes. However, only one box of grapes can be bought in front of each person. Please use it a lot. Thank you (Daeng dong ding)
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : (Ding dong daeng) Chers invités, ceci est une annonce du coin des fruits au premier sous-sol. À partir de maintenant, nous vous offrirons des raisins à un prix très spécial. Des raisins doux et délicieux au prix de 10 000 wons dans une boîte sont proposés à 5 000 wons, 5 000 wons pour seulement 30 minutes. Cependant, une seule caisse de raisins peut être achetée devant chaque personne. Veuillez l'utiliser beaucoup. Merci (Daeng dong ding)

#######

Woman: (Ding dong daeng) Dear guests, this is an announcement from the fruit corner on the first basement floor. From now on, we will give you grapes at a very special price. Sweet and delicious grapes priced at 10,000 won in a box are offered at 5,000 won, 5,000 won for just 30 minutes. However, only one box of grapes can be bought in front of each person. Please use it a lot. Thank you (Daeng dong ding)

Las uvas dulces y deliciosas a un precio de 10.000 wones en una caja se ofrecen a 5.000 wones, 5.000 wones por solo 30 minutos. Sin embargo, solo se puede comprar una caja de uvas frente a cada persona. Por favor, úsalo mucho. Gracias (Daeng dong ding)

g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: (डिंग डोंग डेंग) प्रिय अतिथियों, यह पहली बेसमेंट मंजिल पर फ्रूट कॉर्नर से एक घोषणा है। अब से हम आपको बेहद खास कीमत पर अंगूर देंगे. एक डिब्बे में 10,000 वॉन की कीमत वाले मीठे और स्वादिष्ट अंगूर 5,000 वॉन में पेश किए जाते हैं, केवल 30 मिनट के लिए 5,000 वॉन। हालाँकि, प्रत्येक व्यक्ति के सामने अंगूर का केवल एक डिब्बा ही खरीदा जा सकता है। कृपया इसका भरपूर उपयोग करें। धन्यवाद (डेंग डोंग डिंग)

#######

Woman: (Ding dong daeng) Dear guests, this is an announcement from the fruit corner on the first basement floor. From now on, we will give you grapes at a very special price. Sweet and delicious grapes priced at 10,000 won in a box are offered at 5,000 won, 5,000 won for just 30 minutes. However, only one box of grapes can be bought in front of each person. Please use it a lot. Thank you (Daeng dong ding)
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: (Ding dong daeng) Sayın konuklar, bu birinci bodrum kattaki meyve köşesinden bir duyurudur. Artık üzümleri size çok özel fiyatlarla vereceğiz. Bir kutuda 10.000 won fiyatla satılan tatlı ve lezzetli üzümler, sadece 30 dakikalığına 5.000 won, 5.000 won fiyatla sunuluyor. Ancak herkesin gözü önünde sadece bir kutu üzüm alınabiliyor. Lütfen çokça kullanın. Teşekkür ederim (Daeng dong ding)

#######

Woman: (Ding dong daeng) Dear guests, this is an announcement from the fruit corner on the first basement floor. From now on, we will give you grapes at a very special price. Sweet and delicious grapes priced at 10,000 won in a box are offered at 5,000 won, 5,000 won for just 30 minutes. However, only one box of grapes can be bought in front of each person. Please use it a lot. Thank you (Daeng dong ding)

general.g_text_audio: 여자: 오늘은 바이올렛이라는 꽃에 대해서 이야기를 해 보려고 합니다. 바이 올렛은 꽃이 예뻐서 좋아하시는 분들이 많은데요. 이 꽃은 시원한 걸 좋아합니다. 그래서 더운 여름에는 꽃을 볼 수 없습니다. 여름에 햇빛이 있는 곳에 놓으면 죽을 수 있으니까 조심하세요. 그리고 바이 올렛은 물을 좋아하지 않아요. 물은 한 달에 두 번 정도만 주시면 돼요. 오늘 집 근처 꽃집에 한번 가 보세요. 예쁜 바이올렛을 만나실 수 있을 겁니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Người phụ nữ: Hôm nay tôi sẽ nói về hoa violet. Vì hoa violet rất đẹp nên có rất nhiều người thích loài hoa này. Hoa này thích mát mẻ. Vì vậy, bạn không thể nhìn thấy hoa vào mùa hè nóng nực. Nếu bạn để hoa ở nơi có ánh nắng mặt trời vào mùa hè, hoa có thể sẽ chết nên các bạn hãy cẩn thận. Hoa violet cũng không thích nước. Một tháng tưới khoảng 2 lần nước là được. Hôm nay hãy thử đến cửa hàng hoa gần nhà xem sao. Các bạn sẽ nhìn thấy những bông hoa violet xinh đẹp.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Woman: Today I am going to talk about a flower called violet. There are many people who like violet because of its pretty flowers. This flower likes to be cool. So you can't see violet flowers in hot summer. Be careful as it can die if you put it in a sunny place in summer. And violet doesn't like water. You only need to water it twice a month. Go to a flower shop near your house today. You'll be able to find a pretty violet.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Aujourd'hui, je vais parler d'une fleur appelée violette. Il y a beaucoup de gens qui aiment la violette à cause de ses jolies fleurs. Cette fleur aime être cool. Vous ne pouvez donc pas voir de fleurs violettes en été chaud. Faites attention car il peut mourir si vous le mettez dans un endroit ensoleillé en été. Et la violette n'aime pas l'eau. Il suffit de l'arroser deux fois par mois. Rendez-vous aujourd'hui chez un fleuriste près de chez vous. Vous pourrez trouver une jolie violette.

#######

Woman: Today I am going to talk about a flower called violet. There are many people who like violet because of its pretty flowers. This flower likes to be cool. So you can't see violet flowers in hot summer. Be careful as it can die if you put it in a sunny place in summer. And violet doesn't like water. You only need to water it twice a month. Go to a flower shop near your house today. You'll be able to find a pretty violet.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: Hoy les voy a hablar de una flor que se llama violeta. Hay muchas personas a las que les gusta la violeta por sus bonitas flores. A esta flor le gusta estar fresca. Entonces no puedes ver flores violetas en verano caluroso. Ojo porque puede morir si la pones en un lugar soleado en verano. Y a violeta no le gusta el agua. Solo necesitas regarla dos veces al mes. Ve a una floristería cerca de tu casa hoy. Podrás encontrar una bonita violeta.

#######

Woman: Today I am going to talk about a flower called violet. There are many people who like violet because of its pretty flowers. This flower likes to be cool. So you can't see violet flowers in hot summer. Be careful as it can die if you put it in a sunny place in summer. And violet doesn't like water. You only need to water it twice a month. Go to a flower shop near your house today. You'll be able to find a pretty violet.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Hari ini saya akan berbicara tentang bunga yang disebut ungu. Banyak orang yang menyukai bunga violet karena bunganya yang cantik. Bunga ini suka menjadi dingin. Jadi Anda tidak bisa melihat bunga ungu di musim panas. Hati-hati karena bisa mati jika Anda meletakkannya di tempat yang cerah di musim panas. Dan violet tidak suka air. Anda hanya perlu menyiramnya dua kali sebulan. Pergi ke toko bunga di dekat rumah Anda hari ini. Anda akan dapat menemukan ungu yang cantik.

#######

general.g_text_audio: 남자: 안녕하세요. 저는 자전거 동아리 회장 김민수입니다. 우리 동아리는 자전거를 좋아하는 학생들의 모임입니다. 우리 동아리는 토요일마다 모여서 아름다운 길을 따라 자전거 여행을 갑니다. 그리고 일 년에 한 번 자전거 타기 대회에도 참가합니다. 자전거를 못 타는 사람들도 환영하니까 많이 와 주십시오.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Xin chào. Tôi là Kim Minsoo, trưởng câu lạc bộ đạp xe. Câu lạc bộ của chúng tôi là một nhóm học sinh thích xe đạp. Mỗi thứ 7, câu lạc bộ chúng tôi sẽ họp và đạp xe du lịch trên những con đường tuyệt đẹp. Và mỗi năm một lần chúng tôi cũng tham gia cuộc thi đạp xe. Chúng tôi hoan nghênh cả những bạn không biết đi xe nên mọi người hãy đến với chúng tôi.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: Hello. I am Minsu Kim, the president of the bicycle club. Our club is a group of students who love bicycles. Our club gets together every Saturday and goes on a bicycle tour along a beautiful road. We also participate in a biking competition once a year. Even people who can't ride a bicycle are welcome, so please come.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Bonjour. Je suis Minsu Kim, la présidente du club de vélo. Notre club est un groupe d'étudiants qui aiment les vélos. Notre club se réunit tous les samedis et fait un tour à vélo le long d'une belle route. Nous participons également à une compétition de vélo une fois par an. Même les personnes qui ne savent pas faire du vélo sont les bienvenues, alors n'hésitez pas à venir.

#######

Man: Hello. I am Minsu Kim, the president of the bicycle club. Our club is a group of students who love bicycles. Our club gets together every Saturday and goes on a bicycle tour along a beautiful road. We also participate in a biking competition once a year. Even people who can't ride a bicycle are welcome, so please come.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Hola. Soy Minsu Kim, la presidenta del club ciclista. Nuestro club es un grupo de estudiantes amantes de las bicicletas. Nuestro club se reúne todos los sábados y realiza un recorrido en bicicleta por un hermoso camino. También participamos en una competencia de ciclismo una vez al año. Incluso las personas que no saben andar en bicicleta son bienvenidas, así que vengan.

Bahkan orang-orang yang tidak bisa mengendarai sepeda dipersilakan, jadi silakan datang.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 지금은 고객이 전화를 받을 수 없습니다. 메시지를 남겨 주세요. (삐-)
남자: 여보세요? 저 박민호예요. 이번 기타 공연 날짜가 정해져서 전화 했어요. 저희 공연은 이번 주 토요일 저녁 여섯 시이고, 장소는 한강공원이에요. 공연을 하기 전에 재미있는 행사가 많이 있으니까 꼭 오셔야 돼요. 그럼 토요일에 봐요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Bây giờ người này không thể nhận điện thoại. Vui lòng để lại tin nhắn. (Tiếng bíp)
Nam: Alo? Tôi là Park Min Ho. Tôi gọi đến vì đã định ngày biểu diễn guitar rồi. Buổi biểu diễn của chúng tôi vào lúc 6 giờ tối thứ bảy tuần này và địa điểm là công viên sông Hàn. Trước khi diễn, có rất nhiều sự kiện thú vị nên bạn nhất định phải đến nhé. Vậy hẹn gặp lại vào thứ bảy.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: This person can't answer the phone right now. Please leave a message. (Beep-)
Man: Hello? This is Park Min-ho. The date of this guitar performance was fixed, so I called. Our performance is this Saturday at 6pm, and the venue is Hangang Park. There are a lot of fun events before the show, so be sure to come. Then see you on Saturday.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Cette personne ne peut pas répondre au téléphone pour le moment. Merci de laisser un message. (Bip-)
Homme : Allô ? C'est Park Min-ho. La date de cette performance à la guitare était fixée, alors j'ai appelé. Notre représentation est ce samedi à 18h, et le lieu est Hangang Park. Il y a beaucoup d'événements amusants avant le spectacle, alors assurez-vous de venir. Alors à samedi.

#######

Woman: This person can't answer the phone right now. Please leave a message. (Beep-)
Man: Hello? This is Park Min-ho. The date of this guitar performance was fixed, so I called. Our performance is this Saturday at 6pm, and the venue is Hangang Park. There are a lot of fun events before the show, so be sure to come. Then see you on Saturday.

#######

general.g_text_audio: 남자: (딩동댕) 오늘도 저희 ‘종이 박물관’을 찾아 주신 여러분께 감사드립니다. 저희 ‘종이 박물관’에서는 잠시 후 두 시, 두 시부터 인형 만들기 행사를 시작합니다. 종이로 인형을 만들고 싶은 분들께서는 지금 바로 일 층 전시실로 오시기 바랍니다. 먼저 오신 스무 분께는 예쁜 선물도 드립니다. 많은 참여 부탁 드립니다. (댕동딩)

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: (Tinh toong teng) Cảm ơn các bạn đã đến thăm 'Bảo tàng giấy' của chúng tôi hôm nay. 'Bảo tàng giấy' của chúng tôi sẽ bắt đầu sự kiện làm búp bê sau một lát nữa vào lúc 2 giờ. Quý vị nào muốn làm búp bê bằng giấy thì hãy đến phòng triển lãm tầng 1 ngay bây giờ. 20 người đến trước sẽ được tặng những món quà rất đẹp. Mong các bạn đến cùng tham gia với chúng tôi. (Teng toong tinh)
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: (Ding dong daeng) Thank you to everyone who came to our ‘Paper Museum’ today. In our ‘Paper Museum’, the doll-making event will start at two o'clock after a while. Those who want to make dolls out of paper, please come to the exhibition room on the first floor right now. The first 20 people who arrive will receive a beautiful gift. We look forward to your participation. (Daeng dong ding)
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : (Ding dong daeng) Merci à tous ceux qui sont venus dans notre "Musée du papier" aujourd'hui. Dans notre "Musée du papier", l'événement de fabrication de poupées commencera à deux heures après un certain temps. Ceux qui veulent fabriquer des poupées en papier, s'il vous plaît venez dès maintenant dans la salle d'exposition au premier étage. Les 20 premières personnes qui arriveront recevront un beau cadeau. Nous attendons votre participation avec impatience. (Daeng dong ding)

#######

Man: (Ding dong daeng) Thank you to everyone who came to our ‘Paper Museum’ today. In our ‘Paper Museum’, the doll-making event will start at two o'clock after a while. Those who want to make dolls out of paper, please come to the exhibition room on the first floor right now. The first 20 people who arrive will receive a beautiful gift. We look forward to your participation. (Daeng dong ding)
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: (Ding dong daeng) Gracias a todos los que vinieron hoy a nuestro "Museo del Papel". En nuestro 'Museo del Papel', el evento de fabricación de muñecas comenzará a las dos en punto después de un rato. Aquellos que quieran hacer muñecas de papel, vengan a la sala de exhibición en el primer piso ahora mismo. Las primeras 20 personas que lleguen recibirán un hermoso regalo. Esperamos su participación. (Daeng dong ding)

#######

Man: (Ding dong daeng) Thank you to everyone who came to our ‘Paper Museum’ today. In our ‘Paper Museum’, the doll-making event will start at two o'clock after a while. Those who want to make dolls out of paper, please come to the exhibition room on the first floor right now. The first 20 people who arrive will receive a beautiful gift. We look forward to your participation. (Daeng dong ding)
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Man: (Ding dong daeng) Terima kasih untuk semua orang yang datang ke 'Museum Kertas' kami hari ini. Di 'Museum Kertas' kami, acara pembuatan boneka akan dimulai pada pukul dua setelah beberapa saat. Yang ingin membuat boneka dari kertas, silahkan datang ke ruang pameran di lantai satu sekarang juga. 20 orang pertama yang datang akan mendapatkan hadiah cantik. Kami menantikan partisipasi Anda. (Daeng dong ding)

#######

Man: (Ding dong daeng) Thank you to everyone who came to our ‘Paper Museum’ today. In our ‘Paper Museum’, the doll-making event will start at two o'clock after a while. Those who want to make dolls out of paper, please come to the exhibition room on the first floor right now. The first 20 people who arrive will receive a beautiful gift. We look forward to your participation. (Daeng dong ding)
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男性: (Ding dong daeng) 今日、私たちの「紙の博物館」に来てくださった皆さん、ありがとうございました。 「紙の美術館」では、しばらくして2時から人形作りイベントが始まります。紙人形を作りたい方は、今すぐ1階展示室へお越しください。先着20名様に素敵なプレゼントを差し上げます。皆様のご参加をお待ちしております。 (デンドンディン)

#######

Man: (Ding dong daeng) Thank you to everyone who came to our ‘Paper Museum’ today. In our ‘Paper Museum’, the doll-making event will start at two o'clock after a while. Those who want to make dolls out of paper, please come to the exhibition room on the first floor right now. The first 20 people who arrive will receive a beautiful gift. We look forward to your participation. (Daeng dong ding)
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: (Ding dong daeng) Vielen Dank an alle, die heute in unser ‚Papiermuseum‘ gekommen sind. In unserem „Papiermuseum“ beginnt nach einer Weile um zwei Uhr das Puppenbasteln. Wer Puppen aus Papier basteln möchte, kommt bitte gleich in den Ausstellungsraum im Erdgeschoss. Die ersten 20 Personen, die ankommen, erhalten ein schönes Geschenk. Wir freuen uns auf deine Beteiligung. (Daeng-Dong-Ding)

#######

Man: (Ding dong daeng) Thank you to everyone who came to our ‘Paper Museum’ today. In our ‘Paper Museum’, the doll-making event will start at two o'clock after a while. Those who want to make dolls out of paper, please come to the exhibition room on the first floor right now. The first 20 people who arrive will receive a beautiful gift. We look forward to your participation. (Daeng dong ding)
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：（叮咚咚）感谢今天来到我们“纸博物馆”的各位。在我们的“纸博物馆”中，玩偶制作活动将在稍后的两点钟开始。想用纸做娃娃的人，请马上到一楼的展厅。前20名到达的人将获得精美的礼物。我们非常期待你的参与。 （大东鼎）

#######

Man: (Ding dong daeng) Thank you to everyone who came to our ‘Paper Museum’ today. In our ‘Paper Museum’, the doll-making event will start at two o'clock after a while. Those who want to make dolls out of paper, please come to the exhibition room on the first floor right now. The first 20 people who arrive will receive a beautiful gift. We look forward to your participation. (Daeng dong ding)
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：（叮咚咚）感謝今天來到我們“紙博物館”的各位。在我們的“紙博物館”中，玩偶製作活動將在稍後的兩點鐘開始。想用紙做娃娃的人，請馬上到一樓的展廳。前20名到達的人將獲得精美的禮物。我們非常期待你的參與。 （大東鼎）

#######

Man: (Ding dong daeng) Thank you to everyone who came to our ‘Paper Museum’ today. In our ‘Paper Museum’, the doll-making event will start at two o'clock after a while. Those who want to make dolls out of paper, please come to the exhibition room on the first floor right now. The first 20 people who arrive will receive a beautiful gift. We look forward to your participation. (Daeng dong ding)
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: (Ding dong daeng) Grazie a tutti coloro che sono venuti oggi al nostro "Museo della carta". Nel nostro "Museo della carta", l'evento di creazione delle bambole inizierà alle due dopo un po'. Coloro che vogliono fare bambole con la carta, per favore, venite subito nella sala espositiva al primo piano. Le prime 20 persone che arriveranno riceveranno un bellissimo regalo. Non vediamo l'ora della tua partecipazione. (Daeng dong ding)

#######

Man: (Ding dong daeng) Thank you to everyone who came to our ‘Paper Museum’ today. In our ‘Paper Museum’, the doll-making event will start at two o'clock after a while. Those who want to make dolls out of paper, please come to the exhibition room on the first floor right now. The first 20 people who arrive will receive a beautiful gift. We look forward to your participation. (Daeng dong ding)
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: (Дин дон дэн) Спасибо всем, кто пришел сегодня в наш «Музей бумаги». В нашем «Музее бумаги» через некоторое время в два часа начнется мероприятие по изготовлению кукол. Желающих сделать кукол из бумаги приходите прямо сейчас в выставочный зал на первом этаже. Первые 20 пришедших получат красивый подарок. Мы с нетерпением ждем вашего участия. (Дэн Дон Дин)

#######

Man: (Ding dong daeng) Thank you to everyone who came to our ‘Paper Museum’ today. In our ‘Paper Museum’, the doll-making event will start at two o'clock after a while. Those who want to make dolls out of paper, please come to the exhibition room on the first floor right now. The first 20 people who arrive will receive a beautiful gift. We look forward to your participation. (Daeng dong ding)
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: (ดิ๊งดองแดง) ขอบคุณทุกคนที่มา 'พิพิธภัณฑ์กระดาษ' ของเราในวันนี้ ใน 'พิพิธภัณฑ์กระดาษ' ของเรา กิจกรรมทำตุ๊กตาจะเริ่มในเวลาบ่ายสองโมงหลังจากนั้น ใครอยากทำตุ๊กตาจากกระดาษเชิญมาที่ห้องนิทรรศการชั้น 1 ได้เลย 20 คนแรกที่มาถึงจะได้รับของขวัญสุดสวย เราหวังว่าจะมีส่วนร่วมของคุณ (แดง ดอง ดิง)

general.g_text_audio: 남자: 여러분, 그동안 정말 감사했습니다. 일 년 전에 여러분을 처음 만났을 때가 생각나네요. 한국에 있는 동안 여러분 덕분에 정말 재미있게 지냈습니다. 함께 여행을 하면서 맛있는 음식도 많이 먹고 아름다운 곳을 구경할 수 있었습니다. 그래서 일 년 동안 한국을 많이 알게 되었습니다. 중국으로 돌아가도 여러분과 함께 한 시간을 잊지 않겠습니다. 여러분, 모두 건강하세요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Cảm ơn mọi người trong suốt thời gian qua. Tôi nhớ đến một năm trước khi lần đầu tiên được gặp mọi người. Trong quãng thời gian ở Hàn Quốc, nhờ có mọi người mà tôi đã rất vui vẻ. Cùng nhau đi du lịch, cùng ăn những món ăn ngon và còn được thăm thú nhiều nơi tươi đẹp. Vì vậy trong suốt một năm qua tôi đã biết thêm rất nhiều về Hàn Quốc. Dù có về lại Trung Quốc nhưng tôi sẽ không quên quãng thời gian ở cùng mọi người. Chúc mọi người thật nhiều sức khỏe.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: Everyone, thank you so much for the time together. I remember the first time I met you a year ago. Thanks to all of you, I had a really fun time while in Korea. While traveling together, we were able to eat a lot of delicious food and see beautiful places. So I got to know Korea a lot in one year. Even when I return to China, I will never forget the time I had with you. Everyone, stay healthy.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Tout le monde, merci beaucoup pour le temps passé ensemble. Je me souviens de la première fois que je t'ai rencontré il y a un an. Grâce à vous tous, j'ai passé un très bon moment en Corée. En voyageant ensemble, nous avons pu manger beaucoup de plats délicieux et voir de beaux endroits. J'ai donc beaucoup appris à connaître la Corée en un an. Même quand je reviendrai en Chine, je n'oublierai jamais le temps que j'ai passé avec vous. Tout le monde, restez en bonne santé.

#######

Man: Everyone, thank you so much for the time together. I remember the first time I met you a year ago. Thanks to all of you, I had a really fun time while in Korea. While traveling together, we were able to eat a lot of delicious food and see beautiful places. So I got to know Korea a lot in one year. Even when I return to China, I will never forget the time I had with you. Everyone, stay healthy.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Todos, muchas gracias por el tiempo juntos. Recuerdo la primera vez que te conocí hace un año. Gracias a todos ustedes, pasé un tiempo muy divertido mientras estuve en Corea. Mientras viajábamos juntos, pudimos comer mucha comida deliciosa y ver lugares hermosos. Así que conocí mucho Corea en un año. Incluso cuando regrese a China, nunca olvidaré el tiempo que pasé contigo. Todos, manténganse saludables.

#######

Man: Everyone, thank you so much for the time together. I remember the first time I met you a year ago. Thanks to all of you, I had a really fun time while in Korea. While traveling together, we were able to eat a lot of delicious food and see beautiful places. So I got to know Korea a lot in one year. Even when I return to China, I will never forget the time I had with you. Everyone, stay healthy.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Semuanya, terima kasih banyak untuk waktu bersama. Aku ingat pertama kali aku bertemu denganmu setahun yang lalu. Terima kasih untuk kalian semua, saya memiliki waktu yang sangat menyenangkan selama di Korea. Saat bepergian bersama, kami dapat makan banyak makanan lezat dan melihat tempat-tempat indah. Jadi saya mengenal Korea banyak dalam satu tahun. Bahkan ketika saya kembali ke China, saya tidak akan pernah melupakan waktu yang saya miliki dengan Anda. Semuanya, tetap sehat.

#######

Man: Everyone, thank you so much for the time together. I remember the first time I met you a year ago. Thanks to all of you, I had a really fun time while in Korea. While traveling together, we were able to eat a lot of delicious food and see beautiful places. So I got to know Korea a lot in one year. Even when I return to China, I will never forget the time I had with you. Everyone, stay healthy.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男：みなさん、長い間お付き合いいただきありがとうございました。 1年前に初めてあなたに会ったときのことを覚えています。皆さんのおかげで、韓国にいる間、本当に楽しい時間を過ごすことができました。一緒に旅をしている間、おいしいものをたくさん食べたり、美しい場所を見たりすることができました。それで、1年で韓国のことをたくさん知ることができました。中国に帰っても、あなたと過ごした時間は決して忘れません。皆さん、健康でいてください。

#######

Even when I return to China, I will never forget the time I had with you. Everyone, stay healthy.

Auch wenn ich nach China zurückkehre, werde ich die Zeit mit Ihnen nie vergessen. Bleibt alle gesund.

Birlikte gezerken çok lezzetli yemekler yeme ve güzel yerler görme fırsatımız oldu. Böylece bir yılda Kore'yi çok tanıdım. Çin'e döndüğümde bile seninle geçirdiğim zamanı asla unutmayacağım. general.g_text_audio: 여자: 오늘은 집 안 냄새를 없애는 방법을 알려 드릴게요. 목욕탕에서 냄새가 날 때는 레몬이 좋습니다. 우선 물 세 컵에 레몬 반 개를 넣어서 레몬 물을 만드세요. 이 레몬 물로 목욕탕을 깨끗이 청소하면 됩니다. 그리고 냉장고 냄새는 식빵으로 없앨 수 있습니다. 식빵을 작게 잘라서 냉장고에 넣으면 생선이나 김치 냄새가 없어집니다. 어때요? 도움이 되셨어요?

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nữ: Hôm nay tôi sẽ hướng dẫn các bạn cách loại bỏ mùi hôi trong nhà. Khi có mùi trong phòng tắm, dùng chanh rất tốt. Đầu tiên hãy cho nửa quả chanh vào 3 cốc nước để làm nước chanh. Chỉ cần lau sạch phòng tắm bằng nước chanh này là được. Mùi của tủ lạnh có thể được loại bỏ bằng bánh mì. Cắt nhỏ bánh mì và cho vào tủ lạnh thì mùi cá hay mùi kimchi sẽ biến mất. Các bạn thấy thế nào? Có giúp ích được gì không?
g_text_audio_translate.en: Woman: Today I'm going to show you how to get rid of the smell in the house. Lemon is good when the bathroom smells. First, make lemon water by adding half a lemon to three cups of water. Just clean your bathroom with this lemon water. And the smell of the refrigerator can be eliminated with white bread. If you cut the bread into small pieces and put it in the refrigerator, the smell of fish or kimchi will disappear. How about it? Was it helpful?
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Aujourd'hui, je vais vous montrer comment vous débarrasser de l'odeur dans la maison. Le citron est bon quand la salle de bain sent mauvais. Tout d'abord, préparez de l'eau citronnée en ajoutant un demi-citron à trois tasses d'eau. Nettoyez simplement votre salle de bain avec cette eau citronnée. Et l'odeur du réfrigérateur peut être éliminée avec du pain blanc. Si vous coupez le pain en petits morceaux et que vous le mettez au réfrigérateur, l'odeur de poisson ou de kimchi disparaîtra. Qu'en est-il? Était-ce utile ?

#######

Woman: Today I'm going to show you how to get rid of the smell in the house. Lemon is good when the bathroom smells. First, make lemon water by adding half a lemon to three cups of water. Just clean your bathroom with this lemon water. And the smell of the refrigerator can be eliminated with white bread. If you cut the bread into small pieces and put it in the refrigerator, the smell of fish or kimchi will disappear. How about it? Was it helpful?
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: Hoy les voy a mostrar cómo quitar el olor de la casa. El limón es bueno cuando huele el baño. Primero, haga agua de limón agregando medio limón a tres tazas de agua. Solo limpia tu baño con esta agua de limón. Y el olor a nevera se puede eliminar con pan blanco. Si cortas el pan en trozos pequeños y lo metes en el frigorífico, el olor a pescado o kimchi desaparecerá. ¿Qué tal? ¿Fue útil?

#######

Woman: Today I'm going to show you how to get rid of the smell in the house. Lemon is good when the bathroom smells. First, make lemon water by adding half a lemon to three cups of water. Just clean your bathroom with this lemon water. And the smell of the refrigerator can be eliminated with white bread. If you cut the bread into small pieces and put it in the refrigerator, the smell of fish or kimchi will disappear. How about it? Was it helpful?
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Hari ini saya akan menunjukkan cara menghilangkan bau di rumah. Lemon baik ketika kamar mandi berbau. Pertama, buat air lemon dengan menambahkan setengah lemon ke dalam tiga gelas air. Cukup bersihkan kamar mandi Anda dengan air lemon ini. Dan bau kulkas bisa dihilangkan dengan roti tawar. Jika Anda memotong roti menjadi potongan-potongan kecil dan memasukkannya ke dalam lemari es, bau ikan atau kimchi akan hilang. Bagaimana dengan itu? Apakah itu membantu?

#######

Woman: Today I'm going to show you how to get rid of the smell in the house. Lemon is good when the bathroom smells. First, make lemon water by adding half a lemon to three cups of water. Just clean your bathroom with this lemon water. And the smell of the refrigerator can be eliminated with white bread. If you cut the bread into small pieces and put it in the refrigerator, the smell of fish or kimchi will disappear. How about it? Was it helpful?
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女性: 今日は、家の中のにおいを消す方法を紹介します。バスルームが臭いときはレモンがいいです。まず、水3カップにレモン半分を加えてレモン水を作ります。このレモン水でバスルームをきれいにしてください。そして、冷蔵庫の臭いは白パンで消すことができます。食パンを小さく切って冷蔵庫に入れておくと、魚やキムチの臭みが消えます。どうですか？役に立ちましたか？

#######

Woman: Today I'm going to show you how to get rid of the smell in the house. Lemon is good when the bathroom smells. First, make lemon water by adding half a lemon to three cups of water. Just clean your bathroom with this lemon water. And the smell of the refrigerator can be eliminated with white bread. If you cut the bread into small pieces and put it in the refrigerator, the smell of fish or kimchi will disappear. How about it? Was it helpful?
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Heute werde ich Ihnen zeigen, wie Sie den Geruch im Haus loswerden. Zitrone ist gut, wenn das Badezimmer riecht. Machen Sie zuerst Zitronenwasser, indem Sie eine halbe Zitrone in drei Tassen Wasser geben. Reinigen Sie einfach Ihr Badezimmer mit diesem Zitronenwasser. Und der Kühlschrankgeruch lässt sich mit Weißbrot beseitigen. Wenn Sie das Brot in kleine Stücke schneiden und in den Kühlschrank stellen, verschwindet der Geruch von Fisch oder Kimchi. Wie wäre es? War es hilfreich?

#######

Woman: Today I'm going to show you how to get rid of the smell in the house. Lemon is good when the bathroom smells. First, make lemon water by adding half a lemon to three cups of water. Just clean your bathroom with this lemon water. And the smell of the refrigerator can be eliminated with white bread. If you cut the bread into small pieces and put it in the refrigerator, the smell of fish or kimchi will disappear. How about it? Was it helpful?
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：今天我要教你怎么去除屋子里的异味。当浴室有异味时，柠檬很好。首先，在三杯水中加入半个柠檬制成柠檬水。只需用这种柠檬水清洁您的浴室。而冰箱的异味可以用白面包消除。如果将面包切成小块放入冰箱，鱼或泡菜的味道就会消失。这个怎么样？有帮助吗？

#######

Woman: Today I'm going to show you how to get rid of the smell in the house. Lemon is good when the bathroom smells. First, make lemon water by adding half a lemon to three cups of water. Just clean your bathroom with this lemon water. And the smell of the refrigerator can be eliminated with white bread. If you cut the bread into small pieces and put it in the refrigerator, the smell of fish or kimchi will disappear. How about it? Was it helpful?
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：今天我要教你怎麼去除屋子裡的異味。當浴室有異味時，檸檬很好。首先，在三杯水中加入半個檸檬製成檸檬水。只需用這種檸檬水清潔您的浴室。而冰箱的異味可以用白麵包消除。如果將麵包切成小塊放入冰箱，魚或泡菜的味道就會消失。這個怎麼樣？有幫助嗎？

#######

Woman: Today I'm going to show you how to get rid of the smell in the house. Lemon is good when the bathroom smells. First, make lemon water by adding half a lemon to three cups of water. Just clean your bathroom with this lemon water. And the smell of the refrigerator can be eliminated with white bread. If you cut the bread into small pieces and put it in the refrigerator, the smell of fish or kimchi will disappear. How about it? Was it helpful?
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Oggi ti mostrerò come eliminare l'odore in casa. Il limone fa bene quando il bagno profuma. Per prima cosa, prepara l'acqua al limone aggiungendo mezzo limone a tre tazze d'acqua. Basta pulire il bagno con quest'acqua al limone. E l'odore del frigorifero può essere eliminato con il pane bianco. Se tagli il pane a pezzetti e lo metti in frigorifero, l'odore del pesce o del kimchi scomparirà. Che ne dici? È stato utile?

#######

Woman: Today I'm going to show you how to get rid of the smell in the house. Lemon is good when the bathroom smells. First, make lemon water by adding half a lemon to three cups of water. Just clean your bathroom with this lemon water. And the smell of the refrigerator can be eliminated with white bread. If you cut the bread into small pieces and put it in the refrigerator, the smell of fish or kimchi will disappear. How about it? Was it helpful?
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Сегодня я покажу вам, как избавиться от запаха в доме. Лимон хорош, когда в ванной пахнет. Сначала приготовьте лимонную воду, добавив половину лимона в три стакана воды. Просто очистите ванную комнату этой лимонной водой. А запах холодильника можно устранить с помощью белого хлеба. Если нарезать хлеб небольшими кусочками и положить в холодильник, запах рыбы или кимчи исчезнет. Как насчет этого? Было ли это полезно?

#######

Woman: Today I'm going to show you how to get rid of the smell in the house. Lemon is good when the bathroom smells. First, make lemon water by adding half a lemon to three cups of water. Just clean your bathroom with this lemon water. And the smell of the refrigerator can be eliminated with white bread. If you cut the bread into small pieces and put it in the refrigerator, the smell of fish or kimchi will disappear. How about it? Was it helpful?
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: วันนี้ฉันจะแสดงวิธีกำจัดกลิ่นในบ้านให้คุณดู มะนาวมีผลดีเมื่อห้องน้ำมีกลิ่น ขั้นแรก ทำน้ำมะนาวโดยเติมมะนาวครึ่งลูกลงในน้ำสามถ้วย เพียงทำความสะอาดห้องน้ำด้วยน้ำมะนาวนี้ และกลิ่นตู้เย็นสามารถขจัดได้ด้วยขนมปังขาว หากหั่นขนมปังเป็นชิ้นเล็กๆ แล้วแช่ตู้เย็น กลิ่นปลาหรือกิมจิจะหายไป แล้วไงล่ะ? มันมีประโยชน์ไหม?

#######

Woman: Today I'm going to show you how to get rid of the smell in the house. Lemon is good when the bathroom smells. First, make lemon water by adding half a lemon to three cups of water. Just clean your bathroom with this lemon water. And the smell of the refrigerator can be eliminated with white bread. If you cut the bread into small pieces and put it in the refrigerator, the smell of fish or kimchi will disappear. How about it? Was it helpful?
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Hoje vou te mostrar como tirar o cheiro da casa. Limão é bom quando o banheiro cheira mal. Primeiro, faça água com limão adicionando meio limão a três xícaras de água. Basta limpar seu banheiro com esta água com limão. E o cheiro da geladeira pode ser eliminado com pão branco. Se você cortar o pão em pedaços pequenos e colocá-lo na geladeira, o cheiro de peixe ou kimchi desaparecerá. Que tal isso? Foi útil?

#######

Woman: Today I'm going to show you how to get rid of the smell in the house. Lemon is good when the bathroom smells. First, make lemon water by adding half a lemon to three cups of water. Just clean your bathroom with this lemon water. And the smell of the refrigerator can be eliminated with white bread. If you cut the bread into small pieces and put it in the refrigerator, the smell of fish or kimchi will disappear. How about it? Was it helpful?
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: आज मैं तुम्हें घर की बदबू से छुटकारा पाने का तरीका बताने जा रही हूं। बाथरूम से बदबू आने पर नींबू अच्छा होता है। सबसे पहले तीन कप पानी में आधा नींबू डालकर नींबू पानी बना लें। बस इस नींबू पानी से अपना बाथरूम साफ करें। और सफेद ब्रेड से फ्रिज की बदबू को खत्म किया जा सकता है। अगर आप ब्रेड को छोटे-छोटे टुकड़ों में काटकर फ्रिज में रख देंगे तो मछली या किमची की गंध गायब हो जाएगी। इसके बारे में क्या ख़्याल है? क्या यह मददगार था?

#######

Woman: Today I'm going to show you how to get rid of the smell in the house. Lemon is good when the bathroom smells. First, make lemon water by adding half a lemon to three cups of water. Just clean your bathroom with this lemon water. And the smell of the refrigerator can be eliminated with white bread. If you cut the bread into small pieces and put it in the refrigerator, the smell of fish or kimchi will disappear. How about it? Was it helpful?
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Bugün sana evdeki kokudan nasıl kurtulacağını göstereceğim. Banyo koktuğunda limon iyidir. Öncelikle üç bardak suya yarım limon ekleyerek limonlu su hazırlayın. Banyonuzu bu limonlu suyla temizlemeniz yeterli. Ve buzdolabının kokusu beyaz ekmekle giderilebilir. Ekmeği küçük parçalara bölüp buzdolabına koyarsanız balık veya kimchi kokusu kaybolacaktır. Peki ya? Yardımcı oldu mu?

#######

Woman: Today I'm going to show you how to get rid of the smell in the house. Lemon is good when the bathroom smells. First, make lemon water by adding half a lemon to three cups of water. Just clean your bathroom with this lemon water. And the smell of the refrigerator can be eliminated with white bread. If you cut the bread into small pieces and put it in the refrigerator, the smell of fish or kimchi will disappear. How about it? Was it helpful?

Chọn đáp án phù hợp với nội dung đã nghe.
1. Chanh giúp loại bỏ mùi kim chi.

explain.en:

general.g_text_audio: 여자: 여러분, 안녕하세요. 오늘 나오실 분은 이건우 씨입니다. 이 피아노 음악 들리시죠? 드라마에 자주 나와서 많이 들어보셨을 거예요. 이 음악을 만든 사람이 바로 이건우 씨입니다. 이건우 씨는 한 달에 한 번 병원에 가서 무료로 피아노 공연도 하는 멋진 분이신데요. 그럼, 지금부터 이건우 씨를 모시고 이야기를 들어 볼까요?

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nữ: Xin chào các bạn. Người sẽ xuất hiện hôm nay là Lee Gun Woo. Các bạn có nghe thấy tiếng piano không? Tôi nghĩ là các bạn đã nghe rồi vì nó xuất hiện rất nhiều trong phim. Người tạo ra chúng chính là Lee Gun Woo. Lee Gun Woo là một người tuyệt vời khi đến bệnh viện một tháng một lần và biểu diễn piano miễn phí. Vậy thì, bây giờ chúng ta hãy cùng nghe câu chuyện của anh Lee Gun Woo nhé?
g_text_audio_translate.en: Woman: Hello, everyone. Today's guest is Lee Kun-woo. Can you hear this piano music? I'm sure you've heard it a lot since it came out in dramas. The person who made this song is Lee Kun-woo. Lee Kun-woo is a wonderful person who goes to the hospital once a month and performs a piano performance for free. So, shall we listen to the story with Mr. Lee Kun-woo from now on?
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Bonjour, tout le monde. L'invité d'aujourd'hui est Lee Kun-woo. Pouvez-vous entendre cette musique de piano? Je suis sûr que vous l'avez beaucoup entendu depuis qu'il est sorti dans les drames. La personne qui a fait cette chanson est Lee Kun-woo. Lee Kun-woo est une personne merveilleuse qui se rend à l'hôpital une fois par mois et donne gratuitement un concert au piano. Alors, allons-nous écouter l'histoire avec M. Lee Kun-woo à partir de maintenant ?

general.g_text_audio: 남자: 주민 여러분께 알려 드립니다. 이번에 우리 아파트에서 하는 바자회에 옷과 신발 같은 물건들이 많이 모였습니다. 정말 감사합니다. 그런데 아이들을 위한 책하고 장난감은 많지 않습니다. 집에 남는 물건이 있으시면 관리 사무실로 보내 주시기 바랍니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Tôi xin thông báo đến toàn thể cư dân. Lần này chúng tôi đã tập hợp rất nhiều đồ vật như quần áo và giày dép trong hội chợ quyên góp ở chung cư của chúng ta. Thực sự rất cảm ơn mọi người. Tuy nhiên, không có nhiều sách và đồ chơi cho trẻ em. Nếu các bạn vẫn còn đồ ở nhà, vui lòng gửi đến văn phòng quản lý.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: Attention residents. A lot of items such as clothes and shoes gathered at the bazaar held at our apartment this time. Thank you very much. However, there are not many books and toys for children. If you have anything left at home, please send it to the management office.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Attention, résidents. Beaucoup d'articles tels que des vêtements et des chaussures se sont rassemblés au bazar qui s'est tenu dans notre appartement cette fois-ci. Merci beaucoup. Cependant, il n'y a pas beaucoup de livres et de jouets pour enfants. S'il vous reste quelque chose à la maison, veuillez l'envoyer au bureau de la direction.

#######

Man: Attention residents. A lot of items such as clothes and shoes gathered at the bazaar held at our apartment this time. Thank you very much. However, there are not many books and toys for children. If you have anything left at home, please send it to the management office.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Atención residentes. Una gran cantidad de artículos, como ropa y zapatos, se reunieron en el bazar que se llevó a cabo en nuestro apartamento esta vez. Muchísimas gracias. Sin embargo, no hay muchos libros y juguetes para niños. Si le queda algo en casa, por favor envíelo a la oficina de administración.

#######

Man: Attention residents. A lot of items such as clothes and shoes gathered at the bazaar held at our apartment this time. Thank you very much. However, there are not many books and toys for children. If you have anything left at home, please send it to the management office.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Perhatian warga. Banyak barang seperti pakaian dan sepatu berkumpul di bazar yang diadakan di apartemen kami kali ini. Terima kasih banyak. Namun, tidak banyak buku dan mainan untuk anak-anak. Jika Anda memiliki sesuatu yang tersisa di rumah, kirimkan ke kantor manajemen.

#######

Man: Attention residents. A lot of items such as clothes and shoes gathered at the bazaar held at our apartment this time. Thank you very much. However, there are not many books and toys for children. If you have anything left at home, please send it to the management office.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男性: 住民に注意してください。今回、当マンションで開催されたバザーでは、洋服や靴などたくさんのアイテムが集まりました。どうもありがとうございました。しかし、子供向けの本やおもちゃはあまりありません。ご自宅に忘れ物がございましたら、管理事務所までお送りください。

#######

Man: Attention residents. A lot of items such as clothes and shoes gathered at the bazaar held at our apartment this time. Thank you very much. However, there are not many books and toys for children. If you have anything left at home, please send it to the management office.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Achtung Anwohner. Viele Gegenstände wie Kleidung und Schuhe, die diesmal auf dem Basar in unserer Wohnung gesammelt wurden. Vielen Dank. Allerdings gibt es nicht viele Bücher und Spielsachen für Kinder. Wenn Sie etwas zu Hause haben, schicken Sie es bitte an die Geschäftsstelle.

#######

Man: Attention residents. A lot of items such as clothes and shoes gathered at the bazaar held at our apartment this time. Thank you very much. However, there are not many books and toys for children. If you have anything left at home, please send it to the management office.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：居民注意。这次在我们公寓举办的集市上聚集了很多衣服和鞋子等物品。非常感谢。但是，儿童的书籍和玩具并不多。如果家里有什么东西，请寄到管理处。

#######

Man: Attention residents. A lot of items such as clothes and shoes gathered at the bazaar held at our apartment this time. Thank you very much. However, there are not many books and toys for children. If you have anything left at home, please send it to the management office.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：居民注意。這次在我們公寓舉辦的集市上聚集了很多衣服和鞋子等物品。非常感謝。但是，兒童的書籍和玩具並不多。如果家裡有什麼東西，請寄到管理處。

#######

Man: Attention residents. A lot of items such as clothes and shoes gathered at the bazaar held at our apartment this time. Thank you very much. However, there are not many books and toys for children. If you have anything left at home, please send it to the management office.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Attenzione residenti. Un sacco di oggetti come vestiti e scarpe raccolti al bazar che si tiene questa volta nel nostro appartamento. Grazie mille. Tuttavia, non ci sono molti libri e giocattoli per bambini. Se ti è rimasto qualcosa a casa, invialo alla direzione.

#######

Man: Attention residents. A lot of items such as clothes and shoes gathered at the bazaar held at our apartment this time. Thank you very much. However, there are not many books and toys for children. If you have anything left at home, please send it to the management office.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Внимание жителей. Множество вещей, таких как одежда и обувь, собрались на базаре, проходившем в этот раз в нашей квартире. Большое спасибо. Однако книг и игрушек для детей не так много. Если у вас что-то осталось дома, пожалуйста, отправьте это в офис администрации.

#######

Man: Attention residents. A lot of items such as clothes and shoes gathered at the bazaar held at our apartment this time. Thank you very much. However, there are not many books and toys for children. If you have anything left at home, please send it to the management office.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: ให้ความสนใจกับผู้อยู่อาศัย ของต่างๆมากมายเช่นเสื้อผ้าและรองเท้ามารวมตัวกันที่ตลาดซึ่งจัดขึ้นที่อพาร์ตเมนต์ของเราในครั้งนี้ ขอบคุณมาก. อย่างไรก็ตามมีหนังสือและของเล่นสำหรับเด็กไม่มากนัก หากคุณมีสิ่งของเหลือที่บ้านกรุณาส่งไปที่สำนักงานจัดการ

#######

Man: Attention residents. A lot of items such as clothes and shoes gathered at the bazaar held at our apartment this time. Thank you very much. However, there are not many books and toys for children. If you have anything left at home, please send it to the management office.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Atenção moradores. Muitos itens como roupas e sapatos foram reunidos no bazar realizado em nosso apartamento desta vez. Muito obrigado. Porém, não existem muitos livros e brinquedos para crianças. Se sobrar alguma coisa em casa, envie para a administração.

#######

Man: Attention residents. A lot of items such as clothes and shoes gathered at the bazaar held at our apartment this time. Thank you very much. However, there are not many books and toys for children. If you have anything left at home, please send it to the management office.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: निवासी ध्यान दें. इस बार हमारे अपार्टमेंट में आयोजित बाज़ार में कपड़े और जूते जैसी बहुत सारी चीज़ें एकत्र हुईं। आपका बहुत-बहुत धन्यवाद। हालाँकि, बच्चों के लिए बहुत सारी किताबें और खिलौने नहीं हैं। यदि आपके पास घर पर कुछ बचा है, तो कृपया इसे प्रबंधन कार्यालय को भेजें।

#######

Man: Attention residents. A lot of items such as clothes and shoes gathered at the bazaar held at our apartment this time. Thank you very much. However, there are not many books and toys for children. If you have anything left at home, please send it to the management office.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Mahalle sakinlerinin dikkatine. Bu kez apartmanımızda düzenlenen pazarda kıyafet, ayakkabı gibi birçok eşya toplandı. Çok teşekkür ederim. Ancak çocuklara yönelik pek fazla kitap ve oyuncak yok. Evde bir şey kaldıysa lütfen yönetim ofisine gönderin.

#######

general.g_text_audio: 맛있는 비빔 냉면을 만들고 싶으세요? 먼저 물이 끓으면 면을 넣으세요. 면은 한 번에 넣지 말고 조금씩 넣으세요. 그리고 면이 다 익으면 찬물이나 얼음물에 바로 넣고 씻으세요. 찬물이 면을 더 맛있게 해줍니다. 마지막으로 간장, 고추장, 식초, 마늘, 설탕을 넣고 같이 비비면 맛있는 냉면이 완성됩니다. 매운 맛을 좋아하면 고추장을 더 넣으세요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Bạn muốn làm mì lạnh trộn ngon? Đầu tiên, khi nước sôi, bạn cho mì vào. Thêm mì từng chút một, không nên cho tất cả cùng một lúc. Và khi mì đã chín hoàn toàn, hãy rửa ngay bằng cách cho vào thau nước lạnh hoặc nước đá. Nước lạnh giúp mì ngon hơn. Cuối cùng, thêm nước tương, tương ớt, giấm, tỏi và đường và trộn với nhau để tạo ra món mì lạnh ngon. Nếu bạn thích cay, có thể cho thêm tương ớt.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Want to make delicious bibim naengmyeon? First, when the water boils, add the noodles. Add the noodles little by little, not all at once. Then, when the noodles are cooked, wash them immediately in cold or ice water. Cold water makes noodles taste better. Finally, add soy sauce, red pepper paste, vinegar, garlic, and sugar and mix together to make delicious naengmyeon. Add more red pepper paste if you like it spicy.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Vuoi preparare un delizioso bibim naengmyeon? Per prima cosa, quando l’acqua bolle, aggiungete le tagliatelle. Aggiungere le tagliatelle poco alla volta, non tutte in una volta. Poi, quando le tagliatelle saranno cotte, lavatele subito in acqua fredda o ghiacciata. L'acqua fredda migliora il sapore delle tagliatelle. Infine, aggiungi salsa di soia, pasta di peperoncino, aceto, aglio e zucchero e mescola per preparare un delizioso naengmyeon. Aggiungi altra pasta di peperoncino se ti piace il piccante.

#######

Want to make delicious bibim naengmyeon? First, when the water boils, add the noodles. Add the noodles little by little, not all at once. Then, when the noodles are cooked, wash them immediately in cold or ice water. Cold water makes noodles taste better. Finally, add soy sauce, red pepper paste, vinegar, garlic, and sugar and mix together to make delicious naengmyeon. Add more red pepper paste if you like it spicy.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Vous voulez préparer de délicieux bibim naengmyeon ? Tout d’abord, lorsque l’eau bout, ajoutez les nouilles. Ajoutez les nouilles petit à petit, pas d'un seul coup. Ensuite, lorsque les nouilles sont cuites, lavez-les immédiatement à l’eau froide ou glacée. L'eau froide donne un meilleur goût aux nouilles. Enfin, ajoutez la sauce soja, la pâte de poivron rouge, le vinaigre, l'ail et le sucre et mélangez pour obtenir un délicieux naengmyeon. Ajoutez plus de pâte de poivron rouge si vous l'aimez épicé.

#######

Want to make delicious bibim naengmyeon? First, when the water boils, add the noodles. Add the noodles little by little, not all at once. Then, when the noodles are cooked, wash them immediately in cold or ice water. Cold water makes noodles taste better. Finally, add soy sauce, red pepper paste, vinegar, garlic, and sugar and mix together to make delicious naengmyeon. Add more red pepper paste if you like it spicy.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
¿Quieres preparar un delicioso bibim naengmyeon? Primero, cuando el agua hierva, agrega los fideos. Agrega los fideos poco a poco, no todos a la vez. Luego, cuando los fideos estén cocidos, lávalos inmediatamente con agua fría o con hielo. El agua fría hace que los fideos sepan mejor. Finalmente, agregue salsa de soja, pasta de pimiento rojo, vinagre, ajo y azúcar y mezcle para hacer un delicioso naengmyeon. Agrega más pasta de pimiento rojo si te gusta picante.

#######

Want to make delicious bibim naengmyeon? First, when the water boils, add the noodles. Add the noodles little by little, not all at once. Then, when the noodles are cooked, wash them immediately in cold or ice water. Cold water makes noodles taste better. Finally, add soy sauce, red pepper paste, vinegar, garlic, and sugar and mix together to make delicious naengmyeon. Add more red pepper paste if you like it spicy.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Ingin membuat bibim naengmyeon yang enak? Pertama, setelah air mendidih, masukkan mie. Masukkan mie sedikit demi sedikit, jangan sekaligus. Kemudian, jika mie sudah matang, segera cuci dengan air dingin atau es. Air dingin membuat mie terasa lebih enak. Terakhir, tambahkan kecap asin, pasta cabai merah, cuka, bawang putih, dan gula, lalu aduk hingga menjadi naengmyeon yang lezat. Tambahkan lebih banyak pasta cabai merah jika Anda suka pedas.

#######

Want to make delicious bibim naengmyeon? First, when the water boils, add the noodles. Add the noodles little by little, not all at once. Then, when the noodles are cooked, wash them immediately in cold or ice water. Cold water makes noodles taste better. Finally, add soy sauce, red pepper paste, vinegar, garlic, and sugar and mix together to make delicious naengmyeon. Add more red pepper paste if you like it spicy.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
美味しいビビン冷麺を作ってみませんか？まず、お湯が沸騰したら麺を入れます。麺は一度に加えず少しずつ加えてください。麺が茹で上がったら、すぐに冷水または氷水で洗います。冷たい水は麺をより美味しくします。最後に醤油、コチュジャン、酢、ニンニク、砂糖を加えて混ぜると美味しい冷麺が出来上がります。辛いのが好きな方は赤唐辛子ペーストを追加してください。

#######

Want to make delicious bibim naengmyeon? First, when the water boils, add the noodles. Add the noodles little by little, not all at once. Then, when the noodles are cooked, wash them immediately in cold or ice water. Cold water makes noodles taste better. Finally, add soy sauce, red pepper paste, vinegar, garlic, and sugar and mix together to make delicious naengmyeon. Add more red pepper paste if you like it spicy.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Möchten Sie köstliches Bibim Naengmyeon zubereiten? Wenn das Wasser kocht, fügen Sie zunächst die Nudeln hinzu. Fügen Sie die Nudeln nach und nach hinzu, nicht alle auf einmal. Wenn die Nudeln dann gar sind, waschen Sie sie sofort in kaltem oder Eiswasser. Kaltes Wasser lässt Nudeln besser schmecken. Zum Schluss Sojasauce, rote Paprikapaste, Essig, Knoblauch und Zucker hinzufügen und zu einem köstlichen Naengmyeon verrühren. Wenn Sie es scharf mögen, fügen Sie noch mehr rote Paprikapaste hinzu.

#######

Want to make delicious bibim naengmyeon? First, when the water boils, add the noodles. Add the noodles little by little, not all at once. Then, when the noodles are cooked, wash them immediately in cold or ice water. Cold water makes noodles taste better. Finally, add soy sauce, red pepper paste, vinegar, garlic, and sugar and mix together to make delicious naengmyeon. Add more red pepper paste if you like it spicy.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
想做美味的拌饭冷面吗？首先，当水沸腾时，加入面条。一点一点地加入面条，不要一次全部加入。然后，面条煮熟后，立即用冷水或冰水清洗。冷水使面条味道更好。最后加入酱油、红辣椒酱、醋、大蒜和糖，混合在一起，就成了美味的冷面。喜欢吃辣的可以多加点红辣椒酱。

#######

Want to make delicious bibim naengmyeon? First, when the water boils, add the noodles. Add the noodles little by little, not all at once. Then, when the noodles are cooked, wash them immediately in cold or ice water. Cold water makes noodles taste better. Finally, add soy sauce, red pepper paste, vinegar, garlic, and sugar and mix together to make delicious naengmyeon. Add more red pepper paste if you like it spicy.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
想做美味的拌飯冷面嗎？首先，當水沸騰時，加入麵條。一點一點地加入麵條，不要一次全部加入。然後，麵條煮熟後，立即用冷水或冰水清洗。冷水使麵條味道更好。最後加入醬油、紅辣椒醬、醋、大蒜和糖，混合在一起，就成了美味的冷面。喜歡吃辣的可以多加點紅辣椒醬。

#######

Want to make delicious bibim naengmyeon? First, when the water boils, add the noodles. Add the noodles little by little, not all at once. Then, when the noodles are cooked, wash them immediately in cold or ice water. Cold water makes noodles taste better. Finally, add soy sauce, red pepper paste, vinegar, garlic, and sugar and mix together to make delicious naengmyeon. Add more red pepper paste if you like it spicy.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Хотите приготовить вкусный пибим нэнмён? Сначала, когда вода закипит, добавьте лапшу. Добавляйте лапшу понемногу, а не всю сразу. Затем, когда лапша сварится, сразу промойте ее в холодной или ледяной воде. Холодная вода делает лапшу вкуснее. Наконец, добавьте соевый соус, пасту из красного перца, уксус, чеснок и сахар и перемешайте, чтобы получился восхитительный нэнмён. Если любите остроту, добавьте еще пасты из красного перца.

#######

g_text_audio_translate.th:
อยากทำบิบิมแนงมยอนแสนอร่อยไหม? ขั้นแรกเมื่อน้ำเดือดให้ใส่เส้นบะหมี่ลงไป ค่อยๆ ใส่เส้นทีละน้อย ไม่ใช่ทั้งหมดในคราวเดียว จากนั้นเมื่อบะหมี่สุกแล้ว ให้ล้างบะหมี่ทันทีด้วยน้ำเย็นหรือน้ำแข็ง น้ำเย็นทำให้บะหมี่มีรสชาติดีขึ้น สุดท้ายใส่ซีอิ๊ว พริกแดง น้ำส้มสายชู กระเทียม และน้ำตาล แล้วผสมให้เข้ากันเพื่อทำแนงมยอนแสนอร่อย เติมพริกแดงลงไปอีกถ้าคุณชอบเผ็ด

#######

Then, when the noodles are cooked, wash them immediately in cold or ice water. Cold water makes noodles taste better. g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Quer fazer um delicioso bibim naengmyeon? Primeiro, quando a água ferver, acrescente o macarrão. Adicione o macarrão aos poucos, não de uma vez. Depois, quando o macarrão estiver cozido, lave-o imediatamente em água fria ou gelada. A água fria melhora o sabor do macarrão. Por fim, adicione o molho de soja, a pasta de pimenta vermelha, o vinagre, o alho e o açúcar e misture para fazer um delicioso naengmyeon. Adicione mais pasta de pimenta vermelha se gostar de picante.

#######

Finally, add soy sauce, red pepper paste, vinegar, garlic, and sugar and mix together to make delicious naengmyeon. Add more red pepper paste if you like it spicy.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
क्या आप स्वादिष्ट बिबिम नेंगमायोन बनाना चाहते हैं? सबसे पहले जब पानी उबल जाए तो इसमें नूडल्स डालें। नूडल्स को थोड़ा-थोड़ा करके डालें, एक साथ नहीं। फिर, जब नूडल्स पक जाएं तो उन्हें तुरंत ठंडे या बर्फ के पानी से धो लें। ठंडा पानी नूडल्स का स्वाद बेहतर बनाता है। अंत में, सोया सॉस, लाल मिर्च का पेस्ट, सिरका, लहसुन और चीनी डालें और स्वादिष्ट नेंगमायोन बनाने के लिए एक साथ मिलाएं। अगर आपको तीखा पसंद है तो और लाल मिर्च का पेस्ट डालें।

#######

Then, when the noodles are cooked, wash them immediately in cold or ice water. Cold water makes noodles taste better. Finally, add soy sauce, red pepper paste, vinegar, garlic, and sugar and mix together to make delicious naengmyeon. Add more red pepper paste if you like it spicy.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Lezzetli bibim naengmyeon yapmak ister misiniz? Öncelikle su kaynayınca erişteleri ekleyin. Erişteleri bir anda değil azar azar ekleyin. Daha sonra erişteler pişince hemen soğuk veya buzlu suyla yıkayın. Soğuk su eriştenin tadının daha güzel olmasını sağlar. Son olarak soya sosunu, kırmızı biber salçasını, sirkeyi, sarımsağı ve şekeri ekleyin ve lezzetli naengmyeon yapmak için karıştırın. Acılı seviyorsanız daha fazla kırmızı biber salçası ekleyin.

#######

q_answer: 면은 한 번에 넣는 것이 좋습니다.
물이 끓기 전에 면을 먼저 넣어야 합니다.
물이 끓을 때 찬물을 더 넣으면 맛있어집니다.

explain.vi:
Chọn câu giống với nội dung đã nghe.
1. Nên cho mì vào cùng một lúc.
2. Rửa mì trong nước đá để mì ngon hơn.
3. Bạn phải cho mì vào trước khi nước sôi.
4. Khi nước sôi, bạn cho thêm nước lạnh vào để được ngon hơn.
--------------------
얼음물: Nước đá
씻다: Rửa

N + (이)나: Hoặc.
V/A + 게 하다: Làm cho.

그리고 면이 다 익으면 찬물이나 얼음물에 바로 넣고 씻으세요. 찬물이 면을 더 맛있게 해줍니다: Và khi mì đã chín hoàn toàn, hãy rửa ngay bằng cách cho vào thau nước lạnh hoặc nước đá. Nước lạnh giúp mì ngon hơn.
explain.en:

2. It tastes better if you wash the noodles in ice water.
3. Be sure to put the noodles in first before the water boils.
4. Add more cold water when the water boils to make it taste better.

<g>씻다:</g> To wash

<g>V/A + 게 하다:</g> Make something do/be something.

4. Tambahkan air dingin lagi saat air mendidih agar rasanya lebih enak.

explain.hi:
वह चुनें जो आपने जो सुना है उसके समान हो।
1. नूडल्स को एक ही बार में डालने की सलाह दी जाती है।
2. यदि आप नूडल्स को बर्फ के पानी में धोते हैं तो इसका स्वाद बेहतर होता है।
3. पानी में उबाल आने से पहले नूडल्स डालना सुनिश्चित करें।
4. पानी में उबाल आने पर इसका स्वाद बेहतर बनाने के लिए इसमें और ठंडा पानी मिला लें.
------------------------

<g>씻다:</g>धोना

<g>N + (이)나:</g>या।

<g>그리고 면이 다 익으면 찬물이나 얼음물에 바로 넣고 씻으세요. 찬물이 면을 더 맛있게 해줍니다:</g>फिर, जब नूडल्स पक जाएं तो उन्हें तुरंत ठंडे या बर्फ के पानी से धो लें। ठंडा पानी नूडल्स का स्वाद बेहतर बनाता है।

general.g_text_audio: 여자: 잠시 안내 말씀 드리겠습니다. 지금 101동 엘리베이터를 수리 중입니다. 그런데 수리 시간이 생각보다 오래 걸릴 것 같습니다. 지금부터 7시까지 3시간 동안 엘리베이터를 사용하실 수 없습니다. 계단을 이용해 주시기 바랍니다. 수리가 끝나면 다시 안내해 드리겠습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nữ: Tôi xin thông báo trong ít phút. Chúng tôi hiện đang sửa chữa thang máy tòa 101. Tuy nhiên, thời gian sửa chữa có vẻ lâu hơn dự kiến. Thang máy sẽ không hoạt động trong 3 giờ từ bây giờ đến 7 giờ. Vui lòng sử dụng cầu thang bộ. Chúng tôi sẽ thông báo lại khi sửa chữa xong.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Woman: Can I have your attention please? The elevator in Building 101 is being repaired now. But I think it'll take longer than I thought to repair it. You can't use the elevator for 3 hours from now until 7 o'clock. Please use the stairs. I'll guide you back when the repairs are done.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Posso avere la tua attenzione, per favore? L'ascensore nell'Edificio 101 è in riparazione adesso. Ma penso che ci vorrà più tempo di quanto pensassi per ripararlo. Non puoi usare l'ascensore per 3 ore da adesso fino alle 7. Per favore usate le scale. Ti guiderò indietro quando le riparazioni saranno finite.

#######

Woman: Can I have your attention please? The elevator in Building 101 is being repaired now. But I think it'll take longer than I thought to repair it. You can't use the elevator for 3 hours from now until 7 o'clock. Please use the stairs. I'll guide you back when the repairs are done.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Puis-je avoir votre attention s'il vous plaît ? L'ascenseur du bâtiment 101 est en cours de réparation. Mais je pense que cela prendra plus de temps que prévu pour le réparer. Vous ne pourrez pas utiliser l'ascenseur pendant 3 heures jusqu'à 19 heures. Veuillez utiliser les escaliers. Je vous guiderai une fois les réparations terminées.

#######

Woman: Can I have your attention please? The elevator in Building 101 is being repaired now. But I think it'll take longer than I thought to repair it. You can't use the elevator for 3 hours from now until 7 o'clock. Please use the stairs. I'll guide you back when the repairs are done.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: ¿Puedo tener su atención por favor? El ascensor del edificio 101 está en reparación. Pero creo que tardaré más de lo que pensaba en repararlo. No podrás usar el ascensor durante 3 horas desde ahora hasta las 7 en punto. Por favor use las escaleras. Te guiaré cuando termines las reparaciones.

#######

Woman: Can I have your attention please? The elevator in Building 101 is being repaired now. But I think it'll take longer than I thought to repair it. You can't use the elevator for 3 hours from now until 7 o'clock. Please use the stairs. I'll guide you back when the repairs are done.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Bolehkah saya minta perhatiannya? Lift di Gedung 101 sedang diperbaiki sekarang. Tapi menurutku akan memakan waktu lebih lama dari perkiraanku untuk memperbaikinya. Anda tidak dapat menggunakan lift selama 3 jam dari sekarang hingga jam 7. Silakan gunakan tangga. Saya akan memandu Anda kembali setelah perbaikan selesai.

#######

Woman: Can I have your attention please? The elevator in Building 101 is being repaired now. But I think it'll take longer than I thought to repair it. You can't use the elevator for 3 hours from now until 7 o'clock. Please use the stairs. I'll guide you back when the repairs are done.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女性: ちょっと注意してもらえますか? 101号館のエレベーターは現在修理中です。ただ、修理には思ったより時間がかかりそうです。今から7時までの3時間はエレベーターが使えません。階段をご利用ください。修理が完了しましたらまたご案内させていただきます。

#######

Woman: Can I have your attention please? The elevator in Building 101 is being repaired now. But I think it'll take longer than I thought to repair it. You can't use the elevator for 3 hours from now until 7 o'clock. Please use the stairs. I'll guide you back when the repairs are done.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Könnte ich bitte Ihre Aufmerksamkeit haben? Der Aufzug im Gebäude 101 wird derzeit repariert. Aber ich denke, dass die Reparatur länger dauern wird, als ich dachte. Sie können den Aufzug von jetzt an für 3 Stunden bis 7 Uhr nicht benutzen. Bitte benutzen Sie die Treppe. Ich begleite Sie zurück, wenn die Reparaturen abgeschlossen sind.

#######

Woman: Can I have your attention please? The elevator in Building 101 is being repaired now. But I think it'll take longer than I thought to repair it. You can't use the elevator for 3 hours from now until 7 o'clock. Please use the stairs. I'll guide you back when the repairs are done.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：我可以请你注意一下吗？目前101楼电梯正在维修中。但我认为修复它需要的时间比我想象的要长。从即日起至晚上7点，3小时内不能使用电梯。请使用楼梯。维修完成后我会带你回去。

#######

Woman: Can I have your attention please? The elevator in Building 101 is being repaired now. But I think it'll take longer than I thought to repair it. You can't use the elevator for 3 hours from now until 7 o'clock. Please use the stairs. I'll guide you back when the repairs are done.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：我可以請你注意一下嗎？目前101樓電梯正在維修中。但我認為修復它需要的時間比我想像的要長。從即日起至晚上7點，3小時內不能使用電梯。請使用樓梯。維修完成後我會帶你回去。

#######

Woman: Can I have your attention please? The elevator in Building 101 is being repaired now. But I think it'll take longer than I thought to repair it. You can't use the elevator for 3 hours from now until 7 o'clock. Please use the stairs. I'll guide you back when the repairs are done.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Могу я привлечь ваше внимание, пожалуйста? Лифт в доме 101 сейчас ремонтируется. Но я думаю, что ремонт займет больше времени, чем я думал. Вы не сможете пользоваться лифтом в течение 3 часов до 7 часов. Пожалуйста, воспользуйтесь лестницей. Я провожу вас обратно, когда ремонт будет закончен.

#######

Woman: Can I have your attention please? The elevator in Building 101 is being repaired now. But I think it'll take longer than I thought to repair it. You can't use the elevator for 3 hours from now until 7 o'clock. Please use the stairs. I'll guide you back when the repairs are done.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: ฉันขอความสนใจจากคุณได้ไหม? ขณะนี้ลิฟต์ในอาคาร 101 อยู่ระหว่างการซ่อมแซม แต่ผมคิดว่าคงใช้เวลานานกว่าที่คิดจะซ่อม คุณจะไม่สามารถใช้ลิฟต์ได้เป็นเวลา 3 ชั่วโมงนับจากนี้จนถึง 7 โมงเช้า กรุณาใช้บันได ฉันจะแนะนำคุณกลับเมื่อการซ่อมแซมเสร็จสิ้น

#######

Woman: Can I have your attention please? The elevator in Building 101 is being repaired now. But I think it'll take longer than I thought to repair it. You can't use the elevator for 3 hours from now until 7 o'clock. Please use the stairs. I'll guide you back when the repairs are done.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Posso ter sua atenção, por favor? O elevador do Prédio 101 está sendo consertado agora. Mas acho que vai demorar mais do que pensei para consertá-lo. Você não poderá usar o elevador por 3 horas a partir de agora até as 7 horas. Por favor, use as escadas. Eu o guiarei de volta quando os reparos estiverem concluídos.

#######

Woman: Can I have your attention please? The elevator in Building 101 is being repaired now. But I think it'll take longer than I thought to repair it. You can't use the elevator for 3 hours from now until 7 o'clock. Please use the stairs. I'll guide you back when the repairs are done.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: क्या मैं कृपया आपका ध्यान आकर्षित कर सकती हूँ? बिल्डिंग 101 में लिफ्ट की अभी मरम्मत की जा रही है। लेकिन मुझे लगता है कि इसे सुधारने में जितना मैंने सोचा था उससे अधिक समय लगेगा। आप अब से 7 बजे तक 3 घंटे तक लिफ्ट का उपयोग नहीं कर सकते। कृपया सीढ़ियों का प्रयोग करें. जब मरम्मत पूरी हो जाएगी तो मैं आपका मार्गदर्शन करूंगा।

#######

Woman: Can I have your attention please? The elevator in Building 101 is being repaired now. But I think it'll take longer than I thought to repair it. You can't use the elevator for 3 hours from now until 7 o'clock. Please use the stairs. I'll guide you back when the repairs are done.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Dikkatinizi alabilir miyim lütfen? Bina 101'deki asansör şu anda onarılıyor. Ama sanırım tamiri düşündüğümden daha uzun sürecek. Şu andan itibaren saat 7'ye kadar 3 saat boyunca asansörü kullanamazsınız. Lütfen merdivenleri kullanın. Onarımlar bittiğinde sana geri döneceğim.

#######

Woman: Can I have your attention please? The elevator in Building 101 is being repaired now. But I think it'll take longer than I thought to repair it. You can't use the elevator for 3 hours from now until 7 o'clock. Please use the stairs. I'll guide you back when the repairs are done.

general.g_text_audio: 잠시 후 공연이 시작됩니다. 모두 자리에 앉아 주시기 바랍니다. 먼저 저희 공연에 와 주셔서 감사합니다. 공연 전 몇 가지 사항을 말씀 드리겠습니다. 공연 중에는 옆 사람과 이야기하지 마십시오. 앞 좌석을 다리를 올려 놓지 마십시오. 공연 후 배우들과 사진을 찍는 시간이 있습니다. 공연 중에는 사진이나 동영상을 찍지 마십시오. 휴대 전화는 바로 끄거나 진동으로 바꿔 주시기 바랍니다. 즐거운 관람 되시기 바랍니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Buổi biểu diễn sẽ bắt đầu trong ít phút. Mọi người vui lòng ngồi vào chỗ. Lời đầu tiên, xin cảm ơn các bạn đã đến với buổi biểu diễn của chúng tôi. Tôi sẽ nói một vài lưu ý trước buổi biểu diễn. Không nói chuyện với người bên cạnh trong quá trình biểu diễn. Vui lòng không gác chân lên ghế trước. Sẽ có thời gian chụp ảnh với diễn viên sau khi biểu diễn. Vui lòng không chụp ảnh hoặc quay phim trong quá trình biểu diễn. Vui lòng tắt điện thoại di động của bạn hoặc chuyển sang chế độ rung ngay. Xin chúc mọi người xem vui vẻ.
