Lo spettacolo inizierà a breve. Per favore, prendete posto. Prima di tutto, grazie per essere venuti alla nostra esibizione. Ti dirò alcune cose prima dello spettacolo. Non parlare con la persona accanto a te durante lo spettacolo. Non appoggiare le gambe sul sedile di fronte a te. Dopo lo spettacolo c'è tempo per scattare foto con gli attori. Si prega di non scattare foto o video durante lo spettacolo. Si prega di spegnere immediatamente il cellulare o di impostarlo in vibrazione. Spero ti piaccia lo spettacolo.

#######

Ne parlez pas à la personne à côté de vous pendant la représentation. Ne posez pas vos jambes sur le siège devant vous. Après la représentation, il est temps de prendre des photos avec les acteurs. Merci de ne pas prendre de photos ou de vidéos pendant la représentation. Veuillez éteindre votre téléphone portable ou le régler pour qu'il vibre immédiatement. J'espère que vous apprécierez le spectacle.

कुछ ही देर में प्रदर्शन शुरू होगा. कृपया अपना स्थान ग्रहण करें। सबसे पहले, हमारे प्रदर्शन में आने के लिए धन्यवाद। मैं आपको शो से पहले कुछ बातें बताऊंगा। प्रदर्शन के दौरान अपने बगल वाले व्यक्ति से बात न करें। अपने पैरों को अपने सामने वाली सीट पर न रखें। प्रदर्शन के बाद, अभिनेताओं के साथ तस्वीरें लेने का समय होता है। कृपया प्रदर्शन के दौरान फ़ोटो या वीडियो न लें। कृपया अपना सेल फ़ोन तुरंत बंद कर दें या उसे कंपन पर सेट कर दें। मुझे आशा है के आप शो का आनंद लेंगे।

general.g_text_audio: 카레를 먹어 보았습니까? 이 음식은 양고기, 닭고기, 소고기 등 여러 가지로 만들 수 있습니다. 소스는 양파, 토마토와 카레를 넣어서 만듭니다. 카레는 맵지 않은 맛과 중간 매운 맛, 매운 맛이 있습니다. 카레는 인도에서 비롯하고 세계로 전파돼서 여러 버전도 있습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Bạn đã thử cà ri chưa? Món ăn này có thể được làm từ nhiều thứ thịt, ví dụ như thịt cừu, thịt gà và thịt bò. Nước sốt được làm từ hành tây, cà chua và cà ri. Cà ri có các hương vị không cay, cay vừa và cay. Cà ri có nguồn gốc từ Ấn Độ và lan rộng khắp thế giới, vì vậy nó cũng có nhiều phiên bản.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Have you tried curry? This food can be made with several things, such as lamb, chicken, and beef. The sauce is made with onions, tomatoes and curry. Curry comes in non-spicy, medium-spicy and spicy flavors. Curry originated in India and spread around the world, so there are several versions.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Hai provato il curry? Questo cibo può essere preparato con diverse cose, come agnello, pollo e manzo. La salsa è fatta con cipolle, pomodori e curry. Il curry è disponibile nei gusti non piccante, mediamente piccante e piccante. Il curry è originario dell'India e si è diffuso in tutto il mondo, quindi ne esistono diverse versioni.

你嘗試過咖哩嗎？這種食物可以用多種材料製成，例如羊肉、雞肉和牛肉。醬汁是用洋蔥、西紅柿和咖哩製成的。咖哩有不辣、中辣、辣三種口味。咖哩起源於印度，傳播到世界各地，因此有好幾個版本。

#######

Have you tried curry? This food can be made with several things, such as lamb, chicken, and beef. The sauce is made with onions, tomatoes and curry. Curry comes in non-spicy, medium-spicy and spicy flavors. Curry originated in India and spread around the world, so there are several versions.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Вы пробовали карри? Эту еду можно приготовить из нескольких продуктов, например из баранины, курицы и говядины. Соус готовится из лука, помидоров и карри. Карри бывает неострого, средне-острого и пряного вкуса. Карри зародилось в Индии и распространилось по всему миру, поэтому существует несколько версий.

#######

g_text_audio_translate.pt:

#######

g_text_audio_translate.hi:
क्या आपने करी ट्राई की है? यह भोजन कई चीज़ों से बनाया जा सकता है, जैसे मेमना, चिकन और बीफ़। सॉस प्याज, टमाटर और करी से बनाया जाता है। करी गैर-मसालेदार, मध्यम-मसालेदार और मसालेदार स्वाद में आती है। करी की उत्पत्ति भारत में हुई और यह दुनिया भर में फैल गई, इसलिए इसके कई संस्करण हैं।

general.g_text_audio: 파스타는 이탈리아의 대표 음식입니다. 면은 여러 가지 모양이고 소스도 여러 가지입니다. 만드는 방법도 다양합니다. 보통은 끓는 물ㄹ에 소금을 조금 넣고 면을 삶습니다. 그리고 올리브 오일, 버터, 생크림과 고기, 계란, 치즈, 채소 등 자기가 좋아하는 소스를 만들어서 면과 같이 먹습니다. 만드는 방법도 간단하면서 자기가 좋아하는 것을 먹을 수 있어서 많은 사람들이 파스타를 좋아합니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Pasta là món ăn tiêu biểu của Ý. Mì có nhiều hình dạng khác nhau và nước sốt cũng vậy. Cách làm cũng đa dạng. Thông thường, người ta luộc mì với một ít muối trong nước sôi. Sau đó, họ làm nước sốt yêu thích như dầu ô liu, bơ, kem tươi, thịt, trứng, phô mai, rau củ rồi ăn kèm với mì. Rất nhiều người thích pasta vì nó dễ làm và có thể ăn những gì mình thích.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Pasta is the representative food of Italy. Noodles are in many shapes and sauces are in many different ways. There are many ways to make it. Usually, boil noodles with a little salt in boiling water. And people make their favorite sauce such as olive oil, butter, whipped cream, meat, eggs, cheese, vegetables, and eat it with noodles. Many people like pasta because it is simple to make and you can eat what you like.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
La pasta è l'alimento rappresentativo dell'Italia. I noodles hanno molte forme e le salse sono in molti modi diversi. Ci sono molti modi per farlo. Di solito si lessano le tagliatelle con un po' di sale in acqua bollente. E le persone preparano la loro salsa preferita come olio d'oliva, burro, panna montata, carne, uova, formaggio, verdure e la mangiano con le tagliatelle. A molte persone piace la pasta perché è semplice da preparare e puoi mangiare quello che vuoi.

#######

Pasta is the representative food of Italy. Noodles are in many shapes and sauces are in many different ways. There are many ways to make it. Usually, boil noodles with a little salt in boiling water. And people make their favorite sauce such as olive oil, butter, whipped cream, meat, eggs, cheese, vegetables, and eat it with noodles. Many people like pasta because it is simple to make and you can eat what you like.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Les pâtes sont la nourriture représentative de l'Italie. Les nouilles se présentent sous de nombreuses formes et les sauces se présentent sous de nombreuses formes différentes. Il existe de nombreuses façons de le faire. Habituellement, faites bouillir les nouilles avec un peu de sel dans de l'eau bouillante. Et les gens préparent leur sauce préférée comme l'huile d'olive, le beurre, la crème fouettée, la viande, les œufs, le fromage, les légumes, et la mangent avec des nouilles. Beaucoup de gens aiment les pâtes parce qu’elles sont simples à préparer et que vous pouvez manger ce que vous voulez.

#######

Pasta is the representative food of Italy. Noodles are in many shapes and sauces are in many different ways. There are many ways to make it. Usually, boil noodles with a little salt in boiling water. And people make their favorite sauce such as olive oil, butter, whipped cream, meat, eggs, cheese, vegetables, and eat it with noodles. Many people like pasta because it is simple to make and you can eat what you like.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
La pasta es el alimento representativo de Italia. Los fideos tienen muchas formas y las salsas tienen muchas formas diferentes. Hay muchas maneras de hacerlo. Generalmente se hierven los fideos con un poco de sal en agua hirviendo. Y la gente prepara su salsa favorita, como aceite de oliva, mantequilla, crema batida, carne, huevos, queso, verduras, y la come con fideos. A mucha gente le gusta la pasta porque es sencilla de hacer y puedes comer lo que quieras.

#######

Pasta is the representative food of Italy. Noodles are in many shapes and sauces are in many different ways. There are many ways to make it. Usually, boil noodles with a little salt in boiling water. And people make their favorite sauce such as olive oil, butter, whipped cream, meat, eggs, cheese, vegetables, and eat it with noodles. Many people like pasta because it is simple to make and you can eat what you like.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pasta adalah makanan khas Italia. Mie tersedia dalam berbagai bentuk dan saus dalam berbagai cara. Ada banyak cara untuk membuatnya. Biasanya mie direbus dengan sedikit garam dalam air mendidih. Dan orang-orang membuat saus favoritnya seperti minyak zaitun, mentega, krim kocok, daging, telur, keju, sayuran, dan memakannya dengan mie. Banyak orang menyukai pasta karena cara membuatnya yang sederhana dan bisa dimakan sesuka Anda.

#######

g_text_audio_translate.ja:
パスタはイタリアを代表する食べ物です。麺にはさまざまな形があり、ソースにもさまざまな方法があります。作り方はたくさんあります。通常、麺は沸騰したお湯に少量の塩を入れて茹でます。そしてオリーブオイル、バター、生クリーム、肉、卵、チーズ、野菜など好みのソースを作り、麺と一緒に食べます。パスタは簡単に作れて好きなものを食べられるので好きな人も多いでしょう。

g_text_audio_translate.de:
Pasta ist das repräsentative Essen Italiens. Nudeln gibt es in vielen Formen und Soßen gibt es auf viele verschiedene Arten. Es gibt viele Möglichkeiten, es zu machen. Normalerweise werden Nudeln mit etwas Salz in kochendem Wasser gekocht. Und die Leute machen ihre Lieblingssoße wie Olivenöl, Butter, Schlagsahne, Fleisch, Eier, Käse, Gemüse und essen sie mit Nudeln. Viele Menschen mögen Pasta, weil sie einfach zuzubereiten ist und man essen kann, was man möchte.

g_text_audio_translate.hi:
पास्ता इटली का प्रतिनिधि भोजन है। नूडल्स कई आकार के होते हैं और सॉस कई तरह के होते हैं। इसे बनाने के कई तरीके हैं. आमतौर पर नूडल्स को उबलते पानी में थोड़े से नमक के साथ उबालें। और लोग अपनी पसंदीदा सॉस जैसे जैतून का तेल, मक्खन, व्हीप्ड क्रीम, मांस, अंडे, पनीर, सब्जियां बनाते हैं और नूडल्स के साथ खाते हैं। बहुत से लोग पास्ता पसंद करते हैं क्योंकि इसे बनाना आसान है और आप जो चाहें खा सकते हैं।

İnsanlar da zeytinyağı, tereyağı, krem ​​şanti, et, yumurta, peynir, sebze gibi en sevdikleri sosları hazırlayıp erişteyle birlikte yiyorlar. Pek çok kişi makarnayı sever çünkü yapımı kolaydır ve dilediğinizi yiyebilirsiniz.

Chọn câu đúng với nội dung đã nghe.

3. Pasta có một cách làm duy nhất.
4. Nhiều người thích pasta vì tính đa dạng của nó.
--------------------

Pasta có nguyên liệu và cách làm đa dạng nên người ta có thể ăn món mà họ thích, vậy nên nhiều người thích pasta.

general.g_text_audio: 돈가스는 일본 사람들이 서양의 포크커틀릿을 바꿔서 입맛에 맞게 만든 음식입니다. 오늘 돈가스를 만드는 방법을 알려 드립니다. 먼저 돼지고기를 두껍게 잘라서 칼로 부드럽게 만듭니다. 그 다음엔 소금과 후춧가루를 뿌립니다. 그 위에 밀가루와 달걀, 빵가루를 묻혀서 기름에 튀기면 완성합니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Tonkatsu là món ăn được người Nhật chế biến bằng cách biến tấu món thịt heo cốt lết của phương Tây cho phù hợp với khẩu vị của họ. Hôm nay tôi sẽ hướng dẫn các bạn cách làm tonkatsu. Đầu tiên, bạn hãy cắt miếng thịt lợn dày và làm mềm nó bằng dao. Sau đó rắc muối và tiêu. Nhúng vào bột mì, trứng và vụn bánh mì rồi chiên trong dầu là xong.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Tonkatsu is a food that Japanese people have adapted from Western pork cutlets to suit their taste buds. Today I will teach you how to make tonkatsu. First, cut the pork thickly and tenderize it with a knife. Then sprinkle with salt and pepper powder. It is finished by coating it with flour, egg, and bread crumbs and frying it in oil.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Il tonkatsu è un alimento che i giapponesi hanno adattato alle cotolette di maiale occidentali per soddisfare le loro papille gustative. Oggi ti insegnerò a fare il tonkatsu. Per prima cosa tagliate il maiale a fette spesse e inteneritelo con un coltello. Quindi cospargere con sale e pepe in polvere. Si rifinisce rivestendolo di farina, uova e pangrattato e friggendolo nell'olio.

#######

Tonkatsu is a food that Japanese people have adapted from Western pork cutlets to suit their taste buds. Today I will teach you how to make tonkatsu. First, cut the pork thickly and tenderize it with a knife. Then sprinkle with salt and pepper powder. It is finished by coating it with flour, egg, and bread crumbs and frying it in oil.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Le tonkatsu est un aliment que les Japonais ont adapté à partir des côtelettes de porc occidentales pour satisfaire leurs papilles gustatives. Aujourd'hui, je vais vous apprendre à faire du tonkatsu. Commencez par couper le porc en morceaux épais et attendrissez-le avec un couteau. Saupoudrez ensuite de sel et de poivre en poudre. On termine en l'enrobant de farine, d'œuf et de chapelure et en le faisant frire dans l'huile.

#######

Tonkatsu is a food that Japanese people have adapted from Western pork cutlets to suit their taste buds. Today I will teach you how to make tonkatsu. First, cut the pork thickly and tenderize it with a knife. Then sprinkle with salt and pepper powder. It is finished by coating it with flour, egg, and bread crumbs and frying it in oil.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Tonkatsu es un alimento que los japoneses han adaptado a partir de chuletas de cerdo occidentales para satisfacer sus papilas gustativas. Hoy os enseñaré a hacer tonkatsu. Primero, corta la carne de cerdo en trozos gruesos y ablandala con un cuchillo. Luego espolvorea con sal y pimienta en polvo. Se termina rebozándolo con harina, huevo y pan rallado y friéndolo en aceite.

#######

Tonkatsu is a food that Japanese people have adapted from Western pork cutlets to suit their taste buds. Today I will teach you how to make tonkatsu. First, cut the pork thickly and tenderize it with a knife. Then sprinkle with salt and pepper powder. It is finished by coating it with flour, egg, and bread crumbs and frying it in oil.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Tonkatsu adalah makanan yang diadaptasi oleh orang Jepang dari potongan daging babi Barat agar sesuai dengan selera mereka. Hari ini saya akan mengajari Anda cara membuat tonkatsu. Pertama, potong daging babi hingga tebal dan empukkan dengan pisau. Lalu taburi dengan garam dan merica bubuk. Selesai dengan melapisinya dengan tepung, telur, dan remah roti lalu menggorengnya dengan minyak.

#######

Tonkatsu is a food that Japanese people have adapted from Western pork cutlets to suit their taste buds. Today I will teach you how to make tonkatsu. First, cut the pork thickly and tenderize it with a knife. Then sprinkle with salt and pepper powder. It is finished by coating it with flour, egg, and bread crumbs and frying it in oil.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
とんかつは、西洋のとんかつを日本人が自分の味覚に合わせてアレンジした食べ物です。今日はとんかつの作り方を教えます。まず豚肉を厚めに切り、ナイフで柔らかくします。その後、塩、コショウの粉をふりかけます。小麦粉、卵、パン粉をつけて油で揚げて完成です。

#######

Tonkatsu is a food that Japanese people have adapted from Western pork cutlets to suit their taste buds. Today I will teach you how to make tonkatsu. First, cut the pork thickly and tenderize it with a knife. Then sprinkle with salt and pepper powder. It is finished by coating it with flour, egg, and bread crumbs and frying it in oil.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Tonkatsu ist ein Gericht, das die Japaner aus westlichen Schweinekoteletts adaptiert haben, um sie an ihre Geschmacksknospen anzupassen. Heute werde ich Ihnen beibringen, wie man Tonkatsu macht. Schneiden Sie das Schweinefleisch zunächst in dicke Scheiben und machen Sie es mit einem Messer zart. Anschließend mit Salz und Pfefferpulver bestreuen. Zum Abschluss wird es mit Mehl, Ei und Semmelbröseln bestrichen und in Öl gebraten.

#######

Tonkatsu is a food that Japanese people have adapted from Western pork cutlets to suit their taste buds. Today I will teach you how to make tonkatsu. First, cut the pork thickly and tenderize it with a knife. Then sprinkle with salt and pepper powder. It is finished by coating it with flour, egg, and bread crumbs and frying it in oil.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
炸猪排是日本人根据西方炸猪排改编而成的一种食物，以适应他们的味蕾。今天我就教大家做炸猪排。首先，将猪肉切厚片，用刀嫩化。然后撒上盐和胡椒粉。裹上面粉、鸡蛋和面包屑，然后用油煎炸即可完成。

#######

First, cut the pork thickly and tenderize it with a knife. Then sprinkle with salt and pepper powder. It is finished by coating it with flour, egg, and bread crumbs and frying it in oil.

炸豬排是日本人根據西方炸豬排改編而成的一種食物，以適應他們的味蕾。今天我就教大家做炸豬排。首先，將豬肉切厚片，用刀嫩化。然後撒上鹽和胡椒粉。裹上麵粉、雞蛋和麵包屑，然後用油煎炸即可完成。

#######

g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Тонкацу — это еда, которую японцы адаптировали из западных свиных котлет в соответствии со своими вкусовыми рецепторами. Сегодня я научу вас готовить тонкацу. Сначала нарежьте свинину толсто и размягчите ее ножом. Затем посыпьте солью и перцем. Для завершения его обваливают в муке, яйце и панировочных сухарях и обжаривают в масле.

#######

g_text_audio_translate.th:
ทงคัตสึเป็นอาหารที่คนญี่ปุ่นดัดแปลงมาจากหมูทอดสไตล์ตะวันตกเพื่อให้เหมาะกับรสนิยมของพวกเขา วันนี้ฉันจะสอนวิธีทำทงคัตสึ ขั้นแรกให้หั่นหมูเป็นชิ้นหนาแล้วใช้มีดทำให้เนื้อนุ่ม จากนั้นโรยด้วยเกลือและพริกไทยป่น เสร็จแล้วก็ชุบแป้ง ไข่ และเกล็ดขนมปังแล้วทอดในน้ำมัน

g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Tonkatsu é um alimento que os japoneses adaptaram das costeletas de porco ocidentais para se adequar ao seu paladar. Hoje vou te ensinar como fazer tonkatsu. Primeiro, corte a carne de porco grosseiramente e amacie-a com uma faca. Em seguida, polvilhe com sal e pimenta em pó. Finaliza-se cobrindo-o com farinha, ovo e pão ralado e fritando-o em óleo.

#######

g_text_audio_translate.hi:
टोंकात्सु एक ऐसा भोजन है जिसे जापानी लोगों ने अपने स्वाद के अनुरूप पश्चिमी पोर्क कटलेट से अपनाया है। आज मैं तुम्हें टोनकात्सु बनाना सिखाऊंगी। सबसे पहले सूअर के मांस को मोटा-मोटा काट लें और चाकू से नरम कर लें। फिर नमक और काली मिर्च पाउडर छिड़कें. इसे आटे, अंडे और ब्रेड क्रम्ब्स से लपेटकर और तेल में तलकर तैयार किया जाता है।

#######

Tonkatsu, Japon halkının Batı domuz pirzolalarından kendi damak zevklerine uyacak şekilde uyarladığı bir yiyecektir. Bugün size tonkatsu yapmayı öğreteceğim. Öncelikle etleri ince ince kesip bıçakla iyice yumuşatıyoruz. Daha sonra tuz ve karabiber serpin. Un, yumurta ve galeta ununa bulanıp yağda kızartılmasıyla tamamlanır.

explain.vi:
Chọn câu đúng với nội dung đã nghe.
1. Rất nhiều bột ớt đỏ được sử dụng trong tonkatsu.
2. Thành phần chính của tonkatsu là thịt lợn.
3. Tonkatsu có nguồn gốc từ phương Đông.
4. Tonkatsu là món được nấu trong nước trong thời gian dài.
--------------------
돼지고기: Thịt lợn
소금: Muối
호춧가루: Bột tiêu
밀가루: Bột mì
달걀: Trứng
기름: Dầu
빵가루: Vụn bánh
뿌리다: Rắc
튀기다: Chiên

Qua giải thích có thể thấy người ta tẩm ướp các nguyên liệu khác lên thịt lợn và đem chiên nên thành phần chính là thịt lợn.

general.g_text_audio: 갈비찜은 한국의 전통 음식입니다. 갈비찜은 소갈비를 양념해서 만든 것입니다. 간장과 설탕, 파와 마늘, 생강, 참기름 등으로 소스를 만들어서 고기와 같이 넣고 오랫동안 끓입니다. 다 끓인 후에 밤, 당근, 달걀, 버섯 등을 넣어서 여러 색깔로 꾸밉니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Galbijjim là một món ăn truyền thống của Hàn Quốc. Galbijjim được làm bằng cách ướp gia vị vào sườn bò. Người ta làm nước sốt với nước tương, đường, hành lá, tỏi, gừng, dầu mè,... rồi cho thịt vào đun lửa nhỏ trong thời gian dài. Sau khi sôi, cho hạt dẻ, cà rốt, trứng, nấm vào trang trí với nhiều màu sắc khác nhau.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Galbijjim is a traditional Korean food. Galbijjim is made by seasoning beef ribs. Make a sauce with soy sauce, sugar, green onion, garlic, ginger, and sesame oil, add it to the meat, and simmer for a long time. After boiling, add chestnuts, carrots, eggs, mushrooms, etc. to decorate in various colors.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Il Galbijjim è un cibo tradizionale coreano. Il Galbijjim si ottiene condendo le costolette di manzo. Preparare una salsa con salsa di soia, zucchero, cipolla verde, aglio, zenzero e olio di sesamo, aggiungerla alla carne e cuocere a fuoco lento. Dopo la bollitura aggiungere castagne, carote, uova, funghi, ecc. per decorare in vari colori.

#######

Galbijjim is a traditional Korean food. Galbijjim is made by seasoning beef ribs. Make a sauce with soy sauce, sugar, green onion, garlic, ginger, and sesame oil, add it to the meat, and simmer for a long time. After boiling, add chestnuts, carrots, eggs, mushrooms, etc. to decorate in various colors.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Le Galbijjim est un plat traditionnel coréen. Le Galbijjim est préparé en assaisonnant des côtes de bœuf. Préparez une sauce avec de la sauce soja, du sucre, de l'oignon vert, de l'ail, du gingembre et de l'huile de sésame, ajoutez-la à la viande et laissez mijoter longuement. Après ébullition, ajoutez les châtaignes, les carottes, les œufs, les champignons, etc. pour décorer de différentes couleurs.

#######

Galbijjim is a traditional Korean food. Galbijjim is made by seasoning beef ribs. Make a sauce with soy sauce, sugar, green onion, garlic, ginger, and sesame oil, add it to the meat, and simmer for a long time. After boiling, add chestnuts, carrots, eggs, mushrooms, etc. to decorate in various colors.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Galbijjim es una comida tradicional coreana. Galbijjim se elabora condimentando costillas de res. Haga una salsa con salsa de soja, azúcar, cebolla verde, ajo, jengibre y aceite de sésamo, agréguela a la carne y cocine a fuego lento durante mucho tiempo. Después de hervir añadir castañas, zanahorias, huevos, champiñones, etc. para decorar de varios colores.

#######

Galbijjim is a traditional Korean food. Galbijjim is made by seasoning beef ribs. Make a sauce with soy sauce, sugar, green onion, garlic, ginger, and sesame oil, add it to the meat, and simmer for a long time. After boiling, add chestnuts, carrots, eggs, mushrooms, etc. to decorate in various colors.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Galbijjim adalah makanan tradisional Korea. Galbijjim dibuat dengan membumbui iga sapi. Buat saus dengan kecap, gula pasir, daun bawang, bawang putih, jahe, dan minyak wijen, tambahkan ke dalam daging, dan biarkan mendidih lama. Setelah mendidih, tambahkan chestnut, wortel, telur, jamur, dll untuk menghias dengan berbagai warna.

#######

Galbijjim is a traditional Korean food. Galbijjim is made by seasoning beef ribs. Make a sauce with soy sauce, sugar, green onion, garlic, ginger, and sesame oil, add it to the meat, and simmer for a long time. After boiling, add chestnuts, carrots, eggs, mushrooms, etc. to decorate in various colors.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
カルビチムは韓国の伝統料理です。カルビチムは牛バラ肉を味付けして作ります。醤油、砂糖、ネギ、ニンニク、生姜、ごま油でタレを作り、肉に加えて長時間煮ます。煮上がったら栗、にんじん、卵、きのこなどを加えて彩り豊かに飾ります。

#######

Galbijjim is a traditional Korean food. Galbijjim is made by seasoning beef ribs. Make a sauce with soy sauce, sugar, green onion, garlic, ginger, and sesame oil, add it to the meat, and simmer for a long time. After boiling, add chestnuts, carrots, eggs, mushrooms, etc. to decorate in various colors.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Galbijjim ist ein traditionelles koreanisches Essen. Galbijjim wird durch das Würzen von Rinderrippchen hergestellt. Aus Sojasauce, Zucker, Frühlingszwiebeln, Knoblauch, Ingwer und Sesamöl eine Sauce zubereiten, zum Fleisch geben und lange köcheln lassen. Nach dem Kochen Kastanien, Karotten, Eier, Pilze usw. hinzufügen und in verschiedenen Farben dekorieren.

#######

Galbijjim is a traditional Korean food. Galbijjim is made by seasoning beef ribs. Make a sauce with soy sauce, sugar, green onion, garlic, ginger, and sesame oil, add it to the meat, and simmer for a long time. After boiling, add chestnuts, carrots, eggs, mushrooms, etc. to decorate in various colors.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
排骨鸡是韩国的传统食品。排骨是用牛肋骨调味而成的。用酱油、糖、葱、蒜、姜、香油调成酱汁，加到肉上，小火煮半天。煮沸后加入栗子、胡萝卜、鸡蛋、蘑菇等装饰成各种颜色。

#######

Galbijjim is a traditional Korean food. Galbijjim is made by seasoning beef ribs. Make a sauce with soy sauce, sugar, green onion, garlic, ginger, and sesame oil, add it to the meat, and simmer for a long time. After boiling, add chestnuts, carrots, eggs, mushrooms, etc. to decorate in various colors.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
排骨雞是韓國的傳統食品。排骨是用牛肋骨調味而成的。用醬油、糖、蔥、蒜、姜、香油調成醬汁，加到肉上，小火煮半天。煮沸後加入栗子、胡蘿蔔、雞蛋、蘑菇等裝飾成各種顏色。

#######

Galbijjim is a traditional Korean food. Galbijjim is made by seasoning beef ribs. Make a sauce with soy sauce, sugar, green onion, garlic, ginger, and sesame oil, add it to the meat, and simmer for a long time. g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Галбиджим — традиционная корейская еда. Галбиджим готовят из говяжьих ребрышек. Приготовьте соус из соевого соуса, сахара, зеленого лука, чеснока, имбиря и кунжутного масла, добавьте его к мясу и долго тушите. После закипания добавьте каштаны, морковь, яйца, грибы и т. д. для украшения в разные цвета.

#######

Make a sauce with soy sauce, sugar, green onion, garlic, ginger, and sesame oil, add it to the meat, and simmer for a long time. After boiling, add chestnuts, carrots, eggs, mushrooms, etc. to decorate in various colors.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
คัลบิจิมเป็นอาหารเกาหลีแบบดั้งเดิม คัลบิจิมทำจากซี่โครงวัวปรุงรส ทำซอสด้วยซีอิ๊ว น้ำตาล ต้นหอม กระเทียม ขิง และน้ำมันงา ใส่ลงในเนื้อและเคี่ยวเป็นเวลานาน หลังจากเดือดแล้วให้ใส่เกาลัด แครอท ไข่ เห็ด ฯลฯ เพื่อตกแต่งด้วยสีต่างๆ

#######

Make a sauce with soy sauce, sugar, green onion, garlic, ginger, and sesame oil, add it to the meat, and simmer for a long time. After boiling, add chestnuts, carrots, eggs, mushrooms, etc. to decorate in various colors.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Galbijjim é uma comida tradicional coreana. Galbijjim é feito temperando costelas de boi. Faça um molho com molho de soja, açúcar, cebolinha, alho, gengibre e óleo de gergelim, acrescente à carne e cozinhe por bastante tempo. Após a fervura, acrescente castanhas, cenouras, ovos, cogumelos, etc. para decorar em várias cores.

#######

g_text_audio_translate.hi:
गैलबिज्जिम एक पारंपरिक कोरियाई भोजन है। गैलबिज्जिम गोमांस की पसलियों को मसाला देकर बनाया जाता है। सोया सॉस, चीनी, हरा प्याज, लहसुन, अदरक और तिल के तेल से सॉस बनाएं, इसे मांस में डालें और लंबे समय तक पकाएं। उबालने के बाद इसमें अखरोट, गाजर, अंडे, मशरूम आदि डालकर विभिन्न रंगों से सजाएं।

#######

After boiling, add chestnuts, carrots, eggs, mushrooms, etc. to decorate in various colors.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Galbijjim geleneksel bir Kore yemeğidir. Galbijjim dana kaburgalarının baharatlanmasıyla yapılır. Soya sosu, şeker, yeşil soğan, sarımsak, zencefil ve susam yağından sos yapıp ete ekleyin ve uzun süre pişirin. Kaynattıktan sonra çeşitli renklerde süslemek için kestane, havuç, yumurta, mantar vb. ekleyin.

general.g_text_audio: 여자: 여러분, 안녕하십니까? 5분 요리 시간입니다. 오늘은라면을 맛있게 끓이는 방법을 알려 드 리려고합니다. 여러분은 라면, 스프, 물을 언제, 어떤 순서로 넣으세요? 먼저 냄비에 물을 부 으세요. 물이 끓으면 스프와 라면을 넣으세요. 그 다음에 불을 세게 한 후 빨리 끓이세요. 그러면 라면이 더 맛있습니다. 그리고 특별 한 맛을 원하시면 라면에 계란이나 파를 넣어보세요. 내일은 맛있게 밥 짓는 법에 대해 알려 드리겠습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nữ: Xin chào tất cả mọi người.  Đây là thời gian nấu 5 phút. Hôm nay tôi sẽ hướng dẫn các bạn cách nấu mì ngon. Bạn thêm mì, súp và nước khi nào và theo thứ tự nào? Đầu tiên, hãy đổ nước vào nồi. Khi nước sôi, cho gói súp và mì vào. Sau đó vặn lửa to và đun sôi nhanh. Khi đó mì sẽ ngon hơn. Và nếu bạn muốn có một hương vị đặc biệt, hãy thử thêm trứng hoặc hành lá vào mì. Ngày mai tôi sẽ cho bạn biết làm thế nào để nấu cơm ngon.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Woman: Hello, everyone? It's a five-minute cooking time. Today, I'm going to teach you how to cook ramen deliciously. When and in what order do you put ramen, soup, and water? First, pour water into the pot. When the water boils, add the soup and ramen. Then turn the heat high and bring to a boil quickly. Then ramen tastes better. And if you want a special taste, add eggs or green onions to your ramen. Tomorrow, I will tell you how to cook delicious rice.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Ciao a tutti? Il tempo di cottura è di cinque minuti. Oggi ti insegnerò come cucinare il ramen in modo delizioso. Quando e in che ordine metti ramen, zuppa e acqua? Per prima cosa, versa l'acqua nella pentola. Quando l'acqua bolle, aggiungere la zuppa e il ramen. Poi alzate la fiamma e portate velocemente a bollore. Allora il ramen ha un sapore migliore. E se vuoi un gusto speciale, aggiungi uova o cipolle verdi al tuo ramen. Domani ti dirò come cucinare un delizioso riso.

#######

Woman: Hello, everyone? It's a five-minute cooking time. Today, I'm going to teach you how to cook ramen deliciously. When and in what order do you put ramen, soup, and water? First, pour water into the pot. When the water boils, add the soup and ramen. Then turn the heat high and bring to a boil quickly. Then ramen tastes better. And if you want a special taste, add eggs or green onions to your ramen. Tomorrow, I will tell you how to cook delicious rice.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Bonjour à tous ? C'est un temps de cuisson de cinq minutes. Aujourd'hui, je vais vous apprendre à cuisiner délicieusement des ramen. Quand et dans quel ordre mettre les ramen, la soupe et l’eau ? Tout d’abord, versez de l’eau dans la casserole. Lorsque l'eau bout, ajoutez la soupe et les ramen. Augmentez ensuite le feu et portez rapidement à ébullition. Alors les ramen ont meilleur goût. Et si vous voulez un goût particulier, ajoutez des œufs ou des oignons verts à vos ramen. Demain, je vais vous expliquer comment cuisiner un délicieux riz.

#######

Woman: Hello, everyone? It's a five-minute cooking time. Today, I'm going to teach you how to cook ramen deliciously. When and in what order do you put ramen, soup, and water? First, pour water into the pot. When the water boils, add the soup and ramen. Then turn the heat high and bring to a boil quickly. Then ramen tastes better. And if you want a special taste, add eggs or green onions to your ramen. Tomorrow, I will tell you how to cook delicious rice.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: Hola a todos? Es un tiempo de cocción de cinco minutos. Hoy te voy a enseñar a cocinar ramen delicioso. ¿Cuándo y en qué orden pones ramen, sopa y agua? Primero, vierte agua en la olla. Cuando el agua hierva, agrega la sopa y el ramen. Luego sube el fuego y deja que hierva rápidamente. Entonces el ramen sabe mejor. Y si quieres un sabor especial, agrega huevos o cebolletas a tu ramen. Mañana os contaré cómo cocinar un arroz delicioso.

#######

And if you want a special taste, add eggs or green onions to your ramen. Tomorrow, I will tell you how to cook delicious rice.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Halo semuanya? Ini waktu memasak lima menit. Hari ini, saya akan mengajari Anda cara memasak ramen yang enak. Kapan dan dalam urutan apa Anda memasukkan ramen, sup, dan air? Pertama, tuangkan air ke dalam panci. Saat air mendidih, masukkan sup dan ramen. Kemudian besarkan api dan didihkan dengan cepat. Lalu ramen terasa lebih enak. Dan jika ingin rasa yang istimewa, tambahkan telur atau daun bawang ke dalam ramen Anda. Besok saya akan kasih tahu cara memasak nasi yang enak.

g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女性: こんにちは、皆さん?調理時間は5分です。今日はラーメンの美味しい作り方を教えます。ラーメン、スープ、水をいつ、どの順番で入れますか？まず、鍋に水を注ぎます。お湯が沸騰したらスープとラーメンを加えます。次に火を強火にし、すぐに沸騰させます。そしたらラーメンも美味しくなるよ。特別な味が必要な場合は、ラーメンに卵やネギを加えてください。明日は美味しいお米の炊き方を紹介します。

#######

g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Hallo zusammen? Die Garzeit beträgt fünf Minuten. Heute werde ich Ihnen beibringen, wie man Ramen köstlich zubereitet. Wann und in welcher Reihenfolge werden Ramen, Suppe und Wasser serviert? Gießen Sie zunächst Wasser in den Topf. Wenn das Wasser kocht, fügen Sie die Suppe und die Ramen hinzu. Dann die Hitze hochdrehen und schnell zum Kochen bringen. Dann schmeckt Ramen besser. Und wenn Sie einen besonderen Geschmack wünschen, fügen Sie Ihren Ramen Eier oder Frühlingszwiebeln hinzu. Morgen erzähle ich euch, wie man leckeren Reis kocht.

g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：大家好？这是五分钟的烹饪时间。今天我就来教大家如何做美味的拉面。你什么时候放拉面、汤和水，按什么顺序放？首先，将水倒入锅中。当水沸腾时，加入汤和拉面。然后将火调高并快速煮沸。那么拉面的味道会更好。如果您想要特殊的味道，可以在拉面中添加鸡蛋或大葱。明天我会告诉你如何煮美味的米饭。

g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Привет всем? Время приготовления пять минут. Сегодня я научу вас вкусно готовить рамэн. Когда и в каком порядке вы кладете рамен, суп и воду? Сначала наливаем в кастрюлю воду. Когда вода закипит, добавьте суп и рамен. Затем увеличьте огонь и быстро доведите до кипения. Тогда рамэн будет вкуснее. А если вам хочется особого вкуса, добавьте в рамен яйца или зеленый лук. Завтра я расскажу вам, как приготовить вкусный рис.

ผู้หญิง: สวัสดีทุกคน? ใช้เวลาทำอาหารห้านาที วันนี้ฉันจะสอนวิธีทำราเมนให้อร่อย คุณใส่ราเมน ซุป และน้ำตามลำดับเมื่อไหร่และอย่างไร? ขั้นแรกให้เทน้ำลงในหม้อ เมื่อน้ำเดือด ใส่ซุปและราเมนลงไป จากนั้นเปิดไฟให้สูงและนำไปต้มอย่างรวดเร็ว ถ้าอย่างนั้นราเมนก็จะได้รสชาติดีขึ้น และถ้าคุณต้องการรสชาติพิเศษ ให้เพิ่มไข่หรือต้นหอมลงในราเมนของคุณ พรุ่งนี้จะมาบอกวิธีหุงข้าวอร่อยๆ

g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Olá a todos? É um tempo de cozimento de cinco minutos. Hoje vou te ensinar como cozinhar ramen deliciosamente. Quando e em que ordem você coloca ramen, sopa e água? Primeiro, coloque água na panela. Quando a água ferver, acrescente a sopa e o ramen. Em seguida, aumente o fogo e deixe ferver rapidamente. Então o ramen fica mais gostoso. E se quiser um sabor especial, acrescente ovos ou cebolinha ao seu ramen. Amanhã vou te contar como fazer um arroz delicioso.

#######

Woman: Hello, everyone? It's a five-minute cooking time. Today, I'm going to teach you how to cook ramen deliciously. When and in what order do you put ramen, soup, and water? First, pour water into the pot. When the water boils, add the soup and ramen. Then turn the heat high and bring to a boil quickly. Then ramen tastes better. And if you want a special taste, add eggs or green onions to your ramen. Tomorrow, I will tell you how to cook delicious rice.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: हेलो, सबको? खाना पकाने का समय पाँच मिनट है। आज, मैं आपको रेमन को स्वादिष्ट तरीके से पकाना सिखाने जा रहा हूँ। आप रेमन, सूप और पानी कब और किस क्रम में डालते हैं? सबसे पहले बर्तन में पानी डालें. जब पानी उबल जाए तो इसमें सूप और रेमन डालें। फिर आंच तेज़ कर दें और जल्दी से उबाल लें। तब रेमन का स्वाद बेहतर होता है। और यदि आप एक विशेष स्वाद चाहते हैं, तो अपने रेमन में अंडे या हरा प्याज मिलाएं। कल मैं तुम्हें स्वादिष्ट चावल बनाना बताऊँगी।

#######

Woman: Hello, everyone? It's a five-minute cooking time. Today, I'm going to teach you how to cook ramen deliciously. When and in what order do you put ramen, soup, and water? First, pour water into the pot. When the water boils, add the soup and ramen. Then turn the heat high and bring to a boil quickly. Then ramen tastes better. And if you want a special taste, add eggs or green onions to your ramen. Tomorrow, I will tell you how to cook delicious rice.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Herkese merhaba? Beş dakikalık bir pişirme süresi. Bugün size lezzetli ramen pişirmeyi öğreteceğim. Ramen, çorba ve suyu ne zaman ve hangi sırayla koyarsınız? Öncelikle tencereye su dökün. Su kaynayınca çorbayı ve rameni ekleyin. Daha sonra ateşi yüksek seviyeye getirin ve hızlıca kaynatın. O zaman ramen daha lezzetli olur. Özel bir tat istiyorsanız rameninize yumurta veya yeşil soğan ekleyin. Yarın size lezzetli pilavın nasıl pişirileceğini anlatacağım.

#######

Woman: Hello, everyone? It's a five-minute cooking time. Today, I'm going to teach you how to cook ramen deliciously. When and in what order do you put ramen, soup, and water? First, pour water into the pot. When the water boils, add the soup and ramen. Then turn the heat high and bring to a boil quickly. Then ramen tastes better. And if you want a special taste, add eggs or green onions to your ramen. Tomorrow, I will tell you how to cook delicious rice.

3. Para ferver o ramen deliciosamente, você precisa adicionar água, sopa e ramen nesta ordem.
4. Para deixar o ramen delicioso, a sopa deve ser colocada em água fria.
--------------------
<g>끓다:</g>Para ficar fervendo
<g>넣다:</g>Para colocar

Primeiro, coloque água na panela. Quando a água ferver, acrescente a sopa e o ramen.

#######

Choose the one that is similar to what you heard.
1. Ramen is delicious when you boil it for a long time.
2. It is better not to add anything to preserve the taste of ramen.
3. To boil ramen deliciously, you need to add water, soup, and ramen in that order.
4. To make the ramen delicious, the soup must be put in cold water.

<g>넣다:</g> To put in

explain.hi:
वह चुनें जो आपने जो सुना है उसके समान हो।
1. रेमन को लंबे समय तक उबालने पर वह स्वादिष्ट बनता है।
2. रेमन का स्वाद बरकरार रखने के लिए इसमें कुछ भी न मिलाना बेहतर है।
3. रेमन को स्वादिष्ट तरीके से उबालने के लिए, आपको उसी क्रम में पानी, सूप और रेमन मिलाना होगा।
4. रेमन को स्वादिष्ट बनाने के लिए सूप को ठंडे पानी में डालना चाहिए.
------------------------

<g>넣다:</g>इसमें रखने क लिए

explain.tr:
Duyduklarınıza benzer olanı seçin.
1. Ramen uzun süre kaynatıldığında lezzetli olur.
2. Ramenin tadını korumak için hiçbir şey eklememek daha iyidir.
3. Rameni lezzetli bir şekilde haşlamak için sırasıyla su, çorba ve rameni eklemeniz gerekir.
4. Ramenin lezzetli olması için çorbanın soğuk suya konulması gerekir.
--------------------
<g>끓다:</g>Kaynayan bir sıcaklığa gelmek
<g>넣다:</g>İçine koymak

Öncelikle tencereye su dökün. Su kaynayınca çorbayı ve rameni ekleyin.

general.g_text_audio: 남자: 안녕하세요. '5분의 건강'의 강민희입니다. 요즘 독감이 유행이지요? 오늘은 여러분께 독감을 예방하는 방법에 대해 말씀드리겠습니다. 독감 바이러스는 공기로 전염됩니다. 독감에 걸리지 않으려면 손발을 항상 깨끗이 씻어야 합니다. 그리고 독감은 눈으로 전염될 수도 있습니다. 씻지 않은 손으로 눈을 비비거나 코나 입을 만지지 않도록 주의하세요. 또 사람이 많은 곳은 피하도록 하십시오. 외출할 때 반드시 마스크를 쓰도록 하세요. 독감을 예방하기 위해서는 먹는 것도 중요합니다. 비타민C 영양제나 과일 등을 많이 드시고 몸이 피곤하지 않도록 쉬세요. 지금까지 5분 건강이었습니다. 안녕히 계십시오.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nam: Xin chào. Đây là Kang Min Hee từ '5 phút khỏe mạnh'. Dạo này, bệnh cúm đang hoành hành. Hôm nay tôi sẽ cho các bạn biết cách để ngăn ngừa bệnh cúm. Vi rút cúm lây lan trong không khí. Để tránh bị cúm, hãy luôn rửa tay và chân thật sạch. Bệnh cúm cũng có thể lây truyền qua mắt. Hãy chú ý không dụi mắt hoặc chạm vào mũi hoặc miệng bằng tay chưa rửa sạch. Ngoài ra, hãy tránh những nơi đông người. Nhớ đeo khẩu trang khi ra ngoài. Việc ăn uống cũng rất quan trọng để ngăn ngừa cảm cúm. Ăn nhiều thực phẩm bổ sung vitamin C hoặc hoa quả và nghỉ ngơi để cơ thể không bị mệt mỏi. Vừa rồi là '5 phút khỏe mạnh'. Tạm biệt.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: Hello. This is Kang Min-hee from '5 Minutes of Health'. The flu is going around these days, right? Today I'm going to tell you how to prevent the flu. The flu virus is spread through the air. You should always wash your hands and feet thoroughly to avoid getting the flu. The flu can also be transmitted through the eyes. Be careful not to rub your eyes or touch your nose or mouth with unwashed hands. Also, avoid crowded places. Make sure to wear a mask when going out. Eating is also important to prevent the flu. Take a lot of vitamin C supplements or fruits and rest so that you don't get tired. So far it has been '5 Minutes of Health'. Good bye.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Ciao. Questo è Kang Min-hee di "5 Minuti di Salute". C'è l'influenza in questi giorni, vero? Oggi vi dirò come prevenire l'influenza. Il virus dell’influenza si diffonde attraverso l’aria. Dovresti sempre lavarti accuratamente mani e piedi per evitare di prendere l'influenza. L'influenza può essere trasmessa anche attraverso gli occhi. Fare attenzione a non strofinarsi gli occhi e a non toccarsi il naso o la bocca con le mani non lavate. Inoltre, evita i luoghi affollati. Assicurati di indossare una maschera quando esci. Mangiare è importante anche per prevenire l’influenza. Prendi molti integratori di vitamina C o frutta e riposati per non stancarti. Finora sono stati "5 minuti di salute". Arrivederci.

#######

g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Bonjour. Voici Kang Min-hee de « 5 Minutes de Santé ». La grippe circule ces jours-ci, n'est-ce pas ? Aujourd'hui, je vais vous expliquer comment prévenir la grippe. Le virus de la grippe se propage par voie aérienne. Vous devez toujours vous laver soigneusement les mains et les pieds pour éviter de contracter la grippe. La grippe peut également se transmettre par les yeux. Faites attention de ne pas vous frotter les yeux ni de toucher votre nez ou votre bouche avec les mains non lavées. Évitez également les endroits très fréquentés. Assurez-vous de porter un masque lorsque vous sortez. Manger est également important pour prévenir la grippe. Prenez beaucoup de suppléments de vitamine C ou de fruits et reposez-vous pour ne pas vous fatiguer. Jusqu'à présent, il s'agissait de « 5 minutes de santé ». Au revoir.

g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Hola. Este es Kang Min-hee de '5 Minutos de Salud'. La gripe anda por ahí estos días, ¿verdad? Hoy os voy a contar cómo prevenir la gripe. El virus de la gripe se transmite por el aire. Siempre debes lavarte bien las manos y los pies para evitar contraer la gripe. La gripe también se puede transmitir a través de los ojos. Tenga cuidado de no frotarse los ojos ni tocarse la nariz o la boca con las manos sucias. Además, evite los lugares concurridos. Asegúrate de usar una máscara al salir. Comer también es importante para prevenir la gripe. Toma muchos suplementos de vitamina C o frutas y descansa para no cansarte. Hasta ahora han sido '5 Minutos de Salud'. Adiós.

Anda harus selalu mencuci tangan dan kaki dengan bersih untuk menghindari flu. Flu juga bisa menular melalui mata. Berhati-hatilah untuk tidak menggosok mata atau menyentuh hidung atau mulut dengan tangan yang belum dicuci. Selain itu, hindari tempat keramaian. Pastikan untuk memakai masker saat keluar. Das Grippevirus wird über die Luft verbreitet. Sie sollten Ihre Hände und Füße immer gründlich waschen, um einer Grippe vorzubeugen. Die Grippe kann auch über die Augen übertragen werden. g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：你好。我是《健康五分钟》中的姜敏熙。这几天流感流行吧？今天小编就来给大家介绍一下如何预防流感。流感病毒通过空气传播。您应该经常彻底洗手和洗脚，以避免感染流感。流感还可以通过眼睛传播。小心不要用未洗过的手揉眼睛或触摸鼻子或嘴巴。另外，避免去人多的地方。外出时务必佩戴口罩。饮食对于预防流感也很重要。多吃维生素C补充剂或水果并休息，这样就不会感到疲倦。到目前为止，已经是“健康五分钟”了。再见。

g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Здравствуйте. Это Кан Мин Хи из «5 минут здоровья». Сейчас грипп распространяется, верно? Сегодня я расскажу вам, как предотвратить грипп. Вирус гриппа распространяется воздушно-капельным путем. Всегда следует тщательно мыть руки и ноги, чтобы не заразиться гриппом. Грипп также может передаваться через глаза. Будьте осторожны, не трите глаза и не прикасайтесь к носу или рту немытыми руками. Также избегайте людных мест. Обязательно надевайте маску, выходя на улицу. Питание также важно для предотвращения гриппа. Принимайте много добавок витамина С или фруктов и отдыхайте, чтобы не уставать. До сих пор это были «5 минут здоровья». До свидания.

g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: สวัสดี. นี่คือคังมินฮีจาก '5 Minutes of Health' ช่วงนี้ไข้หวัดใหญ่กำลังระบาดใช่ไหม? วันนี้ผมจะมาบอกวิธีป้องกันไข้หวัดใหญ่ ไวรัสไข้หวัดใหญ่แพร่กระจายผ่านอากาศ คุณควรล้างมือและเท้าให้สะอาดอยู่เสมอเพื่อหลีกเลี่ยงการเป็นไข้หวัดใหญ่ ไข้หวัดใหญ่ยังสามารถติดต่อผ่านทางดวงตาได้ ระวังอย่าขยี้ตาหรือสัมผัสจมูกหรือปากด้วยมือที่ไม่ได้ล้าง นอกจากนี้ควรหลีกเลี่ยงสถานที่แออัด อย่าลืมสวมหน้ากากอนามัยเมื่อออกไปข้างนอก การรับประทานอาหารก็เป็นสิ่งสำคัญในการป้องกันไข้หวัดใหญ่ ทานอาหารเสริมวิตามินซีหรือผลไม้เยอะๆ แล้วพักผ่อน จะได้ไม่เหนื่อย จนถึงขณะนี้เป็น '5 นาทีแห่งสุขภาพ' ลาก่อน.

g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Olá. Este é Kang Min-hee de '5 Minutos de Saúde'. A gripe está circulando hoje em dia, certo? Hoje vou te contar como prevenir a gripe. O vírus da gripe se espalha pelo ar. Você deve sempre lavar bem as mãos e os pés para evitar gripe. A gripe também pode ser transmitida pelos olhos. Tenha cuidado para não esfregar os olhos ou tocar o nariz ou a boca com as mãos não lavadas. Além disso, evite lugares lotados. Certifique-se de usar uma máscara ao sair. A alimentação também é importante para prevenir a gripe. Tome muitos suplementos de vitamina C ou frutas e descanse para não se cansar. Até agora foram ‘5 Minutos de Saúde’. Adeus.

g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: हेलो. यह '5 मिनट्स ऑफ हेल्थ' से कांग मिन-ही हैं। इन दिनों फ्लू चल रहा है, है ना? आज मैं आपको बताने जा रहा हूं कि फ्लू से कैसे बचा जाए। फ्लू का वायरस हवा के माध्यम से फैलता है। फ्लू से बचने के लिए आपको हमेशा अपने हाथ और पैर अच्छी तरह से धोने चाहिए। फ्लू आंखों के जरिए भी फैल सकता है। सावधान रहें कि अपनी आँखों को न रगड़ें या बिना धोए हाथों से अपनी नाक या मुँह को न छुएँ। साथ ही भीड़-भाड़ वाली जगहों से बचें। बाहर निकलते समय मास्क अवश्य पहनें। फ्लू से बचाव के लिए भोजन करना भी महत्वपूर्ण है। खूब विटामिन सी सप्लीमेंट या फल लें और आराम करें ताकि आपको थकान न हो। अब तक यह 'सेहत के 5 मिनट' रहे हैं। अलविदा।

#######

Man: Hello. This is Kang Min-hee from '5 Minutes of Health'. The flu is going around these days, right? Today I'm going to tell you how to prevent the flu. The flu virus is spread through the air. You should always wash your hands and feet thoroughly to avoid getting the flu. The flu can also be transmitted through the eyes. Be careful not to rub your eyes or touch your nose or mouth with unwashed hands. Also, avoid crowded places. Make sure to wear a mask when going out. Eating is also important to prevent the flu. Take a lot of vitamin C supplements or fruits and rest so that you don't get tired. So far it has been '5 Minutes of Health'. Good bye.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Merhaba. Ben '5 Dakika Sağlık'tan Kang Min-hee. Grip bu aralar ortalıkta dolaşıyor, değil mi? Bugün size gribin nasıl önleneceğini anlatacağım. Grip virüsü hava yoluyla yayılır. Gribe yakalanmamak için ellerinizi ve ayaklarınızı daima iyice yıkamalısınız. Grip göz yoluyla da bulaşabilir. Yıkanmamış ellerle gözlerinizi ovmamaya veya burnunuza veya ağzınıza dokunmamaya dikkat edin. Ayrıca kalabalık yerlerden kaçının. Dışarı çıkarken mutlaka maske takın. Gripten korunmak için yemek yemek de önemlidir. Bol miktarda C vitamini takviyesi veya meyve alın ve dinlenin ki yorulmayın. Şu ana kadar '5 Dakika Sağlık' oldu. Güle güle.

#######

Man: Hello. This is Kang Min-hee from '5 Minutes of Health'. The flu is going around these days, right? Today I'm going to tell you how to prevent the flu. The flu virus is spread through the air. You should always wash your hands and feet thoroughly to avoid getting the flu. The flu can also be transmitted through the eyes. Be careful not to rub your eyes or touch your nose or mouth with unwashed hands. Also, avoid crowded places. Make sure to wear a mask when going out. Eating is also important to prevent the flu. Take a lot of vitamin C supplements or fruits and rest so that you don't get tired. So far it has been '5 Minutes of Health'. Good bye.

general.g_text_audio: 화장실 근처에서 잃어버린 가방을 찾습니다. 주머니마다 지퍼장식이 있는 까만색 가방입니다. 가방 안에는 회색 수첩과 하양색 손수건, 책 한 권이 있습니다. 수첩 안에는 학생증이 있습니다. 이 가방을 보시거나 가지고 있는 분은 정문에 있는 데스크나 방송실로 연락 주십시오.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Tìm chiếc túi bị mất gần nhà vệ sinh. Nó là một chiếc túi màu đen được trang trí khóa kéo mỗi ngăn túi. Bên trong cặp có một cuốn sổ màu xám, một chiếc khăn tay màu trắng và một cuốn sách. Bên trong cuốn sổ là thẻ sinh viên. Nếu bạn thấy hoặc giữ chiếc túi này, vui lòng liên hệ với bàn ở cổng chính hoặc phòng phát thanh.

C'è un ID studente nel taccuino. Se vedete o conservate questa borsa, contattate lo sportello all'ingresso principale o nella sala di trasmissione.

general.g_text_audio: 여자: 안녕하세요. 아침 교통 정보입니다. 지금 이 시각 안개 때문에 길이 많이 막힙니다. 특히 김포공항 방향 올림픽대로가 가장 많이 막힙니다. 올림픽대로로 해서 가시면 시간이 많이 걸릴 테니까 피하시는 것이 좋겠습니다. 오늘 오후에는 서울 시청 앞에서 행사가 있습니다. 다라서 오후부터 시청 주변의 길을 막을 겁니다. 시청 쪽으로 가시는 분들은 참고하십시오. 안전 운전 하시기를 바랍니다. 지금까지 교통 방송 이유진이었습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nữ: Xin chào. Đây là thông tin giao thông buổi sáng. Đường lúc này rất tắc vì sương mù. Trong đó, đại lộ Olympic hướng đến sân bay Gimpo bị tắc nghẽn nhiều nhất. Sẽ mất rất nhiều thời gian để đi trên đại lộ Olympic, vì vậy các bạn nên tránh đi. Vào chiều nay sẽ có một sự kiện ở phía trước tòa thị chính Seoul. Từ buổi chiều đường ở xung quanh tòa thị chính sẽ bị chặn. Nếu bạn sẽ đi về phía tòa thị chính thì xin hãy lưu ý. Mong mọi người hãy lái xe an toàn. Vừa rồi là Lee Yu Jin của chương trình giao thông.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Woman: Hello. Here's the morning traffic information. There's a lot of traffic because of the fog at this time. In particular, Olympic Boulevard in the direction of Gimpo Airport is the most congested. It will take a lot of time if you go to Olympic Boulevard, so you should avoid it. There is an event in front of Seoul City Hall this afternoon. Therefore, the road around City Hall will be blocked from the afternoon. If you're going to the City Hall, please refer to it. I hope you drive safely. Until now, it was Lee Yoo-jin of traffic broadcasting.
g_text_audio_translate.it:

C'è un evento davanti al municipio di Seoul questo pomeriggio. Pertanto dal pomeriggio la strada attorno al municipio sarà bloccata. Se andate al municipio fate riferimento ad esso. Spero che guiderai in sicurezza. Fino ad ora, era Lee Yoo-jin della radiodiffusione del traffico.

Cela prendra beaucoup de temps si vous vous rendez sur le boulevard olympique, vous devriez donc l'éviter. Il y a un événement devant l'hôtel de ville de Séoul cet après-midi. La route autour de l’Hôtel de Ville sera donc bloquée à partir de l’après-midi. Si vous vous rendez à la Mairie, merci de vous y référer. J'espère que vous conduisez prudemment. Jusqu'à présent, c'était Lee Yoo-jin de la diffusion routière.

महिला: हेलो. यहां सुबह की यातायात जानकारी है। इस समय कोहरे की वजह से ट्रैफिक बहुत ज्यादा है. विशेष रूप से, जिम्पो हवाई अड्डे की दिशा में ओलंपिक बुलेवार्ड सबसे अधिक भीड़भाड़ वाला है। यदि आप ओलिंपिक बुलेवार्ड जाते हैं तो इसमें बहुत समय लगेगा, इसलिए आपको इससे बचना चाहिए। आज दोपहर सियोल सिटी हॉल के सामने एक कार्यक्रम है। इसलिए, दोपहर से सिटी हॉल के आसपास की सड़क को अवरुद्ध कर दिया जाएगा। यदि आप सिटी हॉल जा रहे हैं, तो कृपया इसे देखें। मुझे आशा है कि आप सुरक्षित रूप से गाड़ी चलाएंगे। अब तक, यह ट्रैफ़िक प्रसारण का ली यू-जिन था।

#######

Woman: Hello. Here's the morning traffic information. There's a lot of traffic because of the fog at this time. In particular, Olympic Boulevard in the direction of Gimpo Airport is the most congested. It will take a lot of time if you go to Olympic Boulevard, so you should avoid it. There is an event in front of Seoul City Hall this afternoon. Therefore, the road around City Hall will be blocked from the afternoon. If you're going to the City Hall, please refer to it. I hope you drive safely. Until now, it was Lee Yoo-jin of traffic broadcasting.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Merhaba. İşte sabah trafik bilgileri. Bu saatlerde sis nedeniyle trafik yoğunluğu yaşanıyor. Özellikle Gimpo Havaalanı yönündeki Olimpiyat Bulvarı en sıkışık olanıdır. Olimpiyat Bulvarı'na giderseniz çok zaman alacaktır, o yüzden bundan kaçınmalısınız. Bu öğleden sonra Seul Belediye Binası önünde bir etkinlik var. Bu nedenle öğleden sonra Belediye Binası çevresindeki yol trafiğe kapatılacak. Eğer belediyeye gidecekseniz lütfen ona bakın. Umarım güvenli bir şekilde sürersiniz. Şimdiye kadar trafik yayıncılığından sorumlu Lee Yoo-jin'di.

#######

Woman: Hello. Here's the morning traffic information. There's a lot of traffic because of the fog at this time. In particular, Olympic Boulevard in the direction of Gimpo Airport is the most congested. It will take a lot of time if you go to Olympic Boulevard, so you should avoid it. There is an event in front of Seoul City Hall this afternoon. Therefore, the road around City Hall will be blocked from the afternoon. If you're going to the City Hall, please refer to it. I hope you drive safely. Until now, it was Lee Yoo-jin of traffic broadcasting.

1. आज सुबह सिटी हॉल के सामने एक कार्यक्रम है।
2. जिम्पो हवाई अड्डे पर एक कार्यक्रम है, इसलिए सड़क अवरुद्ध है।
3. ओलिंपिक बुलेवार्ड के साथ न जाना ही बेहतर है।
4. कोहरे की वजह से सिटी हॉल के सामने की सड़क जाम हो गई है.
------------------------
<g>피하다:</g>कन्नी काटना

<g>V/A + (으)ㄹ 테니까:</g>सुझाव या सलाह के लिए कारण बताते थे।

महिला ओलिंपिक बुलेवर्ड में जाने से बचने की सलाह देती है.

#######

Choose the correct answer to what you have heard.
1. There is an event in front of City Hall this morning.
2. There is an event at Gimpo Airport, so the road is blocked.
3. It is better not to go along Olympic Boulevard.
4. Because of the fog, the road in front of City Hall is blocked.
--------------------
<g>피하다:</g> To avoid 

<g>V/A + (으)ㄹ 테니까:</g> Used to give reason for suggestion or advice.

The woman advises avoiding going to Olympic Boulevard.
explain.tr:
Duyduklarınıza göre doğru cevabı seçin.
1. Bu sabah Belediye Binası önünde bir etkinlik var.
2. Gimpo Havalimanı'nda bir olay olduğu için yol kapandı.
3. Olimpiyat Bulvarı boyunca gitmemek daha iyidir.
4. Sis nedeniyle Belediye Binası önündeki yol kapandı.
--------------------
<g>피하다:</g>Kaçınmak

<g>V/A + (으)ㄹ 테니까:</g>Öneri veya tavsiyenin nedenini belirtmek için kullanılır.

Kadın Olimpiyat Bulvarı'na gitmekten kaçınmayı tavsiye ediyor.

The woman advises avoiding going to Olympic Boulevard.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 마이클 씨, 주말에 뭐 할 거예요?
남자: 친구들하고 북한산으로 등산을 갈 거예요. 수미 씨도 같이 가요.
여자: 그래요? 같이 가도 돼요?
남자: 그럼요. 등산도 하고 내려와서 맛있는 점심도 같이 먹어요. 토요일 아침 9시까지 회사 앞으로 오세요. 거기에서 같이 떠나요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Michael này, cuối tuần cậu sẽ làm gì?
Nam: Tớ định đi leo núi ở núi Bukhan cùng với bạn. Sumi cũng đi cùng đi.
Nữ: Thật sao? Tớ đi cùng được chứ?
Nam: Đương nhiên rồi. Chúng ta đi leo núi rồi sẽ cùng nhau ăn một bữa trưa thật ngon nữa. Thứ bảy cậu đến trước cửa công ty trước 9 giờ nhé. Chúng ta sẽ cùng nhau xuất phát ở đó.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Female: Michael, what are you going to do on the weekend?
Male: I will go hiking with my friends to Mt. Bukhan. Sumi will also go with you.
Female: Is it? Can I go with you?
Male: Sure. After hiking and descending, we have a delicious lunch together. Please come to the office by 9 a.m on Saturday morning. Let's go there together.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Femmina: Michael, cosa farai nel fine settimana?
Maschio: Farò un'escursione con i miei amici sul monte Bukhan. Anche Sumi verrà con te.
Femmina: Davvero? Posso venire con te?
Maschio: Certo. Dopo l'escursione e la discesa, pranzeremo insieme in modo delizioso. Si prega di presentarsi in ufficio entro le ore 9 di sabato mattina. Andiamo lì insieme.

#######

Female: Michael, what are you going to do on the weekend?

Female: Is it? Can I go with you?
Male: Sure. After hiking and descending, we have a delicious lunch together. Please come to the office by 9 a.m on Saturday morning. Let's go there together.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Michael, qu'est-ce que tu vas faire ce week-end ?
Homme : Je vais faire de la randonnée avec mes amis jusqu'au mont Bukhan. Sumi vous accompagnera également.
Femme : Vraiment ? Puis-je venir avec toi?
Homme : Bien sûr. Après la randonnée et la descente, nous prenons un délicieux déjeuner ensemble. Merci de vous présenter au bureau avant 9h le samedi matin. Allons-y ensemble.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 수미 씨의 꿈은 뭐예요?
여자: 내 꿈은 세계 여러 나라 사람들이 모두 좋아하는 요리를 만드는 거예요. 그래서 대학에서 요리를 배우고 있어요.
남자: 어, 그러면 나중에 식당 같은 곳에서 일하는 거예요?
여자: 네, 학교를 졸업하면 한국의 전통 음식점에서 일을 배울 거예요. 그런데 세계적인 요리사가 되려면 한국 음식하고 외국 음식을 모두 잘 만들어야 해요. 그래서 외국에 가서 공부도 할 거예요. 나중에 최고의 요리사가 되면 요리책을 쓰고 싶어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Ước mơ của Sumi là gì?
Nữ: Ước mơ của tớ là làm ra món ăn mà tất cả mọi người ở các quốc gia trên thế giới đều thích. Vì vậy tớ đang học nấu ăn ở trường đại học.
Nam: Ồ, vậy thì sau này cậu định làm việc ở những nơi như nhà hàng nhỉ?
Nữ: Đúng vậy, sau khi tốt nghiệp tớ sẽ đi học việc tại nhà hàng truyền thống Hàn Quốc. Nhưng nếu muốn trở thành đầu bếp quốc tế thì phải nấu giỏi các món Hàn và các món ăn của nước ngoài nữa. Vì vậy tớ định đi ra nước ngoài học. Sau này khi trở thành đầu bếp giỏi nhất rồi thì tớ sẽ viết sách dạy nấu ăn.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Male: What is Su-mi's dream?
Female: My dream is to cook dishes that people from all over the world love. So I'm studying cooking in college.
Male: Oh, so you're going to work in a restaurant or something later?
Female: Yes, when I graduate from school, I will learn to work in a traditional Korean restaurant. But to become a world-class chef, you have to cook both Korean and foreign food well. So, I will go abroad to study. When I become a top chef in the future, I want to write a cookbook.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Maschio: Qual è il sogno di Su-mi?
Femmina: Il mio sogno è cucinare piatti che le persone di tutto il mondo amano. Quindi sto studiando cucina al college.
Maschio: Oh, quindi lavorerai in un ristorante o qualcosa del genere più tardi?
Femmina: Sì, quando mi diplomerò, imparerò a lavorare in un ristorante tradizionale coreano. Ma per diventare uno chef di livello mondiale, devi cucinare bene sia il cibo coreano che quello straniero. Quindi andrò all'estero per studiare. Quando diventerò un grande chef in futuro, voglio scrivere un libro di cucina.

#######

Male: What is Su-mi's dream?
Female: My dream is to cook dishes that people from all over the world love. So I'm studying cooking in college.
Male: Oh, so you're going to work in a restaurant or something later?
Female: Yes, when I graduate from school, I will learn to work in a traditional Korean restaurant. But to become a world-class chef, you have to cook both Korean and foreign food well. So, I will go abroad to study. When I become a top chef in the future, I want to write a cookbook.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Quel est le rêve de Su-mi ?
Femme : Mon rêve est de cuisiner des plats que les gens du monde entier adorent. Donc j'étudie la cuisine à l'université.
Homme : Oh, alors tu vas travailler dans un restaurant ou quelque chose comme ça plus tard ?
Femme : Oui, quand je serai diplômée, j'apprendrai à travailler dans un restaurant coréen traditionnel. Mais pour devenir un chef de classe mondiale, vous devez bien cuisiner les plats coréens et étrangers. Donc, je vais aller étudier à l'étranger. Quand je deviendrai un grand chef à l'avenir, je veux écrire un livre de cuisine.

#######

Female: Yes, when I graduate from school, I will learn to work in a traditional Korean restaurant. But to become a world-class chef, you have to cook both Korean and foreign food well. So, I will go abroad to study. When I become a top chef in the future, I want to write a cookbook.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: ¿Cuál es el sueño de Su-mi?
Mujer: Mi sueño es cocinar platos que le encanten a la gente de todo el mundo. Así que estoy estudiando cocina en la universidad.
Hombre: Ah, ¿entonces vas a trabajar en un restaurante o algo más tarde?
Mujer: Sí, cuando me gradúe de la escuela, aprenderé a trabajar en un restaurante tradicional coreano. Pero para convertirse en un chef de clase mundial, debe cocinar bien tanto la comida coreana como la extranjera. Entonces, me iré al extranjero a estudiar. Cuando me convierta en un gran chef en el futuro, quiero escribir un libro de cocina.

g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Apa mimpi Su-mi?
Wanita: Impian saya adalah memasak hidangan yang disukai orang-orang dari seluruh dunia. Jadi saya belajar memasak di perguruan tinggi.
Pria: Oh, jadi kamu akan bekerja di restoran atau semacamnya nanti?
Wanita: Ya, ketika saya lulus dari sekolah, saya akan belajar bekerja di restoran tradisional Korea. Tetapi untuk menjadi koki kelas dunia, Anda harus memasak makanan Korea dan asing dengan baik. Jadi, saya akan pergi ke luar negeri untuk belajar. Ketika saya menjadi koki top di masa depan, saya ingin menulis buku masak.

g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男：スミの夢は？
女性：私の夢は、世界中の人に愛される料理を作ることです。だから大学で料理を勉強しています。
男性：あ、じゃあ、後でレストランか何かで働くんですか？
女性:はい、学校を卒業したら、伝統的な韓国料理店で働くことを学びます。しかし、世界クラスのシェフになるには、韓国料理と外国料理の両方を上手に調理する必要があります。というわけで、留学に行きます。将来トップシェフになったら、料理本を書きたいです。

Männlich: Was ist Su-mis Traum?
Weiblich: Mein Traum ist es, Gerichte zu kochen, die Menschen auf der ganzen Welt lieben. Also studiere ich Kochen im College.
Mann: Oh, also wirst du später in einem Restaurant oder so arbeiten?
Weiblich: Ja, wenn ich die Schule abgeschlossen habe, werde ich lernen, in einem traditionellen koreanischen Restaurant zu arbeiten. Aber um ein Weltklasse-Koch zu werden, muss man sowohl koreanisches als auch ausländisches Essen gut zubereiten. Also werde ich ins Ausland gehen, um zu studieren. Wenn ich in Zukunft Spitzenkoch werde, will ich ein Kochbuch schreiben.

Female: Yes, when I graduate from school, I will learn to work in a traditional Korean restaurant. But to become a world-class chef, you have to cook both Korean and foreign food well. So, I will go abroad to study. When I become a top chef in the future, I want to write a cookbook.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: О чем мечта Су-ми?
Женщина: Моя мечта – готовить блюда, которые любят люди со всего мира. Итак, я учусь кулинарии в колледже.
Мужчина: О, так ты собираешься позже работать в ресторане или где-то еще?
Женщина: Да, когда я закончу школу, я научусь работать в традиционном корейском ресторане. Но чтобы стать шеф-поваром мирового уровня, нужно хорошо готовить как корейскую, так и зарубежную еду. Итак, я поеду учиться за границу. Когда в будущем я стану лучшим шеф-поваром, я хочу написать кулинарную книгу.

#######

g_text_audio_translate.th:
ชาย: ความฝันของซูมิคืออะไร?
หญิง: ความฝันของฉันคือทำอาหารที่คนทั่วโลกชื่นชอบ ดังนั้นฉันจึงเรียนทำอาหารในวิทยาลัย
ชาย: อ๋อ แล้วคุณจะไปทำงานในร้านอาหารหรืออะไรทีหลังล่ะ?
ผู้หญิง: ใช่ค่ะ พอเรียนจบก็จะได้เรียนทำงานในร้านอาหารเกาหลีแบบดั้งเดิมค่ะ แต่การจะเป็นเชฟระดับโลกได้นั้นต้องทำอาหารทั้งเกาหลีและต่างประเทศให้เก่ง ดังนั้นฉันจะไปเรียนต่อต่างประเทศ เมื่อฉันกลายเป็นเชฟชั้นนำในอนาคต ฉันอยากจะเขียนตำราอาหาร

#######

Male: What is Su-mi's dream?
Female: My dream is to cook dishes that people from all over the world love. So I'm studying cooking in college.
Male: Oh, so you're going to work in a restaurant or something later?
Female: Yes, when I graduate from school, I will learn to work in a traditional Korean restaurant. But to become a world-class chef, you have to cook both Korean and foreign food well. So, I will go abroad to study. When I become a top chef in the future, I want to write a cookbook.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Masculino: Qual é o sonho de Su-mi?
Mulher: Meu sonho é preparar pratos que pessoas de todo o mundo adorem. Então, estou estudando culinária na faculdade.
Masculino: Ah, então você vai trabalhar em um restaurante ou algo assim mais tarde?
Mulher: Sim, quando eu me formar na escola, aprenderei a trabalhar em um restaurante tradicional coreano. Mas para se tornar um chef de classe mundial, você precisa cozinhar bem a comida coreana e estrangeira. Então, irei para o exterior estudar. Quando eu me tornar um chef de destaque no futuro, quero escrever um livro de receitas.

#######

g_text_audio_translate.hi:
पुरुष: सु-मी का सपना क्या है?
महिला: मेरा सपना ऐसे व्यंजन पकाने का है जो दुनिया भर के लोगों को पसंद हों। इसलिए मैं कॉलेज में खाना बनाना सीख रही हूं।
पुरुष: ओह, तो आप किसी रेस्तरां में काम करने जा रहे हैं या बाद में कुछ और?
महिला: हां, जब मैं स्कूल से स्नातक हो जाऊंगी, तो मैं एक पारंपरिक कोरियाई रेस्तरां में काम करना सीखूंगी। लेकिन विश्व स्तरीय शेफ बनने के लिए आपको कोरियाई और विदेशी दोनों तरह का खाना अच्छे से पकाना होगा। इसलिए, मैं पढ़ाई के लिए विदेश जाऊंगा।' जब मैं भविष्य में एक शीर्ष शेफ बन जाऊंगा, तो मैं एक कुकबुक लिखना चाहता हूं।

#######

g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Erkek: Su-mi'nin rüyası nedir?
Kadın: Hayalim dünyanın her yerinden insanların sevdiği yemekleri pişirmek. Bu yüzden üniversitede aşçılık okuyorum.
Erkek: Ah, yani daha sonra bir restoranda falan mı çalışacaksın?
Kadın: Evet, okuldan mezun olduğumda geleneksel bir Kore restoranında çalışmayı öğreneceğim. Ancak birinci sınıf bir şef olmak için hem Kore hem de yabancı yemekleri iyi pişirmeniz gerekiyor. Bu yüzden yurt dışına okumaya gideceğim. Gelecekte iyi bir şef olduğumda bir yemek kitabı yazmak istiyorum.

4. A mulher estuda culinária na universidade.

#######

Select the content that matches the audio being heard.
1. The woman is working in a restaurant now.
2. The man will write a lot of cookbooks.
3. The man and the woman will go abroad together.
4. The woman studies cooking at the university.
explain.hi:
उस सामग्री का चयन करें जो सुने जा रहे ऑडियो से मेल खाती हो।
1. महिला अब एक रेस्टोरेंट में काम करती है.
2. वह आदमी बहुत सारी कुकबुक लिखेगा।
3. स्त्री-पुरुष एक साथ विदेश यात्रा करेंगे।
4. महिला यूनिवर्सिटी में खाना बनाना सीखती है.

Duyulan sesle eşleşen içeriği seçin.
1. Kadın şu anda bir restoranda çalışıyor.

4. Kadın üniversitede aşçılık okuyor.

general.g_text_audio: 여자: (딩동댕) 주말에도 우리 마트를 찾아 주신 손님 여러분, 감사합니다. 신선한 채소, 맛있는 과일이 있는 인주마트입니다. 마트 이용 시간은 평일 오전 아홉 시부터 밤 아홉 시까지입니다. 주말에는 밤 열 시까지 이용할 수 있으니 편안하게 한 시간 더 쇼핑하십시오. 많은 이용 부탁드리겠습니다. 감사합니다. (댕동딩)

g_text_audio_translate.en: Woman: (Ding dong dang) Thank you to all customers who visited our mart even on the weekend. Inju Mart has fresh vegetables and delicious fruits. The supermarket's opening hour is from 9 a.m. to 9 p.m. on weekdays. We're open until 10 p.m. on weekends, so enjoy an extra hour of shopping. Please visit us a lot. Thank you. (Dang dong ding)
g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nữ: (Ting toong teng) Cảm ơn tất cả các quý khách hàng đã đến siêu thị của chúng tôi vào cuối tuần. Đây là siêu thị Inju với các loại rau tươi, trái cây ngon. Thời gian mở cửa của siêu thị là từ 9 giờ sáng đến 9 giờ tối các ngày trong tuần. Cuối tuần mở cửa đến 10 giờ đêm nên hãy mua sắm thoải mái thêm một tiếng nữa. Mong các bạn ủng hộ thật nhiều. Xin cảm ơn (Teng toong ting)

content.q_text: 여자가 왜 이 이야기를 하고 있는지 고르십시오
q_answer: 마트를 이용할 수 있는 시간을 안내하려고
마트가 새로 문을 여는 것을 알려 주려고

explain.en:
Why does the woman say these things?

1. To show people the location of the supermarket.
2. To introduce discount products from the supermarket
3. To inform people of the times when the mart opens and closes.
4. To let people know that a new supermarket is opening.
--------------------
The woman is announcing that the supermarket's opening hour is from 9 a.m. to 9 p.m. on weekdays, and open until 10 p.m. on weekends. Thus, 3 is the correct answer.
explain.vi:
Tại sao người phụ nữ nói những điều này.

1. Để chỉ địa điểm của siêu thị
2. Để giới thiệu về những sản phẩm giảm giá của siêu thị
3. Để hướng dẫn thời gian mở cửa, đóng cửa của siêu thị
4. Để cho biết về việc siêu thị mới mở cửa
--------------------
Nhân vật nữ đang thông báo thời gian mở cửa của siêu thị là từ 9h sáng đến 9h tối các ngày trong tuần, cuối tuần mở đến 10h tối. 3 là đáp án đúng.

q_answer: 이 마트는 오늘 이용할 수 없습니다.
이 마트는 매일 오전 열 시에 시작합니다.
이 마트는 주말에 평일보다 늦게 문을 닫습니다.

explain.en:
Choose the answer that matches the content of what you heard.

1. This supermarket cannot be used today.
2. This supermarket does not sell vegetables.
3. This supermarket opens at 10 a.m. every day.
4. On weekends, this supermarket closes later than usual.
--------------------
According to the woman, the supermarket will be open for one more hour on weekends. Thus, 4 is the correct answer.
explain.vi:
Chọn đáp án phù hợp với nội dung của đoạn băng. 

1. Siêu thị này hôm nay không thể sử dụng được.
2. Ở siêu thị này không bán rau.
3. Siêu thị này mở cửa vào lúc 10 giờ sáng hàng ngày.
4. Vào cuối tuần, siêu thị này đóng cửa muộn hơn ngày thường.
--------------------
Theo lời của nhân vật nữ, siêu thị sẽ mở cửa thêm một tiếng nữa vào cuối tuần. 4 là đáp án đúng.
